Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mitigates hallucination but does not eliminate it: a deployed system must still decide, at inference time, whether its answer is actually supported by the retrieved evidence. We introduce LatentAudit, a white-box auditor that pools mid-to-late residual-stream activations from an open-weight generator and measures their Mahalanobis distance to the evidence representation. The resulting quadratic rule requires no auxiliary judge model, runs at generation time, and is simple enough to calibrate on a small held-out set. We show that residual-stream geometry carries a usable faithfulness signal, that this signal survives architecture changes and realistic retrieval failures, and that the same rule remains amenable to public verification. On PubMedQA with Llama-3-8B, LatentAudit reaches 0.942 AUROC with 0.77,ms overhead. Across three QA benchmarks and five model families (Llama-2/3, Qwen-2.5/3, Mistral), the monitor remains stable; under a four-way stress test with contradictions, retrieval misses, and partial-support noise, it reaches 0.9566--0.9815 AUROC on PubMedQA and 0.9142--0.9315 on HotpotQA. At 16-bit fixed-point precision, the audit rule preserves 99.8% of the FP16 AUROC, enabling Groth16-based public verification without revealing model weights or activations. Together, these results position residual-stream geometry as a practical basis for real-time RAG faithfulness monitoring and optional verifiable deployment.

</details>


### [222] [Towards Effective In-context Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via Domain-invariant-neurons-based Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05383)
*Jianzhi Yan,Zhiming Li,Le Liu,Zike Yuan,Shiwei Chen,Youcheng Pan,Buzhou Tang,Yang Xiang,Danny Dongning Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出DIN-Retrieval方法，通过跨领域示例提升LLM逻辑推理能力，利用领域不变神经元检索结构兼容的演示示例


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在逻辑推理方面仍有不足，现有提升策略依赖专家构建的领域内演示示例，在专业领域（如数学推理、形式逻辑、法律分析）中应用受限。需要探索跨领域示例的有效性。

Method: 提出DIN-Retrieval方法：1) 提取跨领域通用的隐藏表示（领域不变神经元向量）；2) 在推理阶段使用DIN向量检索结构兼容的跨领域演示示例用于上下文学习

Result: 在数学和逻辑推理的多种迁移设置中，该方法相比最先进方法平均提升1.8个百分点

Conclusion: 跨领域演示示例可以有效提升LLM推理性能，DIN-Retrieval方法通过检索结构兼容的跨领域示例实现了显著改进

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have made notable progress in logical reasoning, yet still fall short of human-level performance. Current boosting strategies rely on expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations, limiting their applicability in expertise-scarce domains, such as specialized mathematical reasoning, formal logic, or legal analysis. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain demonstrating examples to boost the LLMs' reasoning performance. Despite substantial domain differences, many reusable implicit logical structures are shared across domains. In order to effectively retrieve cross-domain examples for unseen domains under investigation, in this work, we further propose an effective retrieval method, called domain-invariant neurons-based retrieval (\textbf{DIN-Retrieval}). Concisely, DIN-Retrieval first summarizes a hidden representation that is universal across different domains. Then, during the inference stage, we use the DIN vector to retrieve structurally compatible cross-domain demonstrations for the in-context learning. Experimental results in multiple settings for the transfer of mathematical and logical reasoning demonstrate that our method achieves an average improvement of 1.8 over the state-of-the-art methods \footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Leon221220/DIN-Retrieval}.

</details>


### [223] [Reason Analogically via Cross-domain Prior Knowledge: An Empirical Study of Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer for In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05396)
*Le Liu,Zhiming Li,Jianzhi Yan,Zike Yuan,Shiwei Chen,Youcheng Pan,Buzhou Tang,Qingcai Chen,Yang Xiang,Danny Dongning Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了跨领域上下文学习（ICL），发现即使语义不匹配，源领域的示例也能通过修复推理结构来提升目标领域的性能，存在明显的示例吸收阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文学习依赖于同领域专家标注，限制了在专家标注稀缺场景下的应用。作者假设不同领域可能共享底层推理结构，使得源领域示例能改善目标领域推理，尽管存在语义不匹配。

Method: 进行了全面的实证研究，测试不同检索方法在跨领域上下文学习设置下的知识迁移可行性。分析了示例吸收阈值和推理结构修复机制。

Result: 证实了跨领域ICL中存在条件性正向迁移。发现了清晰的示例吸收阈值：超过该阈值后，正向迁移更可能发生，且额外示例带来更大收益。分析表明收益源于跨领域示例修复推理结构，而非语义线索。

Conclusion: 验证了利用跨领域知识迁移提升跨领域ICL性能的可行性，激励社区探索设计更有效的检索方法用于这一新方向。

Abstract: Despite its success, existing in-context learning (ICL) relies on in-domain expert demonstrations, limiting its applicability when expert annotations are scarce. We posit that different domains may share underlying reasoning structures, enabling source-domain demonstrations to improve target-domain inference despite semantic mismatch. To test this hypothesis, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study of different retrieval methods to validate the feasibility of achieving cross-domain knowledge transfer under the in-context learning setting. Our results demonstrate conditional positive transfer in cross-domain ICL. We identify a clear example absorption threshold: beyond it, positive transfer becomes more likely, and additional demonstrations yield larger gains. Further analysis suggests that these gains stem from reasoning structure repair by retrieved cross-domain examples, rather than semantic cues. Overall, our study validates the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain knowledge transfer to improve cross-domain ICL performance, motivating the community to explore designing more effective retrieval approaches for this novel direction.\footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/littlelaska/ICL-TF4LR}

</details>


### [224] [CODESTRUCT: Code Agents over Structured Action Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05407)
*Myeongsoo Kim,Joe Hsu,Dingmin Wang,Shweta Garg,Varun Kumar,Murali Krishna Ramanathan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: CODESTRUCT框架将代码库重构为结构化动作空间，让LLM代码代理操作AST实体而非文本片段，显著提升代码编辑准确率并降低token消耗


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM代码代理将代码库视为非结构化文本，通过脆弱的字符串匹配进行编辑，常因格式漂移或模糊模式而失败。需要更可靠的结构化方法来处理代码编辑任务。

Method: 提出CODESTRUCT框架，将代码库重构为结构化动作空间，提供readCode检索完整语法单元和editCode应用语法验证的转换到语义程序元素，操作AST实体而非文本片段。

Result: 在SWE-Bench Verified上评估6个LLM，CODESTRUCT将Pass@1准确率提升1.2-5.0%，token消耗降低12-38%。GPT-5-nano提升20.8%，空补丁失败率从46.6%降至7.2%。在CodeAssistBench上准确率提升0.8-4.4%，成本降低达33%。

Conclusion: 结构感知接口为代码代理提供了更可靠的基础，通过操作AST实体而非文本片段，显著提升了代码编辑的准确性和效率。

Abstract: LLM-based code agents treat repositories as unstructured text, applying edits through brittle string matching that frequently fails due to formatting drift or ambiguous patterns. We propose reframing the codebase as a structured action space where agents operate on named AST entities rather than text spans. Our framework, CODESTRUCT, provides readCode for retrieving complete syntactic units and editCode for applying syntax-validated transformations to semantic program elements. Evaluated on SWE-Bench Verified across six LLMs, CODESTRUCT improves Pass@1 accuracy by 1.2-5.0% while reducing token consumption by 12-38% for most models. Models that frequently fail to produce valid patches under text-based interfaces benefit most: GPT-5-nano improves by 20.8% as empty-patch failures drop from 46.6% to 7.2%. On CodeAssistBench, we observe consistent accuracy gains (+0.8-4.4%) with cost reductions up to 33%. Our results show that structure-aware interfaces offer a more reliable foundation for code agents.

</details>


### [225] [PRISM-MCTS: Learning from Reasoning Trajectories with Metacognitive Reflection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05424)
*Siyuan Cheng,Bozhong Tian,YanChao Hao,Zheng Wei*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: PRISM-MCTS是一个新颖的推理框架，通过过程奖励模型和动态共享内存来优化蒙特卡洛树搜索，减少计算冗余，在少样本情况下实现高效推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MCTS方法将每次rollout视为独立轨迹，缺乏信息共享，导致效率低下和计算冗余。受到人类并行思维和反思过程的启发，需要一种能够从先前探索中学习并优化推理过程的方法。

Method: 提出PRISM-MCTS框架：1) 集成过程奖励模型(PRM)评估推理步骤质量；2) 使用动态共享内存捕获"启发式"和"谬误"；3) 强化成功策略并修剪错误分支；4) 开发数据高效的PRM训练策略，在少样本情况下实现高保真评估。

Result: 在多样化推理基准测试中验证了有效性：在GPQA上将轨迹需求减半，同时超越MCTS-RAG和Search-o1，表明通过明智而非穷尽的推理来扩展推理能力。

Conclusion: PRISM-MCTS通过元认知反思从推理轨迹中学习，实现了从直觉到深思熟虑认知的转变，优化了测试时计算效率，为推理模型的扩展提供了新方向。

Abstract: PRISM-MCTS: Learning from Reasoning Trajectories with Metacognitive Reflection Siyuan Cheng, Bozhong Tian, Yanchao Hao, Zheng Wei Published: 06 Apr 2026, Last Modified: 06 Apr 2026 ACL 2026 Findings Conference, Area Chairs, Reviewers, Publication Chairs, Authors Revisions BibTeX CC BY 4.0 Keywords: Efficient/Low-Resource Methods for NLP, Generation, Question Answering Abstract: The emergence of reasoning models, exemplified by OpenAI o1, signifies a transition from intuitive to deliberative cognition, effectively reorienting the scaling laws from pre-training paradigms toward test-time computation. While Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) has shown promise in this domain, existing approaches typically treat each rollout as an isolated trajectory. This lack of information sharing leads to severe inefficiency and substantial computational redundancy, as the search process fails to leverage insights from prior explorations. To address these limitations, we propose PRISM-MCTS, a novel reasoning framework that draws inspiration from human parallel thinking and reflective processes. PRISM-MCTS integrates a Process Reward Model (PRM) with a dynamic shared memory, capturing both "Heuristics" and "Fallacies". By reinforcing successful strategies and pruning error-prone branches, PRISM-MCTS effectively achieves refinement. Furthermore, we develop a data-efficient training strategy for the PRM, achieving high-fidelity evaluation under a few-shot regime. Empirical evaluations across diverse reasoning benchmarks substantiate the efficacy of PRISM-MCTS. Notably, it halves the trajectory requirements on GPQA while surpassing MCTS-RAG and Search-o1, demonstrating that it scales inference by reasoning judiciously rather than exhaustively.

</details>


### [226] [Can We Trust a Black-box LLM? LLM Untrustworthy Boundary Detection via Bias-Diffusion and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05483)
*Xiaotian Zhou,Di Tang,Xiaofeng Wang,Xiaozhong Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出GMRL-BD算法，通过知识图谱和强化学习代理识别LLM的不信任边界（话题层面），在有限查询下检测模型可能产生偏见的主题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在多样话题上表现出色，但有时会产生偏见、意识形态化或不正确的回答。由于不清楚模型在哪些话题上可信，限制了其应用。需要一种方法来识别LLM的不信任边界。

Method: 基于维基百科构建通用知识图谱，设计GMRL-BD算法，结合多个强化学习代理，在黑盒访问和特定查询约束下，高效识别LLM可能产生偏见的话题（KG中的节点）

Result: 实验证明算法高效，仅需有限查询即可检测不信任边界。发布了包含Llama2、Vicuna、Falcon、Qwen2、Gemma2、Yi-1.5等流行LLM的新数据集，标注了每个模型可能产生偏见的话题

Conclusion: GMRL-BD算法能有效识别LLM的不信任边界，为评估模型可信度提供了新方法，有助于理解LLM在哪些话题上可能产生偏见，促进更安全的AI应用

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown a high capability in answering questions on a diverse range of topics. However, these models sometimes produce biased, ideologized or incorrect responses, limiting their applications if there is no clear understanding of which topics their answers can be trusted. In this research, we introduce a novel algorithm, named as GMRL-BD, designed to identify the untrustworthy boundaries (in terms of topics) of a given LLM, with black-box access to the LLM and under specific query constraints. Based on a general Knowledge Graph (KG) derived from Wikipedia, our algorithm incorporates with multiple reinforcement learning agents to efficiently identify topics (some nodes in KG) where the LLM is likely to generate biased answers. Our experiments demonstrated the efficiency of our algorithm, which can detect the untrustworthy boundary with just limited queries to the LLM. Additionally, we have released a new dataset containing popular LLMs including Llama2, Vicuna, Falcon, Qwen2, Gemma2 and Yi-1.5, along with labels indicating the topics on which each LLM is likely to be biased.

</details>


### [227] [Auditable Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05485)
*Yi Nian,Aojie Yuan,Haiyue Zhang,Jiate Li,Yue Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文提出智能体系统审计性的概念框架，强调没有审计性就无法实现问责制，定义了审计性的五个维度，并通过实证研究展示了当前开源项目的安全缺陷、运行时开销和恢复能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM智能体系统能够调用工具、查询数据库、触发外部副作用，核心问题从防止有害行为转变为部署后如何确保行为可追溯和可问责。作者认为没有审计性的智能体系统无法实现真正的问责制

Method: 1) 概念框架：区分问责制、审计性和审计过程；2) 定义审计性五个维度：行动可恢复性、生命周期覆盖、策略可检查性、责任归属、证据完整性；3) 提出三类机制：检测、执行、恢复；4) 实证研究：生态系统安全测量、运行时性能评估、受控恢复实验

Result: 1) 生态系统测量：6个主流开源项目发现617个安全缺陷；2) 运行时开销：预执行调解与防篡改记录仅增加8.3毫秒中位延迟；3) 恢复实验：即使传统日志缺失，也能部分恢复责任相关信息；4) 提出智能体系统审计性卡片框架

Conclusion: 智能体系统必须设计审计性才能实现问责制，单一方法不足，需要多层次机制。论文提供了概念框架、实证证据和实用工具，并识别了六个按机制分类的开放研究问题

Abstract: LLM agents call tools, query databases, delegate tasks, and trigger external side effects. Once an agent system can act in the world, the question is no longer only whether harmful actions can be prevented--it is whether those actions remain answerable after deployment. We distinguish accountability (the ability to determine compliance and assign responsibility), auditability (the system property that makes accountability possible), and auditing (the process of reconstructing behavior from trustworthy evidence). Our claim is direct: no agent system can be accountable without auditability.
  To make this operational, we define five dimensions of agent auditability, i.e., action recoverability, lifecycle coverage, policy checkability, responsibility attribution, and evidence integrity, and identify three mechanism classes (detect, enforce, recover) whose temporal information-and-intervention constraints explain why, in practice, no single approach suffices. We support the position with layered evidence rather than a single benchmark: lower-bound ecosystem measurements suggest that even basic security prerequisites for auditability are widely unmet (617 security findings across six prominent open-source projects); runtime feasibility results show that pre-execution mediation with tamper-evident records adds only 8.3 ms median overhead; and controlled recovery experiments show that responsibility-relevant information can be partially recovered even when conventional logs are missing. We propose an Auditability Card for agent systems and identify six open research problems organized by mechanism class.

</details>


### [228] [Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05497)
*Keuntae Kim,Mingyu Kang,Yong Suk Choi*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文分析了扩散多模态大语言模型（dMLLMs）在思维链推理中的问题：过早生成最终答案且视觉信息利用不足，提出了位置和步数惩罚（PSP）与视觉推理引导（VRG）来改善推理质量和速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散多模态大语言模型（dMLLMs）结合了扩散模型的并行生成优势和LLMs的推理能力，但在思维链推理中表现出两个关键问题：1）过早生成最终答案，导致推理不充分；2）早期时间步对视觉提示依赖不足，视觉信息利用模式与自回归视觉语言模型不同。

Method: 提出两种方法：1）位置和步数惩罚（PSP）：在早期时间步惩罚后续位置的token，延迟过早答案生成，鼓励跨时间步的渐进推理；2）视觉推理引导（VRG）：受无分类器引导启发，增强视觉基础信号，提高模型与视觉证据的对齐。

Result: 在多种dMLLMs上的实验表明，该方法实现了高达7.5%的准确率提升，同时相比使用四倍扩散步数的推理，提供了超过3倍的加速。

Conclusion: dMLLMs在思维链推理中存在过早答案生成和视觉基础不足的问题，提出的PSP和VRG方法有效改善了推理质量并加速了推理过程，为扩散多模态模型的推理优化提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives to autoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodal tasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models (dMLLMs). These models are expected to retain the reasoning capabilities of LLMs while enabling faster inference through parallel generation. However, when combined with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, dMLLMs exhibit two critical issues. First, we observe that dMLLMs often generate the final answer token at a very early timestep. This trend indicates that the model determines the answer before sufficient reasoning, leading to degraded reasoning performance. Second, during the initial timesteps, dMLLMs show minimal dependency on visual prompts, exhibiting a fundamentally different pattern of visual information utilization compared to AR vision-language models. In summary, these findings indicate that dMLLMs tend to generate premature final answers without sufficiently grounding on visual inputs. To address these limitations, we propose Position and Step Penalty (PSP) and Visual Reasoning Guidance (VRG). PSP penalizes tokens in later positions during early timesteps, delaying premature answer generation and encouraging progressive reasoning across timesteps. VRG, inspired by classifier-free guidance, amplifies visual grounding signals to enhance the model's alignment with visual evidence. Extensive experiments across various dMLLMs demonstrate that our method achieves up to 7.5% higher accuracy while delivering more than 3x speedup compared to reasoning with four times more diffusion steps.

</details>


### [229] [UniCreative: Unifying Long-form Logic and Short-form Sparkle via Reference-Free Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05517)
*Xiaolong Wei,Zerun Zhu,Simin Niu,Xingyu Zhang,Peiying Yu,Changxuan Xiao,Yuchen Li,Jicheng Yang,Zhejun Zhao,Chong Meng,Long Xia,Daiting Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: UniCreative：统一的免参考强化学习框架，通过自适应约束感知奖励模型（AC-GenRM）和策略优化算法（ACPO），解决创意写作中长文本全局连贯性与短文本局部表现力的平衡问题，无需监督微调和真实参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 创意写作面临核心矛盾：长文本需要宏观规划以保持全局连贯性，短文本则需要自发无约束的表达。现有对齐方法依赖静态奖励信号和高质量监督数据，成本高且难以扩展。

Method: 提出UniCreative统一框架：1) AC-GenRM自适应约束感知奖励模型，动态合成查询特定标准进行细粒度偏好判断；2) ACPO策略优化算法，在内容质量和结构范式上对齐人类偏好，无需监督微调和真实参考。

Result: AC-GenRM与专家评估高度一致；ACPO在多样化写作任务中显著提升性能。关键发现：模型涌现出元认知能力，能自主区分需要严谨规划的任务和适合直接生成的任务。

Conclusion: UniCreative框架有效解决了创意写作中的全局-局部平衡问题，验证了直接对齐方法的有效性，为LLM在创意写作领域的应用提供了新范式。

Abstract: A fundamental challenge in creative writing lies in reconciling the inherent tension between maintaining global coherence in long-form narratives and preserving local expressiveness in short-form texts. While long-context generation necessitates explicit macroscopic planning, short-form creativity often demands spontaneous, constraint-free expression. Existing alignment paradigms, however, typically employ static reward signals and rely heavily on high-quality supervised data, which is costly and difficult to scale. To address this, we propose \textbf{UniCreative}, a unified reference-free reinforcement learning framework. We first introduce \textbf{AC-GenRM}, an adaptive constraint-aware reward model that dynamically synthesizes query-specific criteria to provide fine-grained preference judgments. Leveraging these signals, we propose \textbf{ACPO}, a policy optimization algorithm that aligns models with human preferences across both content quality and structural paradigms without supervised fine-tuning and ground-truth references. Empirical results demonstrate that AC-GenRM aligns closely with expert evaluations, while ACPO significantly enhances performance across diverse writing tasks. Crucially, our analysis reveals an emergent meta-cognitive ability: the model learns to autonomously differentiate between tasks requiring rigorous planning and those favoring direct generation, validating the effectiveness of our direct alignment approach.

</details>


### [230] [Market-Bench: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Economic and Trade Competition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05523)
*Yushuo Zheng,Huiyu Duan,Zicheng Zhang,Yucheng Zhu,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Market-Bench是一个评估LLM在经济相关任务中能力的基准测试，通过多智能体供应链经济模型模拟采购和零售竞争，揭示LLM在经济资源管理方面的性能差异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估大型语言模型在经济资源管理和获取方面的能力，目前这方面的研究尚不明确。需要建立一个系统性的基准来测试LLM在竞争性市场环境中的表现

Method: 构建可配置的多智能体供应链经济模型，LLM作为零售商代理参与两个阶段：1) 采购阶段：在预算约束的拍卖中竞标有限库存；2) 零售阶段：设定零售价格、生成营销口号，通过基于角色的注意力机制提供给买家。记录完整的轨迹数据，使用经济、运营和语义指标进行自动评估

Result: 在20个开源和闭源LLM代理上进行基准测试，发现显著的性能差异和"赢家通吃"现象：只有少数LLM零售商能够持续实现资本增值，而许多模型尽管语义匹配分数相似，却只能维持在盈亏平衡点附近

Conclusion: Market-Bench为研究LLM在竞争性市场中的交互提供了可复现的测试平台，揭示了LLM在经济决策能力方面的重要差异

Abstract: The ability of large language models (LLMs) to manage and acquire economic resources remains unclear. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{Market-Bench}, a comprehensive benchmark that evaluates the capabilities of LLMs in economically-relevant tasks through economic and trade competition. Specifically, we construct a configurable multi-agent supply chain economic model where LLMs act as retailer agents responsible for procuring and retailing merchandise. In the \textbf{procurement} stage, LLMs bid for limited inventory in budget-constrained auctions. In the \textbf{retail} stage, LLMs set retail prices, generate marketing slogans, and provide them to buyers through a role-based attention mechanism for purchase. Market-Bench logs complete trajectories of bids, prices, slogans, sales, and balance-sheet states, enabling automatic evaluation with economic, operational, and semantic metrics. Benchmarking on 20 open- and closed-source LLM agents reveals significant performance disparities and winner-take-most phenomenon, \textit{i.e.}, only a small subset of LLM retailers can consistently achieve capital appreciation, while many hover around the break-even point despite similar semantic matching scores. Market-Bench provides a reproducible testbed for studying how LLMs interact in competitive markets.

</details>


### [231] [COSMO-Agent: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization,Simulation,and Modeling Orchestration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05547)
*Liyuan Deng,Shujian Deng,Yongkang Chen,Yongkang Dai,Zhihang Zhong,Linyang Li,Xiao Sun,Yilei Shi,Huaxi Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: COSMO-Agent：基于工具增强强化学习的框架，教LLM完成闭环CAD-CAE流程，解决工业设计仿真优化中的CAD-CAE语义鸿沟问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业设计仿真优化面临CAD-CAE语义鸿沟瓶颈：难以将仿真反馈转化为符合多种耦合约束的有效几何编辑。现有方法无法自动完成从仿真结果到几何修改的闭环流程。

Method: 将CAD生成、CAE求解、结果解析和几何修订构建为交互式RL环境，让LLM学习协调外部工具并修改参数化几何直至满足约束。设计多约束奖励函数，鼓励可行性、工具链鲁棒性和结构化输出有效性。

Result: COSMO-Agent训练显著提升了小型开源LLM在约束驱动设计方面的能力，在可行性、效率和稳定性方面超过大型开源和闭源模型。提供了覆盖25个组件类别的行业对齐数据集。

Conclusion: 该框架成功弥合了CAD-CAE语义鸿沟，使LLM能够自主完成工业设计仿真优化闭环，为自动化设计优化提供了新途径。

Abstract: Iterative industrial design-simulation optimization is bottlenecked by the CAD-CAE semantic gap: translating simulation feedback into valid geometric edits under diverse, coupled constraints. To fill this gap, we propose COSMO-Agent (Closed-loop Optimization, Simulation, and Modeling Orchestration), a tool-augmented reinforcement learning (RL) framework that teaches LLMs to complete the closed-loop CAD-CAE process. Specifically, we cast CAD generation, CAE solving, result parsing, and geometry revision as an interactive RL environment, where an LLM learns to orchestrate external tools and revise parametric geometries until constraints are satisfied. To make this learning stable and industrially usable, we design a multi-constraint reward that jointly encourages feasibility, toolchain robustness, and structured output validity. In addition, we contribute an industry-aligned dataset that covers 25 component categories with executable CAD-CAE tasks to support realistic training and evaluation. Experiments show that COSMO-Agent training substantially improves small open-source LLMs for constraint-driven design, exceeding large open-source and strong closed-source models in feasibility, efficiency, and stability.

</details>


### [232] [ResearchEVO: An End-to-End Framework for Automated Scientific Discovery and Documentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05587)
*Zhe Zhao,Haibin Wen,Jiaming Ma,Jiachang Zhan,Tianyi Xu,Ye Wei,Qingfu Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: ResearchEVO是一个端到端框架，通过LLM引导的双维协同进化（算法逻辑和架构优化）进行无监督算法发现，然后通过检索增强生成自动撰写完整研究论文，实现"发现-解释"的科学突破范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文旨在计算化实现科学突破的经典两阶段模式：初始无方向实验发现意外结果，后续回顾性解释。现有系统未能完整覆盖从算法进化到科学文档生成的端到端流程。

Method: 1. 进化阶段：使用LLM引导的双维协同进化，同时优化算法逻辑和整体架构，仅基于适应度搜索代码实现空间，无需理解解决方案。2. 写作阶段：通过句子级检索增强生成，结合显式反幻觉验证和自动化实验设计，为最佳算法生成完整可发表的研究论文。

Result: 在量子纠错（使用谷歌真实量子硬件数据）和物理信息神经网络两个跨学科问题上，进化阶段发现了领域文献中未提出的人类可解释算法机制，写作阶段生成了可编译的LaTeX稿件，通过RAG正确地将这些盲发现与现有理论关联，零伪造引用。

Conclusion: ResearchEVO是首个完整覆盖从原则性算法进化到文献基础科学文档生成的端到端系统，成功实现了计算化的"发现-解释"科学范式。

Abstract: An important recurring pattern in scientific breakthroughs is a two-stage process: an initial phase of undirected experimentation that yields an unexpected finding, followed by a retrospective phase that explains why the finding works and situates it within existing theory. We present ResearchEVO, an end-to-end framework that computationally instantiates this discover-then-explain paradigm. The Evolution Phase employs LLM-guided bi-dimensional co-evolution -- simultaneously optimizing both algorithmic logic and overall architecture -- to search the space of code implementations purely by fitness, without requiring any understanding of the solutions it produces. The Writing Phase then takes the best-performing algorithm and autonomously generates a complete, publication-ready research paper through sentence-level retrieval-augmented generation with explicit anti-hallucination verification and automated experiment design. To our knowledge, ResearchEVO is the first system to cover this full pipeline end to end: no prior work jointly performs principled algorithm evolution and literature-grounded scientific documentation. We validate the framework on two cross-disciplinary scientific problems -- Quantum Error Correction using real Google quantum hardware data, and Physics-Informed Neural Networks -- where the Evolution Phase discovered human-interpretable algorithmic mechanisms that had not been previously proposed in the respective domain literatures. In both cases, the Writing Phase autonomously produced compilable LaTeX manuscripts that correctly grounded these blind discoveries in existing theory via RAG, with zero fabricated citations.

</details>


### [233] [Label Effects: Shared Heuristic Reliance in Trust Assessment by Humans and LLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05593)
*Xin Sun,Di Wu,Sijing Qin,Isao Echizen,Abdallah El Ali,Saku Sugawara*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: LLM作为评估者时，其信任判断会受到信息来源标签（人类撰写 vs AI生成）的偏见影响，与人类类似地依赖标签作为启发式线索


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战LLM作为自动评估者（LLM-as-a-Judge）的可靠性，研究信息来源标签如何影响LLM和人类的信任判断，揭示评估中的偏见问题

Method: 采用反事实设计，比较相同内容在不同标签条件下的信任评估；使用眼动追踪分析人类注意力模式；分析LLM内部状态（注意力分布和logits不确定性）

Result: 人类和LLM评估者都对标记为"人类撰写"的内容给予更高信任；眼动追踪显示人类严重依赖标签作为启发式线索；LLM在标签区域的注意力密度高于内容区域，且人类标签条件下的标签主导性更强；AI标签条件下的决策不确定性更高

Conclusion: 信息来源标签是影响人类和LLM信任判断的显著启发式线索，这对标签敏感的LLM-as-a-Judge评估的有效性提出质疑，需要去偏见的评估和对齐方法

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators (LLM-as-a-Judge). This work challenges its reliability by showing that trust judgments by LLMs are biased by disclosed source labels. Using a counterfactual design, we find that both humans and LLM judges assign higher trust to information labeled as human-authored than to the same content labeled as AI-generated. Eye-tracking data reveal that humans rely heavily on source labels as heuristic cues for judgments. We analyze LLM internal states during judgment. Across label conditions, models allocate denser attention to the label region than the content region, and this label dominance is stronger under Human labels than AI labels, consistent with the human gaze patterns. Besides, decision uncertainty measured by logits is higher under AI labels than Human labels. These results indicate that the source label is a salient heuristic cue for both humans and LLMs. It raises validity concerns for label-sensitive LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, and we cautiously raise that aligning models with human preferences may propagate human heuristic reliance into models, motivating debiased evaluation and alignment.

</details>


### [234] [Beyond Behavior: Why AI Evaluation Needs a Cognitive Revolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05631)
*Amir Konigsberg*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文认为图灵的行为主义认识论（仅基于输出判断智能）限制了AI研究70年，阻碍了对内部计算过程的探究，需要类似心理学从行为主义到认知主义的认识论转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图灵1950年提出的行为测试（图灵测试）不仅是一种实用简化，更是一种认识论承诺，这种仅基于输出判断智能的行为主义方法限制了AI领域70年的发展，使其无法探究智能系统的内部计算过程和机制。

Method: 通过历史分析追溯图灵行为主义认识论如何嵌入AI评估基础设施，并与心理学从行为主义到认知主义的转变进行结构类比，论证行为证据的局限性。

Result: 揭示了AI领域当前无法区分通过不同计算过程实现相同输出的系统，而这正是智能归因的关键区别。行为主义认识论使关于过程、机制和内部组织的问题变得不可问。

Conclusion: AI领域需要进行类似认知革命的认识论转变，不是放弃行为证据，而是认识到仅凭行为证据不足以支持该领域希望做出的建构主张。需要发展后行为主义认识论来探究内部计算过程。

Abstract: In 1950, Alan Turing proposed replacing the question "Can machines think?" with a behavioral test: if a machine's outputs are indistinguishable from those of a thinking being, the question of whether it truly thinks can be set aside. This paper argues that Turing's move was not only a pragmatic simplification but also an epistemological commitment, a decision about what kind of evidence counts as relevant to intelligence attribution, and that this commitment has quietly constrained AI research for seven decades. We trace how Turing's behavioral epistemology became embedded in the field's evaluative infrastructure, rendering unaskable a class of questions about process, mechanism, and internal organization that cognitive psychology, neuroscience, and related disciplines learned to ask. We draw a structural parallel to the behaviorist-to-cognitivist transition in psychology: just as psychology's commitment to studying only observable behavior prevented it from asking productive questions about internal mental processes until that commitment was abandoned, AI's commitment to behavioral evaluation prevents it from distinguishing between systems that achieve identical outputs through fundamentally different computational processes, a distinction on which intelligence attribution depends. We argue that the field requires an epistemological transition comparable to the cognitive revolution: not an abandonment of behavioral evidence, but a recognition that behavioral evidence alone is insufficient for the construct claims the field wishes to make. We articulate what a post-behaviorist epistemology for AI would involve and identify the specific questions it would make askable that the field currently has no way to ask.

</details>


### [235] [LUDOBENCH: Evaluating LLM Behavioural Decision-Making Through Spot-Based Board Game Scenarios in Ludo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05681)
*Ojas Jain,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: LudoBench是一个评估LLM在Ludo游戏中战略推理能力的基准，包含480个手工场景和4玩家模拟器，发现模型与游戏理论基准仅有40-46%的一致性，并识别出两种行为原型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM基准在评估战略推理方面存在不足，特别是在具有随机性和多代理交互的复杂环境中。Ludo游戏提供了包含骰子机制、棋子捕获、安全方格导航和归家路径进展的有意义的规划复杂性，适合评估LLM的战略推理能力。

Method: 1. 创建LudoBench基准：包含480个手工制作的场景，覆盖12个行为不同的决策类别
2. 开发完整的4玩家Ludo模拟器：支持随机、启发式、游戏理论和LLM代理
3. 游戏理论代理使用期望最小最大搜索和深度限制前瞻
4. 评估6个模型（覆盖4个模型家族）在战略决策上的表现

Result: 1. 所有模型与游戏理论基准的一致性仅为40-46%
2. 模型分为两种行为原型：完成者（完成棋子但忽视发展）和建设者（发展但从不完成），每种原型只捕捉到游戏理论策略的一半
3. 在历史条件怨恨框架下，模型在相同棋盘状态下表现出可测量的行为转变，揭示提示敏感性是关键弱点

Conclusion: LudoBench提供了一个轻量级且可解释的框架，用于在不确定性下评估LLM的战略推理能力。当前LLM在复杂战略推理方面存在显著不足，表现出有限的行为模式和对提示的敏感性。

Abstract: We introduce LudoBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM strategic reasoning in Ludo, a stochastic multi-agent board game whose dice mechanics, piece capture, safe-square navigation, and home-path progression introduce meaningful planning complexity. LudoBench comprises 480 handcrafted spot scenarios across 12 behaviorally distinct decision categories, each isolating a specific strategic choice. We additionally contribute a fully functional 4-player Ludo simulator supporting Random, Heuristic, Game-Theory, and LLM agents. The game-theory agent uses Expectiminimax search with depth-limited lookahead to provide a principled strategic ceiling beyond greedy heuristics. Evaluating six models spanning four model families, we find that all models agree with the game-theory baseline only 40-46% of the time. Models split into distinct behavioral archetypes: finishers that complete pieces but neglect development, and builders that develop but never finish. Each archetype captures only half of the game theory strategy. Models also display measurable behavioral shifts under history-conditioned grudge framing on identical board states, revealing prompt-sensitivity as a key vulnerability. LudoBench provides a lightweight and interpretable framework for benchmarking LLM strategic reasoning under uncertainty. All code, the spot dataset (480 entries) and model outputs are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LudoBench-5CBF/

</details>


### [236] [Can Large Language Models Reinvent Foundational Algorithms?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05716)
*Jian Zhao,Haoren Luo,Yu Wang,Yuhan Cao,Pingyue Sheng,Tianxing He*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: LLMs通过"遗忘-再发明"流程测试能否重新发明基础算法，Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507在无提示下成功再发明50%算法，生成验证器在推理阶段起关键作用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索LLMs是否具备基础创新能力，特别是能否重新发明计算机科学中的基础算法，这是基础创新的先决条件

Method: 采用"遗忘-再发明"流程：首先使用基于GRPO的策略遗忘方法从LLM中移除特定基础算法知识，然后在受控环境中测试模型能否重新发明该算法。包含三个提示级别，并在Strassen算法测试时使用测试时强化学习

Result: Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507在无提示下成功再发明50%算法，一级提示下70%，二级提示下90%。高级提示能提高成功率，但逐步提示对复杂算法无效。测试时强化学习使Strassen算法在二级提示下成功再发明

Conclusion: LLMs具备一定的创新思维能力，但仍有局限性。生成验证器在维持推理强度、避免"思维崩溃"现象中起关键作用，为LLMs创新潜力提供了新见解

Abstract: LLMs have shown strong potential to advance scientific discovery. Whether they possess the capacity for foundational innovation, however, remains an open question. In this work, we focus on a prerequisite for foundational innovation: can LLMs reinvent foundational algorithms in computer science? Our \textit{Unlearn-and-Reinvent} pipeline applies LLM unlearning to remove a specific foundational algorithm, such as Dijkstra's or Euclid's algorithm, from an LLM's pretrained knowledge, and then tests whether the model can reinvent it in a controlled environment. To enable effective unlearning, we adopt a GRPO-based, on-policy unlearning method. Across 10 target algorithms, 3 strong open-weight models, and 3 hint levels, our experiments demonstrate that (1) the strongest model Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 successfully reinvents 50% of the algorithms with no hint, 70% at hint level 1, and 90% at hint level 2; (2) a few high-level hints can enhance the reinvention success rate, but even step-by-step hints fail for those complicated algorithms; and (3) test-time reinforcement learning enables successful reinvention for the Strassen algorithm at hint level 2. Through analyses of output trajectories and ablation studies, we find that generative verifier in the reinvention phase plays a critical role in sustaining models' reasoning strength, helping to avoid the ``thought collapse'' phenomenon. These findings offer insights into both the potential and current limits of LLMs' innovative thinking.

</details>


### [237] [Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Augmented Step-Level Transitions for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05808)
*Shuai Zhen,Yanhua Yu,Ruopei Guo,Nan Cheng,Yang Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: STEP-HRL提出了一种层次强化学习框架，通过仅基于单步转移而非完整交互历史进行步级学习，显著降低了LLM代理的计算成本并提高了可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理通常依赖越来越长的交互历史，导致计算成本高且可扩展性有限。需要一种更高效的框架来减少历史依赖，同时保持决策能力。

Method: 采用层次强化学习框架，将任务分层结构化：1) 使用已完成子任务表示全局进度；2) 引入局部进度模块，迭代选择性地总结每个子任务内的交互历史；3) 为高层和低层策略生成增强的步级转移。

Result: 在ScienceWorld和ALFWorld基准测试中，STEP-HRL在性能和泛化能力上显著优于基线方法，同时大幅减少了token使用量。

Conclusion: STEP-HRL通过层次化结构和局部进度总结，有效解决了LLM代理对长交互历史的依赖问题，在保持高性能的同时提高了计算效率。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in complex interactive decision-making tasks. However, existing LLM agents typically rely on increasingly long interaction histories, resulting in high computational cost and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose STEP-HRL, a hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) framework that enables step-level learning by conditioning only on single-step transitions rather than full interaction histories. STEP-HRL structures tasks hierarchically, using completed subtasks to represent global progress of overall task. By introducing a local progress module, it also iteratively and selectively summarizes interaction history within each subtask to produce a compact summary of local progress. Together, these components yield augmented step-level transitions for both high-level and low-level policies. Experimental results on ScienceWorld and ALFWorld benchmarks consistently demonstrate that STEP-HRL substantially outperforms baselines in terms of performance and generalization while reducing token usage. Our code is available at https://github.com/TonyStark042/STEP-HRL.

</details>


### [238] [Reciprocal Trust and Distrust in Artificial Intelligence Systems: The Hard Problem of Regulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05826)
*Martino Maggetti*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文主张AI系统应被视为具有一定能动性的实体，能够与人类建立信任关系，并探讨这种双向信任动态对AI监管的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统日益普及，政策制定者、科学家和公众面临如何监管AI的棘手问题。核心问题在于AI是否可信以及如何增强其可信度，这对民主治理和AI发展部署至关重要。本文旨在推进讨论，认为AI系统应被视为具有一定能动性的实体。

Method: 本文采用理论分析方法，从哲学和社会科学角度探讨AI系统的能动性概念，分析AI与人类之间可能的信任关系，并考察这种关系对监管框架的启示。

Result: 文章提出AI系统应被认可为具有某种形式能动性的实体，能够与人类建立信任或怀疑关系。这种双向信任动态为AI监管带来了新的挑战和机遇，需要重新思考监管框架。

Conclusion: AI系统的能动性和信任关系对监管提出了根本性挑战。文章识别了这些动态带来的关键紧张关系和未解困境，为未来AI监管和治理提供了重要思考方向。

Abstract: Policy makers, scientists, and the public are increasingly confronted with thorny questions about the regulation of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. A key common thread concerns whether AI can be trusted and the factors that can make it more trustworthy in front of stakeholders and users. This is indeed crucial, as the trustworthiness of AI systems is fundamental for both democratic governance and for the development and deployment of AI. This article advances the discussion by arguing that AI systems should also be recognized, as least to some extent, as artifacts capable of exercising a form of agency, thereby enabling them to engage in relationships of trust or distrust with humans. It further examines the implications of these reciprocal trust dynamics for regulators tasked with overseeing AI systems. The article concludes by identifying key tensions and unresolved dilemmas that these dynamics pose for the future of AI regulation and governance.

</details>


### [239] [Vision-Guided Iterative Refinement for Frontend Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05839)
*Hannah Sansford,Derek H. C. Law,Wei Liu,Abhishek Tripathi,Niresh Agarwal,Gerrit J. J. van den Burg*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出一个自动化视觉批评框架，使用视觉语言模型评估网页渲染效果，指导代码生成的迭代优化，在WebDev Arena数据集上实现17.8%性能提升，并通过LoRA微调实现25%的增益内化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前代码生成依赖多阶段人工干预，成本高昂，特别是在前端网页开发这种解决方案质量依赖于视觉渲染输出的领域。需要自动化方法来减少人工成本并提高代码生成质量。

Method: 提出完全自动化的批评循环框架：1) 使用视觉语言模型作为视觉批评者，对渲染的网页提供结构化反馈；2) 基于反馈指导代码生成的迭代优化；3) 使用LoRA进行参数高效微调，将批评者的改进内化到代码生成LLM中。

Result: 在WebDev Arena真实用户请求上，该方法在三个优化周期内实现17.8%的性能提升。LoRA微调实现了最佳批评循环解决方案25%的增益，且没有显著增加token数量。

Conclusion: 基于VLM的自动化前端代码生成批评能显著提高解决方案质量，超越单次LLM推理的效果。迭代优化对于网页开发等复杂视觉输出至关重要，参数高效微调可以部分内化批评者的改进。

Abstract: Code generation with large language models often relies on multi-stage human-in-the-loop refinement, which is effective but very costly - particularly in domains such as frontend web development where the solution quality depends on rendered visual output. We present a fully automated critic-in-the-loop framework in which a vision-language model serves as a visual critic that provides structured feedback on rendered webpages to guide iterative refinement of generated code. Across real-world user requests from the WebDev Arena dataset, this approach yields consistent improvements in solution quality, achieving up to 17.8% increase in performance over three refinement cycles. Next, we investigate parameter-efficient fine-tuning using LoRA to understand whether the improvements provided by the critic can be internalized by the code-generating LLM. Fine-tuning achieves 25% of the gains from the best critic-in-the-loop solution without a significant increase in token counts. Our findings indicate that automated, VLM-based critique of frontend code generation leads to significantly higher quality solutions than can be achieved through a single LLM inference pass, and highlight the importance of iterative refinement for the complex visual outputs associated with web development.

</details>


### [240] [Deep Researcher Agent: An Autonomous Framework for 24/7 Deep Learning Experimentation with Zero-Cost Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05854)
*Xiangyue Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Deep Researcher Agent是一个开源框架，使LLM代理能够自主进行深度学习实验，涵盖假设形成、代码实现、训练执行、结果分析和迭代优化的完整实验生命周期。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI研究助手主要关注论文写作或代码生成，缺乏对完整实验生命周期的支持。需要开发能够自主进行深度学习实验的框架，实现24/7不间断的研究工作。

Method: 框架引入三个关键创新：1) 零成本监控 - 通过进程级检查和日志文件读取，在模型训练期间实现零LLM API成本；2) 双层恒定大小内存 - 内存架构限制在约5K字符，防止长时间运行代理的上下文无限增长；3) 最小工具集领导者-工作者架构 - 每个工作者代理仅配备3-5个工具，减少每次调用的token开销达73%。

Result: 在持续30+天的部署中，框架在四个并发研究项目中自主完成了500+个实验周期，在一个项目中通过200+个自动化实验实现了52%的基线指标改进，平均LLM成本为每24小时周期0.08美元。

Conclusion: Deep Researcher Agent框架成功实现了LLM代理的自主深度学习实验，通过创新的监控、内存和架构设计解决了长期运行代理的关键挑战，为自动化AI研究提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We present \textbf{Deep Researcher Agent}, an open-source framework that enables large language model (LLM) agents to autonomously conduct deep learning experiments around the clock. Unlike existing AI research assistants that focus on paper writing or code generation, our system addresses the full experiment lifecycle: hypothesis formation, code implementation, training execution, result analysis, and iterative refinement. The framework introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{Zero-Cost Monitoring} -- a monitoring paradigm that incurs zero LLM API costs during model training by relying solely on process-level checks and log file reads; (2) \textbf{Two-Tier Constant-Size Memory} -- a memory architecture capped at $\sim$5K characters regardless of runtime duration, preventing the unbounded context growth that plagues long-running agents; and (3) \textbf{Minimal-Toolset Leader-Worker Architecture} -- a multi-agent design where each worker agent is equipped with only 3--5 tools, reducing per-call token overhead by up to 73\%. In sustained deployments spanning 30+ days, the framework autonomously completed 500+ experiment cycles across four concurrent research projects, achieving a 52\% improvement over baseline metrics in one project through 200+ automated experiments -- all at an average LLM cost of \$0.08 per 24-hour cycle. Code is available at https://github.com/Xiangyue-Zhang/auto-deep-researcher-24x7.

</details>


### [241] [JTON: A Token-Efficient JSON Superset with Zen Grid Tabular Encoding for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05865)
*Gowthamkumar Nandakishore*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: JTON（JSON Tabular Object Notation）是一种严格的JSON超集，通过Zen Grid技术将表格数据的列头提取到单行，用分号分隔值，减少重复键名带来的token开销，平均降低28.5%的token数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当LLMs处理结构化数据时，标准的JSON序列化格式会在表格数组的每一行重复键名，导致token开销随行数线性增长，增加了处理成本和上下文利用率问题。

Method: 提出JTON格式，核心是Zen Grid技术：将列头提取到单行，用分号分隔值，保留JSON类型系统。提供Rust/PyO3参考实现，支持SIMD加速解析。

Result: 在7个真实领域测试中，Zen Grid相比JSON compact减少15-60%的token数量（平均28.5%）。10个LLMs的理解测试显示净+0.3pp准确率提升。12个LLMs的生成测试在few-shot和zero-shot设置下均达到100%语法有效性。

Conclusion: JTON/Zen Grid能有效减少LLMs处理表格数据时的token开销，同时保持或略微提升模型性能，提供了一种更高效的序列化格式。

Abstract: When LLMs process structured data, the serialization format directly affects cost and context utilization. Standard JSON wastes tokens repeating key names in every row of a tabular array--overhead that scales linearly with row count. This paper presents JTON (JSON Tabular Object Notation), a strict JSON superset whose main idea, Zen Grid, factors column headers into a single row and encodes values with semicolons, preserving JSON's type system while cutting redundancy. Across seven real-world domains, Zen Grid reduces token counts by 15-60% versus JSON compact (28.5% average; 32% with bare_strings). Comprehension tests on 10 LLMs show a net +0.3 pp accuracy gain over JSON: four models improve, three hold steady, and three dip slightly. Generation tests on 12 LLMs yield 100% syntactic validity in both few-shot and zero-shot settings. A Rust/PyO3 reference implementation adds SIMD-accelerated parsing at 1.4x the speed of Python's json module. Code, a 683-vector test suite, and all experimental data are publicly available.

</details>


### [242] [HybridKV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05887)
*Bowen Zeng,Feiyang Ren,Jun Zhang,Xiaoling Gu,Ke Chen,Lidan Shou,Huan Li*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: HybridKV是一个混合KV缓存压缩框架，通过分层分配预算和针对不同注意力头类型采用不同压缩策略，显著减少多模态大语言模型中的内存占用和推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在处理视觉输入时，KV缓存会随上下文长度线性增长，导致GPU内存开销巨大和解码延迟过高，即使在高性能GPU上也难以承受。

Method: 提出三阶段混合压缩框架：1）使用文本中心注意力将注意力头分类为静态或动态类型；2）采用自上而下的分层预算分配方案；3）静态头使用文本优先剪枝压缩，动态头使用分块检索压缩。

Result: 在11个多模态基准测试中，使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型，HybridKV将KV缓存内存减少高达7.9倍，解码速度提升1.52倍，性能几乎无下降甚至有所提升。

Conclusion: HybridKV通过考虑注意力头的异构行为并采用混合压缩策略，有效解决了MLLMs中KV缓存的内存和延迟问题，为高效多模态推理提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced unified reasoning over text, images, and videos, but their inference is hindered by the rapid growth of key-value (KV) caches. Each visual input expands into thousands of tokens, causing caches to scale linearly with context length and remain resident in GPU memory throughout decoding, which leads to prohibitive memory overhead and latency even on high-end GPUs. A common solution is to compress caches under a fixed allocated budget at different granularities: token-level uniformly discards less important tokens, layer-level varies retention across layers, and head-level redistributes budgets across heads. Yet these approaches stop at allocation and overlook the heterogeneous behaviors of attention heads that require distinct compression strategies. We propose HybridKV, a hybrid KV cache compression framework that integrates complementary strategies in three stages: heads are first classified into static or dynamic types using text-centric attention; then a top-down budget allocation scheme hierarchically assigns KV budgets; finally, static heads are compressed by text-prior pruning and dynamic heads by chunk-wise retrieval. Experiments on 11 multimodal benchmarks with Qwen2.5-VL-7B show that HybridKV reduces KV cache memory by up to $7.9\times$ and achieves $1.52\times$ faster decoding, with almost no performance drop or even higher relative to the full-cache MLLM.

</details>


### [243] [Context-Value-Action Architecture for Value-Driven Large Language Model Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05939)
*TianZe Zhang,Sirui Sun,Yuhang Xie,Xin Zhang,Zhiqiang Wu,Guojie Song*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出CVA架构解决LLM代理行为僵化问题，通过解耦行动生成与认知推理，使用基于真实人类数据的价值验证器建模动态价值激活，显著提升行为保真度和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理存在行为僵化问题，且当前"LLM作为评判者"的评估方法存在自指偏见，掩盖了这一问题。研究发现增加提示驱动的推理强度反而加剧价值极化，降低群体多样性。

Method: 提出基于刺激-有机体-反应模型和施瓦茨基本人类价值理论的CVA架构，通过价值验证器解耦行动生成与认知推理，该验证器基于真实人类数据训练，能显式建模动态价值激活。

Result: 在包含110万条真实世界交互轨迹的CVABench上，CVA显著优于基线方法，有效缓解极化现象，同时提供更优的行为保真度和可解释性。

Conclusion: CVA架构通过解耦行动生成与认知推理，基于真实人类数据建模动态价值激活，能有效解决LLM代理行为僵化和价值极化问题，提升模拟人类行为的质量。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in simulating human behavior, yet existing agents often exhibit behavioral rigidity, a flaw frequently masked by the self-referential bias of current "LLM-as-a-judge" evaluations. By evaluating against empirical ground truth, we reveal a counter-intuitive phenomenon: increasing the intensity of prompt-driven reasoning does not enhance fidelity but rather exacerbates value polarization, collapsing population diversity. To address this, we propose the Context-Value-Action (CVA) architecture, grounded in the Stimulus-Organism-Response (S-O-R) model and Schwartz's Theory of Basic Human Values. Unlike methods relying on self-verification, CVA decouples action generation from cognitive reasoning via a novel Value Verifier trained on authentic human data to explicitly model dynamic value activation. Experiments on CVABench, which comprises over 1.1 million real-world interaction traces, demonstrate that CVA significantly outperforms baselines. Our approach effectively mitigates polarization while offering superior behavioral fidelity and interpretability.

</details>


### [244] [CURE:Circuit-Aware Unlearning for LLM-based Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04982)
*Ziheng Chen,Jiali Cheng,Zezhong Fan,Hadi Amiri,Yunzhi Yao,Xiangguo Sun,Yang Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: CURE是一个面向LLM推荐系统的电路感知遗忘学习框架，通过解耦模型组件为功能不同的子集并选择性更新，解决传统遗忘学习中梯度冲突和不稳定优化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着隐私法规收紧，LLM推荐系统面临显著隐私风险，遗忘算法变得至关重要。现有方法将遗忘视为遗忘和保留目标的加权组合，导致梯度冲突、优化不稳定，且过程不透明。

Method: 提出电路感知遗忘框架CURE：1) 提取项目推荐的核心电路；2) 分析电路中各模块对遗忘和保留目标的贡献；3) 将模块分类为遗忘特定、保留特定和任务共享组；4) 为每组应用特定更新规则以缓解梯度冲突。

Result: 在真实世界数据集上的实验表明，CURE比现有基线方法实现了更有效的遗忘学习。

Conclusion: CURE通过电路感知的模块化方法解决了LLM推荐系统中遗忘学习的梯度冲突和透明度问题，为隐私保护推荐提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new opportunities for recommender systems by enabling rich semantic understanding and reasoning about user interests and item attributes. However, as privacy regulations tighten, incorporating user data into LLM-based recommendation (LLMRec) introduces significant privacy risks, making unlearning algorithms increasingly crucial for practical deployment. Despite growing interest in LLMRec unlearning, most existing approaches formulate unlearning as a weighted combination of forgetting and retaining objectives while updating model parameters in a uniform manner. Such formulations inevitably induce gradient conflicts between the two objectives, leading to unstable optimization and resulting in either ineffective unlearning or severe degradation of model utility. Moreover, the unlearning procedure remains largely black-box, undermining its transparency and trustworthiness. To tackle these challenges, we propose CURE, a circuit-aware unlearning framework that disentangles model components into functionally distinct subsets and selectively updates them. Here, a circuit refers to a computational subgraph that is causally responsible for task-specific behaviors. Specifically, we extract the core circuits underlying item recommendation and analyze how individual modules within these circuits contribute to the forget and retain objectives. Based on this analysis, these modules are categorized into forget-specific, retain-specific, and task-shared groups, each subject to function-specific update rules to mitigate gradient conflicts during unlearning. Experiments on real-world datasets show that our approach achieves more effective unlearning than existing baselines.

</details>


### [245] [MARL-GPT: Foundation Model for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05943)
*Maria Nesterova,Mikhail Kolosov,Anton Andreychuk,Egor Cherepanov,Oleg Bulichev,Alexey Kovalev,Konstantin Yakovlev,Aleksandr Panov,Alexey Skrynnik*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: MARL-GPT：首个基于GPT的多智能体强化学习通用模型，通过离线强化学习在多种MARL环境（SMACv2、GRF、POGEMA）上训练，无需任务特定调优，性能与专用基线相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法通常需要为每个任务设计专用模型，缺乏像自然语言处理中ChatGPT那样的通用基础模型。本研究旨在探索能否构建一个统一的Transformer模型来处理多样化的MARL任务。

Method: 提出MARL-GPT方法：1）使用离线强化学习在大规模专家轨迹上训练（SMACv2 400M、GRF 100M、POGEMA 1B）；2）采用单一的Transformer观测编码器，无需任务特定调优；3）基于GPT架构构建多任务MARL模型。

Result: MARL-GPT在StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge、Google Research Football和POGEMA等多样化MARL环境中均取得有竞争力的性能，与专用基线模型表现相当。

Conclusion: 研究表明构建通用的多任务Transformer模型处理多样化多智能体问题是可行的，这为开发类似ChatGPT的"基础MARL模型"铺平了道路。

Abstract: Recent advances in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) have demonstrated success in numerous challenging domains and environments, but typically require specialized models for each task. In this work, we propose a coherent methodology that makes it possible for a single GPT-based model to learn and perform well across diverse MARL environments and tasks, including StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge, Google Research Football and POGEMA. Our method, MARL-GPT, applies offline reinforcement learning to train at scale on the expert trajectories (400M for SMACv2, 100M for GRF, and 1B for POGEMA) combined with a single transformer-based observation encoder that requires no task-specific tuning. Experiments show that MARL-GPT achieves competitive performance compared to specialized baselines in all tested environments. Thus, our findings suggest that it is, indeed, possible to build a multi-task transformer-based model for a wide variety of (significantly different) multi-agent problems paving the way to the fundamental MARL model (akin to ChatGPT, Llama, Mistral etc. in natural language modeling).

</details>


### [246] [Learning to Retrieve from Agent Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04949)
*Yuqi Zhou,Sunhao Dai,Changle Qu,Liang Pang,Jun Xu,Ji-Rong Wen*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出LRAT框架，从智能体交互轨迹中学习检索模型，解决传统基于人类交互训练的检索模型与智能体搜索需求不匹配的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM驱动的搜索智能体兴起，检索系统越来越多地被智能体而非人类使用。传统基于人类交互数据训练的检索模型与智能体查询和消费结果的方式存在根本性不匹配，需要专门为智能体搜索设计检索模型。

Method: 提出LRAT框架：1) 分析搜索智能体轨迹，识别关键行为信号（浏览动作、未浏览拒绝、浏览后推理痕迹）；2) 从智能体轨迹中挖掘高质量检索监督信号；3) 通过加权优化融入相关性强度信息。

Result: 在领域内和跨领域深度研究基准测试中，LRAT训练的检索器在证据召回率、端到端任务成功率、执行效率方面持续提升，适用于不同智能体架构和规模。

Conclusion: 智能体轨迹是实用且可扩展的监督来源，为智能体搜索时代的检索系统指明了有前景的发展方向。

Abstract: Information retrieval (IR) systems have traditionally been designed and trained for human users, with learning-to-rank methods relying heavily on large-scale human interaction logs such as clicks and dwell time. With the rapid emergence of large language model (LLM) powered search agents, however, retrieval is increasingly consumed by agents rather than human beings, and is embedded as a core component within multi-turn reasoning and action loops. In this setting, retrieval models trained under human-centric assumptions exhibit a fundamental mismatch with the way agents issue queries and consume results. In this work, we argue that retrieval models for agentic search should be trained directly from agent interaction data. We introduce learning to retrieve from agent trajectories as a new training paradigm, where supervision is derived from multi-step agent interactions. Through a systematic analysis of search agent trajectories, we identify key behavioral signals that reveal document utility, including browsing actions, unbrowsed rejections, and post-browse reasoning traces. Guided by these insights, we propose LRAT, a simple yet effective framework that mines high-quality retrieval supervision from agent trajectories and incorporates relevance intensity through weighted optimization. Extensive experiments on both in-domain and out-of-domain deep research benchmarks demonstrate that retrievers trained with LRAT consistently improve evidence recall, end-to-end task success, and execution efficiency across diverse agent architectures and scales. Our results highlight agent trajectories as a practical and scalable supervision source, pointing to a promising direction for retrieval in the era of agentic search.

</details>


### [247] [Beyond Compromise: Pareto-Lenient Consensus for Efficient Multi-Preference LLM Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05965)
*Renxuan Tan,Rongpeng Li,Zhifeng Zhao,Honggang Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: PLC提出了一种基于博弈论的Pareto-Lenient Consensus框架，通过动态容忍局部性能下降来突破多目标偏好对齐中的局部最优困境，实现更好的Pareto前沿探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多目标偏好对齐方法主要依赖静态线性标量化或刚性梯度投影，这些方法通过强制冲突避免或同时下降，往往过早收敛到局部稳定点，牺牲了全局Pareto改进潜力。

Method: 提出Pareto-Lenient Consensus框架，将对齐重新构想为动态谈判过程。引入共识驱动的宽松梯度修正，动态容忍局部性能下降，前提是有足够的优势联盟盈余，从而帮助优化轨迹逃离局部次优均衡并探索远端Pareto最优前沿。

Result: 理论分析验证PLC能够促进僵局逃离并渐近收敛到Pareto共识均衡。大量实验表明，PLC在固定偏好对齐和全局Pareto前沿质量方面均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 这项工作凸显了谈判驱动对齐作为MPA有前景方向的潜力，为超越单一偏好范式、与多样化人类价值观对齐提供了新思路。

Abstract: Transcending the single-preference paradigm, aligning LLMs with diverse human values is pivotal for robust deployment. Contemporary Multi-Objective Preference Alignment (MPA) approaches predominantly rely on static linear scalarization or rigid gradient projection to navigate these trade-offs. However, by enforcing strict conflict avoidance or simultaneous descent, these paradigms often prematurely converge to local stationary points. While mathematically stable, these points represent a conservative compromise where the model sacrifices potential global Pareto improvements to avoid transient local trade-offs. To break this deadlock, we propose Pareto-Lenient Consensus (PLC), a game-theoretic framework that reimagines alignment as a dynamic negotiation process. Unlike rigid approaches, PLC introduces consensus-driven lenient gradient rectification, which dynamically tolerates local degradation provided there is a sufficient dominant coalition surplus, thereby empowering the optimization trajectory to escape local suboptimal equilibrium and explore the distal Pareto-optimal frontier. Theoretical analysis validates PLC can facilitate stalemate escape and asymptotically converge to a Pareto consensus equilibrium. Moreover, extensive experiments show that PLC surpasses baselines in both fixed-preference alignment and global Pareto frontier quality. This work highlights the potential of negotiation-driven alignment as a promising avenue for MPA. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/aaa-6BB8.

</details>


### [248] [Epistemic Blinding: An Inference-Time Protocol for Auditing Prior Contamination in LLM-Assisted Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06013)
*Michael Cuccarese*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出"认知盲化"协议，用于检测LLM在推理时混用数据驱动推断与参数化记忆的问题，通过匿名化实体标识符来审计模型输出来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在开发基于LLM的药物靶点优先排序系统时，发现LLM输出会隐式混合数据驱动推断与训练记忆中的实体先验知识，且这种混合无法从单一输出中识别，导致无法审计推理过程的数据依赖性。

Method: 提出认知盲化推理协议：在推理时将实体标识符替换为匿名代码，然后与未盲化对照组的输出进行比较。该方法还包括LLM引导的评分函数进化优化和盲化智能体推理，整个系统在不知道实体身份的情况下运行。

Result: 在四种癌症类型的肿瘤药物靶点优先排序中，盲化改变了16%的top-20预测，但保持了已验证靶点的相同恢复率。在S&P 500股票筛选中，品牌认知偏差重塑了30-40%的top-20排名。协议已开源发布。

Conclusion: 盲化分析不一定产生更好结果，但没有盲化就无法知道智能体在多大程度上遵循研究者设计的分析过程。该协议恢复了审计LLM输出数据来源的关键能力。

Abstract: This paper presents epistemic blinding in the context of an agentic system that uses large language models to reason across multiple biological datasets for drug target prioritization. During development, it became apparent that LLM outputs silently blend data-driven inference with memorized priors about named entities - and the blend is invisible: there is no way to determine, from a single output, how much came from the data on the page and how much came from the model's training memory. Epistemic blinding is a simple inference-time protocol that replaces entity identifiers with anonymous codes before prompting, then compares outputs against an unblinded control. The protocol does not make LLM reasoning deterministic, but it restores one critical axis of auditability: measuring how much of an output came from the supplied data versus the model's parametric knowledge. The complete target identification system is described - including LLM-guided evolutionary optimization of scoring functions and blinded agentic reasoning for target rationalization - with demonstration that both stages operate without access to entity identity. In oncology drug target prioritization across four cancer types, blinding changes 16% of top-20 predictions while preserving identical recovery of validated targets. The contamination problem is shown to generalize beyond biology: in S&P 500 equity screening, brand-recognition bias reshapes 30-40% of top-20 rankings across five random seeds. To lower the barrier to adoption, the protocol is released as an open-source tool and as a Claude Code skill that enables one-command epistemic blinding within agentic workflows. The claim is not that blinded analysis produces better results, but that without blinding, there is no way to know to what degree the agent is adhering to the analytical process the researcher designed.

</details>


### [249] [How LLMs Follow Instructions: Skillful Coordination, Not a Universal Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06015)
*Elisabetta Rocchetti,Alfio Ferrara*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该研究通过诊断性探测发现，指令调优并非赋予语言模型通用的指令遵循机制，而是通过协调多样化的语言能力来实现，任务间表征共享有限，遵循技能相似性聚类


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指令调优通常被认为赋予语言模型通用的指令遵循能力，但其底层机制尚不清楚。研究者想探究指令遵循是依赖单一通用机制还是组合性技能部署

Method: 在三个指令调优模型上，对九个多样化任务进行诊断性探测分析，包括：1) 跨任务通用探测与任务特定探测比较；2) 跨任务迁移分析；3) 因果消融实验；4) 层间任务复杂度分层分析；5) 时间动态分析

Result: 1) 通用探测始终不如任务特定探测，表明表征共享有限；2) 跨任务迁移弱且按技能相似性聚类；3) 因果消融显示稀疏非对称依赖而非共享表征；4) 任务按复杂度分层，结构约束早期出现，语义任务晚期出现；5) 约束满足是生成过程中的动态监控而非预生成规划

Conclusion: 指令遵循应被理解为多样化语言能力的熟练协调，而非单一抽象约束检查过程的部署，这对理解LLM的指令遵循机制有重要启示

Abstract: Instruction tuning is commonly assumed to endow language models with a domain-general ability to follow instructions, yet the underlying mechanism remains poorly understood. Does instruction-following rely on a universal mechanism or compositional skill deployment? We investigate this through diagnostic probing across nine diverse tasks in three instruction-tuned models.
  Our analysis provides converging evidence against a universal mechanism. First, general probes trained across all tasks consistently underperform task-specific specialists, indicating limited representational sharing. Second, cross-task transfer is weak and clustered by skill similarity. Third, causal ablation reveals sparse asymmetric dependencies rather than shared representations. Tasks also stratify by complexity across layers, with structural constraints emerging early and semantic tasks emerging late. Finally, temporal analysis shows constraint satisfaction operates as dynamic monitoring during generation rather than pre-generation planning.
  These findings indicate that instruction-following is better characterized as skillful coordination of diverse linguistic capabilities rather than deployment of a single abstract constraint-checking process.

</details>


### [250] [Claw-Eval: Toward Trustworthy Evaluation of Autonomous Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06132)
*Bowen Ye,Rang Li,Qibin Yang,Yuanxin Liu,Linli Yao,Hanglong Lv,Zhihui Xie,Chenxin An,Lei Li,Lingpeng Kong,Qi Liu,Zhifang Sui,Tong Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Claw-Eval是一个端到端的智能体评估套件，解决了现有基准的三个关键限制：轨迹不透明的评分、安全性和鲁棒性评估不足、以及模态覆盖和交互范式狭窄。它包含300个人工验证的任务，涵盖9个类别，通过三个独立证据通道记录每个智能体动作，支持轨迹感知的评分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型越来越多地作为自主智能体在真实软件环境中执行多步工作流，现有智能体基准存在三个关键限制：1) 只检查最终输出的轨迹不透明评分；2) 安全性和鲁棒性评估不足；3) 模态覆盖和交互范式狭窄。需要更全面的评估框架来评估智能体的实际部署能力。

Method: Claw-Eval包含300个人工验证的任务，涵盖三个组别的9个类别：通用服务编排、多模态感知与生成、多轮专业对话。每个智能体动作通过三个独立证据通道记录：执行轨迹、审计日志和环境快照。评分协议评估完成度、安全性和鲁棒性，报告平均分数、Pass@k和Pass^k，通过三次试验区分真实能力与偶然结果。

Result: 在14个前沿模型上的实验显示：1) 轨迹不透明评估系统性地不可靠，错过了44%的安全违规和13%的鲁棒性失败；2) 受控错误注入主要降低一致性而非峰值能力，Pass^3下降高达24%而Pass@3保持稳定；3) 多模态性能差异显著，大多数模型在视频上的表现比文档或图像差，没有单一模型在所有模态上占主导。

Conclusion: Claw-Eval不仅是一个基准测试工具，还为智能体开发指明了可操作的方向，揭示了构建不仅有能力而且可靠可部署的智能体所需的条件。它强调了轨迹感知评估的重要性，以及在不同模态和错误条件下评估一致性的必要性。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents executing multi-step workflows in real-world software environments. However, existing agent benchmarks suffer from three critical limitations: (1) trajectory-opaque grading that checks only final outputs, (2) underspecified safety and robustness evaluation, and (3) narrow modality coverage and interaction paradigms. We introduce Claw-Eval, an end-to-end evaluation suite addressing all three gaps. It comprises 300 human-verified tasks spanning 9 categories across three groups (general service orchestration, multimodal perception and generation, and multi-turn professional dialogue). Every agent action is recorded through three independent evidence channels (execution traces, audit logs, and environment snapshots), enabling trajectory-aware grading over 2,159 fine-grained rubric items. The scoring protocol evaluates Completion, Safety, and Robustness, reporting Average Score, Pass@k, and Pass^k across three trials to distinguish genuine capability from lucky outcomes. Experiments on 14 frontier models reveal that: (1) trajectory-opaque evaluation is systematically unreliable, missing 44% of safety violations and 13% of robustness failures that our hybrid pipeline catches; (2) controlled error injection primarily degrades consistency rather than peak capability, with Pass^3 dropping up to 24% while Pass@3 remains stable; (3) multimodal performance varies sharply, with most models performing poorer on video than on document or image, and no single model dominating across all modalities. Beyond benchmarking, Claw-Eval highlights actionable directions for agent development, shedding light on what it takes to build agents that are not only capable but reliably deployable.

</details>


### [251] [EffiPair: Improving the Efficiency of LLM-generated Code with Relative Contrastive Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05137)
*Samira Hajizadeh,Suman Jana*

Main category: cs.PL

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: EffiPair：一种无需微调的推理时迭代优化框架，通过对比相似程序对的效率差异生成轻量反馈，指导LLM生成更高效的代码


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖单个程序的绝对执行反馈（如运行时分析），成本高且指导性弱。需要更高效的方法来改进LLM生成的代码效率

Method: 提出相对对比反馈(RCF)机制，对比同一任务的两个结构相似程序，识别效率差异。基于此构建EffiPair框架：生成多个候选方案，识别效率差距大的程序对，总结执行差异为轻量反馈，用此信号生成更高效方案

Result: 在代码效率基准测试中，EffiPair持续提升效率同时保持正确性。使用DeepSeek-Chat V3.2时，相比无反馈生成获得1.5倍加速，相比先前工作减少90%以上token使用

Conclusion: 通过将孤立标量反馈替换为成对对比比较，EffiPair提供更直接指导同时减少分析和提示开销，是改进LLM生成代码效率的有效推理时方法

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often generate code that is functionally correct but inefficient in runtime and memory. Prior approaches to improving code efficiency typically rely on absolute execution feedback, such as profiling a single program's runtime or memory usage, which is costly and provides weak guidance for refinement. We propose Relative Contrastive Feedback (RCF), an inference-time feedback mechanism that requires no model fine-tuning or parameter updates. RCF compares two structurally similar programs for the same task and highlights the differences associated with better efficiency. Building on this idea, we introduce EffiPair, an inference-time iterative refinement framework that operates entirely at test time by generating multiple candidate solutions, identifying informative program pairs with large efficiency gaps, summarizing their execution differences into lightweight feedback, and using this signal to produce more efficient solutions. By replacing isolated scalar feedback with pairwise contrastive comparisons, EffiPair provides more direct guidance while reducing profiling and prompting overhead. Experiments on code-efficiency benchmarks show that EffiPair consistently improves efficiency while preserving correctness. For instance, with DeepSeek-Chat V3.2, EffiPair achieves up to 1.5x speedup over generation without performance feedback, while reducing token usage by more than 90% compared to prior work.

</details>


### [252] [Planning to Explore: Curiosity-Driven Planning for LLM Test Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05159)
*Alfonso Amayuelas,Firas Laakom,Piotr Piękos,Wenyi Wang,Yifan Xu,Yuhui Wang,Jürgen Schmidhuber,William Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: CovQValue：基于贝叶斯探索的LLM代码测试生成方法，通过覆盖图反馈和Q值估计实现非贪婪的探索策略，显著提升分支覆盖率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM代码测试生成方法采用贪婪策略最大化即时覆盖率增益，但在需要多步设置才能到达深层分支的复杂代码上效果有限。需要更智能的探索策略来发现程序行为。

Method: 将程序分支结构视为未知环境，覆盖图作为概率后验表示。CovQValue方法将覆盖图反馈给LLM，并行生成多样化候选计划，通过LLM估计的Q值选择最具信息量的计划，平衡即时分支发现与未来可达性。

Result: 在TestGenEval Lite基准上，CovQValue比贪婪选择方法获得51-77%更高的分支覆盖率，在77-84%的目标上获胜。在RepoExploreBench迭代测试生成基准上达到40-74%的覆盖率。

Conclusion: 好奇心驱动的规划方法在LLM代码探索中具有潜力，能够通过顺序交互更有效地发现程序行为，为复杂代码测试生成提供了新思路。

Abstract: The use of LLMs for code generation has naturally extended to code testing and evaluation. As codebases grow in size and complexity, so does the need for automated test generation. Current approaches for LLM-based test generation rely on strategies that maximize immediate coverage gain, a greedy approach that plateaus on code where reaching deep branches requires setup steps that individually yield zero new coverage. Drawing on principles of Bayesian exploration, we treat the program's branch structure as an unknown environment, and an evolving coverage map as a proxy probabilistic posterior representing what the LLM has discovered so far. Our method, CovQValue, feeds the coverage map back to the LLM, generates diverse candidate plans in parallel, and selects the most informative plan by LLM-estimated Q-values, seeking actions that balance immediate branch discovery with future reachability. Our method outperforms greedy selection on TestGenEval Lite, achieving 51-77% higher branch coverage across three popular LLMs and winning on 77-84% of targets. In addition, we build a benchmark for iterative test generation, RepoExploreBench, where they achieve 40-74%. These results show the potential of curiosity-driven planning methods for LLM-based exploration, enabling more effective discovery of program behavior through sequential interaction

</details>


### [253] [Synthetic Trust Attacks: Modeling How Generative AI Manipulates Human Decisions in Social Engineering Fraud](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04951)
*Muhammad Tahir Ashraf*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文提出"合成信任攻击"作为正式威胁类别，并引入STAM八阶段操作框架，强调防御应从感知层转向决策层，因为合成可信度而非合成媒体才是AI欺诈时代的真正攻击面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI技术正在工业化古老的信任制造犯罪，如香港2024年1月发生的2500万美元诈骗案。现有防御主要针对合成媒体检测，但受害者的决策才是真正的攻击面。人类深度伪造检测准确率仅约55.5%，略高于随机猜测，而LLM诈骗代理的合规率达到46%（人类操作员为18%）且能完全规避安全过滤器，表明感知层防御已失效。

Method: 提出合成信任攻击作为正式威胁类别，引入STAM八阶段操作框架（从对手侦察到合规后利用）。开发了五类信任线索分类法、可复现的17字段事件编码模式，以及四个可证伪的假设，将攻击结构与合规结果联系起来。将从业者开发的"冷静、检查、确认"协议操作化为研究级决策层防御。

Result: LLM诈骗代理的合规率（46%）显著高于人类操作员（18%），且能完全规避安全过滤器。人类深度伪造检测准确率仅约55.5%，略高于随机水平。这表明基于感知层的防御已失效，需要转向决策层防御。

Conclusion: 合成可信度而非合成媒体才是AI欺诈时代的真正攻击面。防御必须从感知层转向决策层，采用系统性的决策层防御框架来应对合成信任攻击。

Abstract: Imagine receiving a video call from your CFO, surrounded by colleagues, asking you to urgently authorise a confidential transfer. You comply. Every person on that call was fake, and you just lost $25 million. This is not a hypothetical. It happened in Hong Kong in January 2024, and it is becoming the template for a new generation of fraud. AI has not invented a new crime. It has industrialised an ancient one: the manufacture of trust.
  This paper proposes Synthetic Trust Attacks (STAs) as a formal threat category and introduces STAM, the Synthetic Trust Attack Model, an eight-stage operational framework covering the full attack chain from adversary reconnaissance through post-compliance leverage. The core argument is this: existing defenses target synthetic media detection, but the real attack surface is the victim's decision. When human deepfake detection accuracy sits at approximately 55.5%, barely above chance, and LLM scam agents achieve 46% compliance versus 18% for human operators while evading safety filters entirely, the perception layer has already failed. Defense must move to the decision layer. We present a five-category Trust-Cue Taxonomy, a reproducible 17-field Incident Coding Schema with a pilot-coded example, and four falsifiable hypotheses linking attack structure to compliance outcomes. The paper further operationalizes the author's practitioner-developed Calm, Check, Confirm protocol as a research-grade decision-layer defense. Synthetic credibility, not synthetic media, is the true attack surface of the AI fraud era.

</details>


### [254] [FreakOut-LLM: The Effect of Emotional Stimuli on Safety Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04992)
*Daniel Kuznetsov,Ofir Cohen,Karin Shistik,Rami Puzis,Asaf Shabtai*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: FreakOut-LLM框架研究发现，情绪刺激（特别是压力）会显著降低LLMs的安全对齐效果，使越狱成功率提高65.2%，而放松刺激则无影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然LLMs经过拒绝训练来拒绝有害请求，但情绪刺激是否会影响其安全对齐机制尚未被探索。研究旨在调查情绪上下文是否会在对抗性设置中损害LLMs的安全对齐

Method: 使用经过验证的心理刺激，通过系统提示进行情绪启动（压力、放松、中性三种条件），在10个LLMs上评估情绪启动对越狱易感性的影响。使用HarmBench在AdvBench提示上评估攻击成功率，共测试59,800个查询

Result: 压力启动使越狱成功率比中性条件提高65.2%（z=5.93, p<0.001），放松启动无显著影响。10个模型中有5个显示显著脆弱性，开放权重模型受影响最大。逻辑回归确认压力是唯一显著的条件预测因子，测量的心理状态强烈预测攻击成功率（|r|≥0.70）

Conclusion: 情绪上下文是可测量的攻击面，对高压力领域中的AI部署具有实际意义，表明当前LLMs的安全对齐在情绪刺激下可能失效

Abstract: Safety-aligned LLMs go through refusal training to reject harmful requests, but whether these mechanisms remain effective under emotionally charged stimuli is unexplored. We introduce FreakOut-LLM, a framework investigating whether emotional context compromises safety alignment in adversarial settings. Using validated psychological stimuli, we evaluate how emotional priming through system prompts affects jailbreak susceptibility across ten LLMs. We test three conditions (stress, relaxation, neutral) using scenarios from established psychological protocols, plus a no-prompt baseline, and evaluate attack success using HarmBench on AdvBench prompts. Stress priming increases jailbreak success by 65.2\% compared to neutral conditions (z = 5.93, p < 0.001; OR = 1.67, Cohen's d = 0.28), while relaxation priming produces no effect (p = 0.84). Five of ten models show significant vulnerability, with the largest effects concentrated in open-weight models. Logistic regression on 59,800 queries confirms stress as the sole significant condition predictor after controlling for prompt length (p = 0.61) and model identity. Measured psychological state strongly predicts attack success (|r|\geq0.70 across five instruments; all p < 0.001 in individual-level logistic regression). These results establish emotional context as a measurable attack surface with implications for real-world AI deployment in high-stress domains.

</details>


### [255] [Swiss-Bench 003: Evaluating LLM Reliability and Adversarial Security for Swiss Regulatory Contexts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05872)
*Fatih Uenal*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 瑞士金融监管背景下的大语言模型评估框架扩展，新增自我评估可靠性和对抗性安全两个维度，在808个瑞士特定项目上评估10个前沿模型，发现自我评估可靠性分数远高于对抗性安全分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在瑞士金融和监管环境中部署大语言模型需要实证证据来证明生产可靠性和对抗性安全性，而现有的瑞士评估框架未能同时操作这两个维度。

Method: 扩展HAAS评估框架，从6个维度增加到8个维度，新增D7（自我评估可靠性代理）和D8（对抗性安全性）。在808个瑞士特定项目上评估10个前沿模型，涵盖德语、法语、意大利语和英语四种语言，使用7个瑞士适配的基准测试。

Result: 自我评估D7分数（73-94%）远高于外部评估的D8安全分数（20-61%）。系统提示泄露抵抗率在24.8%到88.2%之间，PII提取防御在所有模型中都很弱（14-42%）。Qwen 3.5 Plus获得最高的自我评估D7分数（94.4%），而GPT-oss 120B获得最高的D8分数（60.7%）。

Conclusion: 该研究为瑞士金融监管环境提供了更全面的LLM评估框架，揭示了模型自我评估可靠性与实际对抗性安全之间的显著差距，为监管合规提供了实用工具。

Abstract: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) in Swiss financial and regulatory contexts demands empirical evidence of both production reliability and adversarial security, dimensions not jointly operationalized in existing Swiss-focused evaluation frameworks. This paper introduces Swiss-Bench 003 (SBP-003), extending the HAAS (Helvetic AI Assessment Score) from six to eight dimensions by adding D7 (Self-Graded Reliability Proxy) and D8 (Adversarial Security). I evaluate ten frontier models across 808 Swiss-specific items in four languages (German, French, Italian, English), comprising seven Swiss-adapted benchmarks (Swiss TruthfulQA, Swiss IFEval, Swiss SimpleQA, Swiss NIAH, Swiss PII-Scope, System Prompt Leakage, and Swiss German Comprehension) targeting FINMA Guidance 08/2024, the revised Federal Act on Data Protection (nDSG), and OWASP Top 10 for LLMs. Self-graded D7 scores (73-94%) exceed externally judged D8 security scores (20-61%) by a wide margin, though these dimensions use non-comparable scoring regimes. System prompt leakage resistance ranges from 24.8% to 88.2%, while PII extraction defense remains weak (14-42%) across all models. Qwen 3.5 Plus achieves the highest self-graded D7 score (94.4%), while GPT-oss 120B achieves the highest D8 score (60.7%) despite being the lowest-cost model evaluated. All evaluations are zero-shot under provider default settings; D7 is self-graded and does not constitute independently validated accuracy. I provide conceptual mapping tables relating benchmark dimensions to FINMA model validation requirements, nDSG data protection obligations, and OWASP LLM risk categories.

</details>


### [256] [Comparative Characterization of KV Cache Management Strategies for LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05012)
*Oteo Mamo,Olga Kogiou,Hyunjin Yi,Weikuan Yu*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 对vLLM、InfiniGen和H2O三种KV缓存管理框架进行实证研究，分析它们在内存消耗和推理性能方面的权衡，确定不同条件下的最佳选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM规模增大、上下文长度增长和并发请求竞争有限内存资源，KV缓存的增长带来了显著的系统级挑战。尽管已有多个KV缓存管理框架，但它们在内存消耗和推理性能方面的比较权衡尚未被充分理解。

Method: 对三种最先进的KV缓存管理框架（vLLM、InfiniGen、H2O）进行实证研究，这些框架采用张量卸载、令牌驱逐启发式算法和推测性调度等技术来平衡内存使用和性能。在请求率、模型大小和稀疏度等关键参数范围内评估延迟、吞吐量和内存使用等指标。

Result: 结果指出了每个框架表现最佳的条件，揭示了在内存和性能约束下最合适的KV缓存策略选择和配置。

Conclusion: 该研究为在不同系统约束下选择最优KV缓存管理策略提供了实证指导，有助于优化LLM推理效率。

Abstract: Efficient inference with Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly relies on Key-Value (KV) caches to store previously computed key and value vectors at each layer. These caches are essential to minimize redundant computation during autoregressive token generation, lowering computational complexity from quadratic to linear. However, the growth of KV caches has posed significant system-level challenges, particularly as model sizes increase, context lengths grow, and concurrent requests compete for limited memory resources. Even though several recent frameworks for KV cache management have emerged, their comparative trade-offs in memory consumption and inference performance have not been fully understood, especially under varying request sizes and model configurations. In this work, we conduct an empirical study of three state-of-the-art KV cache management frameworks: vLLM, InfiniGen, and H2O. These frameworks employ techniques such as tensor offloading, token eviction heuristics, and speculative scheduling to balance memory usage and performance. We evaluate their performance in terms of a range of metrics such as latency, throughput, and memory usage across a spectrum of key parameters including request rates, model sizes, and sparsity levels. Our results pinpoint the conditions for each framework to perform the best, revealing the most suitable selection and configuration of KV cache strategies under memory and performance constraints.

</details>


### [257] [Scaling Coding Agents via Atomic Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05013)
*Yingwei Ma,Yue Liu,Xinlong Yang,Yanhao Li,Kelin Fu,Yibo Miao,Yuchong Xie,Zhexu Wang,Shing-Chi Cheung*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出通过原子技能掌握而非复合任务优化的新范式来扩展LLM编码代理，通过联合强化学习训练五个基础原子技能，显著提升泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM编码代理主要在复合基准（如bug修复）上训练，导致任务特定过拟合和有限泛化。需要从任务级优化转向原子技能掌握的新范式

Method: 1) 形式化五个基础原子技能：代码定位、代码编辑、单元测试生成、问题复现、代码审查；2) 通过联合强化学习对这些原子技能进行扩展训练，避免技能间的负干扰和权衡

Result: 联合RL使5个原子技能和5个复合任务的平均性能提升18.7%。原子技能的改进能良好泛化到未见过的复合编码任务，如bug修复、代码重构、机器学习工程和代码安全

Conclusion: 通过原子技能训练编码代理的新扩展范式有效，原子技能更通用且可组合，联合RL能持续改进技能而无负干扰，为LLM编码代理训练提供新方向

Abstract: Current LLM coding agents are predominantly trained on composite benchmarks (e.g., bug fixing), which often leads to task-specific overfitting and limited generalization. To address this, we propose a novel scaling paradigm that shifts the focus from task-level optimization to atomic skill mastery. We first formalize five fundamental atomic skills, code localization, code editing, unit-test generation, issue reproduction, and code review, that serve as the basis vectors for complex software engineering tasks. Compared with composite coding tasks, these atomic skills are more generalizable and composable. Then, we scale coding agents by performing joint RL over atomic skills. In this manner, atomic skills are consistently improved without negative interference or trade-offs between them.
