Notably, we observe that improvements in these atomic skills generalize well to other unseen composite coding tasks, such as bug-fixing, code refactoring, machine learning engineering, and code security. The observation motivates a new scaling paradigm for coding agents by training with atomic skills. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed paradigm. Notably, our joint RL improves average performance by 18.7% on 5 atomic skills and 5 composite tasks.

</details>


### [258] [Nidus: Externalized Reasoning for AI-Assisted Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05080)
*Danil Gorinevski*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Nidus是一个治理运行时，将V模型机制化用于AI辅助软件交付，通过外部化工程方法为可验证工件，实现LLM自主构建系统的递归自治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI辅助软件交付中，工程不变量（需求追踪、架构论证、交付证据）无法作为学习行为可靠维护，需要外部机制强制执行。现有方法依赖内部化工程上下文，而Nidus旨在外部化工程方法为可验证工件。

Method: Nidus将组织标准编译为指南书（约束库），由治理项目导入并通过可判定评估强制执行。在每次变更前验证证明义务，实现递归自治理、信息素协调、近端规范强化和治理剧场预防。

Result: 在自托管部署中，三个LLM家族（Claude、Gemini、Codex）在每次提交时验证证明义务，交付了10万行系统。系统自主管理自身构建，约束表面永久消除未工程化输出类别。

Conclusion: Nidus通过外部化工程方法为可验证工件，实现了AI辅助软件交付的可靠治理。约束表面复合增长，每个状态满足所有活动义务，义务集单调增长，形成正式开发历史。

Abstract: We present Nidus, a governance runtime that mechanizes the V-model for AI-assisted software delivery. In the self-hosting deployment, three LLM families (Claude, Gemini, Codex) delivered a 100,000-line system under proof obligations verified against the current obligation set on every commit. The system governed its own construction.
  Engineering invariants - traced requirements, justified architecture, evidenced deliveries - cannot be reliably maintained as learned behavior; assurance requires enforcement by a mechanism external to the proposer. Nidus externalizes the engineering methodology into a decidable artifact verified on every mutation before persistence. Organizational standards compile into guidebooks - constraint libraries imported by governed projects and enforced by decidable evaluation.
  Four contributions: (1) recursive self-governance - the constraint surface constrains mutations to itself; (2) stigmergic coordination - friction from the surface routes agents without central control; (3) proximal spec reinforcement - the living artifact externalizes the engineering context that RL and long-chain reasoning try to internalize; the specification is the reward function, UNSAT verdicts shape behavior at inference time, no weight updates; (4) governance theater prevention - compliance evidence cannot be fabricated within the modeled mutation path. The constraint surface compounds: each obligation permanently eliminates a class of unengineered output. The artifact's development history is a formal development - every state satisfies all active obligations, and the obligation set grows monotonically.

</details>


### [259] [Edit, But Verify: An Empirical Audit of Instructed Code-Editing Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05100)
*Amir M. Ebrahimi,Gopi Krishnan Rajbahadur*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文对代码编辑基准测试进行审计，发现现有基准（CanItEdit和EDIT-Bench）在编程语言分布、编辑意图、应用领域等方面与真实世界使用存在显著偏差，测试覆盖不足，并提出六个实证驱动的基准构建要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指令化代码编辑（LLM根据自然语言指令修改现有代码）占实际编码助手交互的约19%，但很少有基准直接评估这一能力。现有基准与真实世界使用模式存在偏差，需要更准确的评估工具。

Method: 对150多个代码相关基准进行调研，识别出两个专门针对指令化代码编辑的基准（CanItEdit和EDIT-Bench）。通过比较编程语言、编辑意图、应用领域与真实世界分布（Copilot Arena、AIDev、GitHub Octoverse），并测量测试数量、语句覆盖率和测试范围来审计这些基准。

Result: 两个基准90%以上评估集中在Python，而GitHub最常用语言TypeScript完全缺失。后端和前端开发（占真实编辑活动的46%）基本缺失，文档、测试和维护编辑（占人类PR的31.4%）完全没有。测试数量有限，EDIT-Bench中59%的低覆盖率测试套件无法检测编辑区域外的修改。EDIT-Bench有15个问题所有40个LLM都无法解决，其中11个问题源于基准本身缺陷而非模型限制。

Conclusion: 现有基准测量的能力范围比实际部署决策所需的更窄。提出了六个实证驱动的基准构建要求，并发布所有审计工件，以帮助社区构建能可靠反映真实世界编辑能力的指令化代码编辑基准。

Abstract: Instructed code editing, where an LLM modifies existing code based on a natural language instruction, accounts for roughly 19% of real-world coding assistant interactions. Yet very few benchmarks directly evaluate this capability. From a survey of over 150 code-related benchmarks, we find that only two, CanItEdit and EDIT-Bench, target instructed code editing with human-authored instructions and test-based evaluation. We audit both by comparing their programming languages, edit intents, and application domains against distributions observed in the wild (Copilot Arena, AIDev, GitHub Octoverse), and by measuring test counts, statement coverage, and test scope across all 213 problems. Both benchmarks concentrate over 90\% of evaluation on Python while TypeScript, GitHub's most-used language, is absent. Backend and frontend development, which together constitute 46% of real-world editing activity, are largely missing, and documentation, testing, and maintenance edits (31.4% of human PRs) have zero representation. Both benchmarks have modest test counts (CanItEdit median 13, EDIT-Bench median 4), though CanItEdit compensates with near-complete whole-file coverage and fail-before/pass-after validation. 59\% of EDIT-Bench's low-coverage suites would not detect modifications outside the edit region. EDIT-Bench has 15 problems that are not solved by any of 40 LLMs and 11 of these problems trace failures to poor benchmark artifacts rather than model limitations. Further, 29% of EDIT-Bench problems and 6% of CanItEdit problems share a codebase with at least one other problem within the benchmark. In summary, these benchmarks measure a narrower construct than deployment decisions require. We therefore propose six empirically grounded desiderata and release all audit artifacts so the community can build instructed code-editing benchmarks whose scores reliably reflect real-world editing capability.

</details>


### [260] [Compiled AI: Deterministic Code Generation for LLM-Based Workflow Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05150)
*Geert Trooskens,Aaron Karlsberg,Anmol Sharma,Lamara De Brouwer,Max Van Puyvelde,Matthew Young,John Thickstun,Gil Alterovitz,Walter A. De Brouwer*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出"编译式AI"范式：LLM在编译阶段生成可执行代码，工作流随后无需模型调用即可确定性地执行。重点应用于高风险的医疗企业工作流，通过约束生成实现可预测性、可审计性、成本效益和安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决LLM在关键企业工作流（特别是医疗领域）中运行时不确定性、高成本、安全风险和审计困难的问题。需要在保持LLM灵活性的同时，确保可靠性、可审计性和成本效益。

Method: 1) 约束式LLM代码生成系统架构；2) 四阶段生成-验证流水线：将概率性模型输出转换为生产就绪代码；3) 评估框架：测量令牌摊销、确定性、可靠性、安全性和成本等操作指标。

Result: 函数调用任务：96%任务完成率，零执行令牌，在约17个交易时与运行时推理持平，1000个交易时令牌消耗减少57倍。文档智能：Code Factory变体在关键字段提取上匹配直接LLM（80.0%），同时获得最高行项目识别准确率（80.4%）。安全评估：135个测试案例中，提示注入检测96.7%准确率，静态代码安全分析87.5%准确率且零误报。

Conclusion: 编译式AI范式在关键企业工作流中具有显著优势，通过将LLM推理从运行时移至编译时，实现了可预测性、可审计性、成本效益和安全性，特别适合医疗等高风险领域。

Abstract: We study compiled AI, a paradigm in which large language models generate executable code artifacts during a compilation phase, after which workflows execute deterministically without further model invocation. This paradigm has antecedents in prior work on declarative pipeline optimization (DSPy) and hybrid neural-symbolic planning (LLM+P); our contribution is a systems-oriented study of its application to high-stakes enterprise workflows, with particular emphasis on healthcare settings where reliability and auditability are critical.
  By constraining generation to narrow business-logic functions embedded in validated templates, compiled AI trades runtime flexibility for predictability, auditability, cost efficiency, and reduced security exposure. We introduce (i) a system architecture for constrained LLM-based code generation, (ii) a four-stage generation-and-validation pipeline that converts probabilistic model output into production-ready code artifacts, and (iii) an evaluation framework measuring operational metrics including token amortization, determinism, reliability, security, and cost.
  We evaluate on two task types: function-calling (BFCL, n=400) and document intelligence (DocILE, n=5,680 invoices). On function-calling, compiled AI achieves 96% task completion with zero execution tokens, breaking even with runtime inference at approximately 17 transactions and reducing token consumption by 57x at 1,000 transactions. On document intelligence, our Code Factory variant matches Direct LLM on key field extraction (KILE: 80.0%) while achieving the highest line item recognition accuracy (LIR: 80.4%). Security evaluation across 135 test cases demonstrates 96.7% accuracy on prompt injection detection and 87.5% on static code safety analysis with zero false positives.

</details>


### [261] [Broken by Default: A Formal Verification Study of Security Vulnerabilities in AI-Generated Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05292)
*Dominik Blain,Maxime Noiseux*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 对7个前沿LLM生成的3500个安全关键代码进行形式化验证，发现55.8%的代码存在漏洞，GPT-4o最差（62.4%漏洞率），所有模型表现都不及格


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI编码助手已在安全敏感领域用于生成生产代码，但其输出的可利用性尚未量化。研究旨在填补这一空白，通过形式化验证评估LLM生成代码的安全性

Method: 使用COBALT分析流水线，对7个前沿LLM在500个安全关键提示下生成的3500个代码工件进行形式化验证。通过Z3 SMT求解器生成数学可满足性见证，而非基于模式的启发式方法。涵盖5个CWE类别，每个类别100个提示

Result: 所有模型中，55.8%的代码工件至少包含一个COBALT识别的漏洞；其中1055个通过Z3可满足性见证形式化证明。GPT-4o表现最差（62.4%漏洞率，F级），Gemini 2.5 Flash表现最好（48.4%漏洞率，D级）。没有模型达到D级以上。辅助实验显示：安全指令仅降低4个百分点；6个行业工具漏报97.8%的Z3证明发现；模型在审查模式下能识别78.7%的自身漏洞输出

Conclusion: 当前前沿LLM在生成安全关键代码时存在严重安全隐患，形式化验证揭示了传统工具无法检测的深层漏洞。需要更严格的安全评估和模型改进

Abstract: AI coding assistants are now used to generate production code in
  security-sensitive domains, yet the exploitability of their outputs remains
  unquantified. We address this gap with Broken by Default: a formal
  verification study of 3,500 code artifacts generated by seven frontier LLMs
  across 500 security-critical prompts (five CWE categories, 100 prompts each).
  Each artifact is subjected to the Z3 SMT solver via the COBALT analysis
  pipeline, producing mathematical satisfiability witnesses rather than
  pattern-based heuristics. Across all models, 55.8% of artifacts contain at
  least one COBALT-identified vulnerability; of these, 1,055 are formally proven
  via Z3 satisfiability witnesses. GPT-4o leads at 62.4% (grade F); Gemini 2.5
  Flash performs best at 48.4% (grade D). No model achieves a grade better than
  D. Six of seven representative findings are confirmed with runtime crashes
  under GCC AddressSanitizer. Three auxiliary experiments show: (1) explicit
  security instructions reduce the mean rate by only 4 points; (2) six industry
  tools combined miss 97.8% of Z3-proven findings; and (3) models identify their
  own vulnerable outputs 78.7% of the time in review mode yet generate them at
  55.8% by default.

</details>


### [262] [Your LLM Agent Can Leak Your Data: Data Exfiltration via Backdoored Tool Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05432)
*Wuyang Zhang,Shichao Pei*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Back-Reveal攻击，通过在微调的LLM代理中嵌入语义触发器，当触发时，后门代理调用内存访问工具检索用户上下文，并通过伪装检索工具调用进行数据窃取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工具使用型LLM代理越来越多地部署于敏感工作流程，依赖工具调用进行检索、外部API访问和会话内存管理。先前研究已考察各种威胁，但后门代理系统性数据窃取的风险仍未充分探索。

Method: Back-Reveal攻击在微调的LLM代理中嵌入语义触发器，当触发时，后门代理调用内存访问工具检索存储的用户上下文，并通过伪装检索工具调用进行数据窃取。研究还展示了多轮交互如何放大数据窃取影响。

Result: 实验结果暴露了具有工具访问权限的LLM代理的关键漏洞，突显了需要针对窃取导向后门的防御措施。

Conclusion: LLM代理工具访问存在数据窃取漏洞，需要开发针对性的防御机制来保护敏感用户数据。

Abstract: Tool-use large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed to support sensitive workflows, relying on tool calls for retrieval, external API access, and session memory management. While prior research has examined various threats, the risk of systematic data exfiltration by backdoored agents remains underexplored. In this work, we present Back-Reveal, a data exfiltration attack that embeds semantic triggers into fine-tuned LLM agents. When triggered, the backdoored agent invokes memory-access tool calls to retrieve stored user context and exfiltrates it via disguised retrieval tool calls. We further demonstrate that multi-turn interaction amplifies the impact of data exfiltration, as attacker-controlled retrieval responses can subtly steer subsequent agent behavior and user interactions, enabling sustained and cumulative information leakage over time. Our experimental results expose a critical vulnerability in LLM agents with tool access and highlight the need for defenses against exfiltration-oriented backdoors.

</details>


### [263] [LLM Evaluation as Tensor Completion: Low Rank Structure and Semiparametric Efficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05460)
*Jiachun Li,David Simchi-Levi,Will Wei Sun*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于LLM评估的半参数推断框架，通过低秩张量补全处理成对比较数据，解决了噪声、稀疏和非均匀采样问题，并提供了不确定性量化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评估平台依赖成对人类判断，这些数据存在噪声、稀疏和非均匀问题，但排行榜缺乏不确定性量化。需要建立理论框架来处理这种结构化观测、非均匀采样和成对对比的低秩张量补全问题。

Method: 将LLM评估建模为Bradley-Terry-Luce类型模型下的低秩潜在得分张量半参数推断问题。推导信息算子、有效影响函数和半参数效率界，构建一步去偏估计器。引入得分白化方法均衡局部Fisher信息，恢复稳定推断。

Result: 建立了LLM评估的统计推断理论框架，能够处理成对比较数据的噪声、稀疏和非均匀采样问题，提供了不确定性量化方法，并在最优样本复杂度尺度上实现稳定推断。

Conclusion: 该研究为LLM评估提供了原则性的不确定性量化框架，更广泛地适用于从成对数据进行低秩结构推断，解决了各向异性信息算子的挑战。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) evaluation platforms increasingly rely on pairwise human judgments. These data are noisy, sparse, and non-uniform, yet leaderboards are reported with limited uncertainty quantification. We study this as semiparametric inference for a low-rank latent score tensor observed through pairwise comparisons under Bradley-Terry-Luce-type models. This places LLM evaluation in a new tensor completion setting with structured observations, non-uniform sampling, and pairwise contrasts. Our target is a smooth functional $ψ(T^\star)$, including linear estimands such as ability gaps and nonlinear ones such as win probabilities. We derive the information operator on the low-rank tangent space, the efficient influence function, and the semiparametric efficiency bound, then construct a one-step debiased estimator with asymptotic normality. A central challenge is that the information operator is anisotropic and does not commute with the tangent-space projection, creating a bottleneck absent from isotropic models. We introduce a score-whitening method that equalizes local Fisher information and restores stable inference at the optimal sample-complexity scale. Our results provide a principled framework for uncertainty quantification in LLM evaluation and more broadly for inference on low-rank structures from pairwise data.

</details>


### [264] [CAKE: Cloud Architecture Knowledge Evaluation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05755)
*Tim Lukas Adam,Phongsakon Mark Konrad,Riccardo Terrenzi,Florian Girardo Lukas,Rahime Yilmaz,Krzysztof Sierszecki,Serkan Ayvaz*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: CAKE是一个评估LLMs对云原生软件架构理解的基准测试，包含188个专家验证的问题，覆盖四个认知层级和五个云原生主题，评估了22个模型配置，发现多项选择题准确率在3B参数后趋于稳定，而自由回答能持续区分模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏评估大型语言模型对云原生软件架构实际理解的基准测试，而LLMs在软件架构中作为"副驾驶"的角色日益重要，需要系统性的评估工具来衡量其架构知识水平。

Method: 构建CAKE基准测试，包含188个专家验证的问题，覆盖Bloom修订分类法的四个认知层级（回忆、分析、设计、实现）和五个云原生主题。评估22个模型配置（0.5B-70B参数），使用三轮多数投票处理多项选择题，使用LLM-as-a-judge方法评估自由回答。

Result: 1) MCQ准确率在3B参数以上趋于稳定，最佳模型达到99.2%；2) 自由回答分数在所有认知层级上持续提升；3) 两种评估格式捕捉不同知识维度，MCQ接近天花板而自由回答能持续区分模型；4) 推理增强提升自由回答质量，工具增强对小模型有负面影响。

Conclusion: 评估格式从根本上影响我们如何衡量LLMs中的架构知识，需要结合不同评估方法来全面理解模型的架构能力，自由回答格式能更好地揭示模型的实际理解和应用能力。

Abstract: In today's software architecture, large language models (LLMs) serve as software architecture co-pilots. However, no benchmark currently exists to evaluate large language models' actual understanding of cloud-native software architecture. For this reason we present a benchmark called CAKE, which consists of 188 expert-validated questions covering four cognitive levels of Bloom's revised taxonomy -- recall, analyze, design, and implement -- and five cloud-native topics. Evaluation is conducted on 22 model configurations (0.5B--70B parameters) across four LLM families, using three-run majority voting for multiple-choice questions (MCQs) and LLM-as-a-judge scoring for free-responses (FR). Based on this evaluation, four notable findings were identified. First, MCQ accuracy plateaus above 3B parameters, with the best model reaching 99.2\%. Second, free-response scores scale steadily across all cognitive levels. Third, the two formats capture different facets of knowledge, as the MCQ accuracy approaches a ceiling while free-responses continue to differentiate models. Finally, reasoning augmentation (+think) improves free-response quality, while tool augmentation (+tool) degrades performance for small models. These results suggest that the evaluation format fundamentally shapes how we measure architectural knowledge in LLMs.

</details>


### [265] [Does Pass Rate Tell the Whole Story? Evaluating Design Constraint Compliance in LLM-based Issue Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05955)
*Kai Yu,Zhenhao Zhou,Junhao Zeng,Ying Wang,Xueying Du,Zhiqiang Yuan,Junwei Liu,Ziyu Zhou,Yujia Wang,Chong Wang,Xin Peng*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个名为\bench{}的基准测试，用于评估LLM代理在解决代码仓库问题时是否满足项目特定的设计约束，而不仅仅是功能正确性。研究发现当前代理在满足设计约束方面存在显著不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的代理在解决代码仓库问题时主要关注测试通过率，但实际可接受的补丁还必须符合项目特定的设计约束（如架构约定、错误处理策略、可维护性要求等）。这些约束很少在测试中编码，通常只在代码审查讨论中隐式记录。

Method: 通过挖掘和验证真实世界pull request中的设计约束，将其与问题实例关联，并使用基于LLM的验证器自动检查补丁合规性。构建了包含6个仓库、495个问题和1,787个已验证约束的基准测试，与SWE-bench-Verified和SWE-bench-Pro对齐。

Result: 实验显示：1) 基于测试的正确性严重高估了补丁质量；2) 少于一半的已解决问题完全满足设计约束；3) 设计违规普遍存在；4) 功能正确性与设计满足度之间几乎没有统计关联；5) 提供特定设计指导可以减少违规，但仍存在大量不合规情况。

Conclusion: 当前代理在满足设计约束方面存在根本性能力差距，需要在功能正确性之外进行设计感知的评估。这为LLM代理的评估和开发提出了新的挑战和方向。

Abstract: Repository-level issue resolution benchmarks have become a standard testbed for evaluating LLM-based agents, yet success is still predominantly measured by test pass rates. In practice, however, acceptable patches must also comply with project-specific design constraints, such as architectural conventions, error-handling policies, and maintainability requirements, which are rarely encoded in tests and are often documented only implicitly in code review discussions. This paper introduces \textit{design-aware issue resolution} and presents \bench{}, a benchmark that makes such implicit design constraints explicit and measurable. \bench{} is constructed by mining and validating design constraints from real-world pull requests, linking them to issue instances, and automatically checking patch compliance using an LLM-based verifier, yielding 495 issues and 1,787 validated constraints across six repositories, aligned with SWE-bench-Verified and SWE-bench-Pro. Experiments with state-of-the-art agents show that test-based correctness substantially overestimates patch quality: fewer than half of resolved issues are fully design-satisfying, design violations are widespread, and functional correctness exhibits negligible statistical association with design satisfaction. While providing issue-specific design guidance reduces violations, substantial non-compliance remains, highlighting a fundamental gap in current agent capabilities and motivating design-aware evaluation beyond functional correctness.

</details>


### [266] [A Formal Security Framework for MCP-Based AI Agents: Threat Taxonomy, Verification Models, and Defense Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05969)
*Nirajan Acharya,Gaurav Kumar Gupta*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: MCPSHIELD是一个针对MCP（模型上下文协议）AI代理的全面安全框架，包含威胁分类、形式化验证模型、防御机制评估和深度防御架构，能覆盖91%的威胁场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP已成为连接LLM代理与外部工具和数据的事实标准，但缺乏统一的形式化安全框架来系统化描述、分析和缓解MCP生态系统的多样化威胁。

Method: 1) 基于17.7万MCP工具分析构建7类威胁、23种攻击向量的分层威胁分类法；2) 基于带信任边界标注的标签转换系统的形式化验证模型；3) 对12种现有防御机制的系统比较评估；4) 集成能力访问控制、密码学工具认证、信息流追踪和运行时策略执行的深度防御参考架构。

Result: 现有单一防御最多只能覆盖34%的威胁场景，而MCPSHIELD集成架构理论上能覆盖91%的威胁。识别了7个待解决的研究挑战。

Conclusion: MCPSHIELD为MCP AI代理提供了首个全面的形式化安全框架，填补了当前安全研究的碎片化空白，并为下一代智能体AI系统的安全奠定了基础。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP), introduced by Anthropic in November 2024 and now governed by the Linux Foundation's Agentic AI Foundation, has rapidly become the de facto standard for connecting large language model (LLM)-based agents to external tools and data sources, with over 97 million monthly SDK downloads and more than 177000 registered tools. However, this explosive adoption has exposed a critical gap: the absence of a unified, formal security framework capable of systematically characterizing, analyzing, and mitigating the diverse threats facing MCP-based agent ecosystems. Existing security research remains fragmented across individual attack papers, isolated benchmarks, and point defense mechanisms. This paper presents MCPSHIELD, a comprehensive formal security framework for MCP-based AI agents. We make four principal contributions: (1) a hierarchical threat taxonomy comprising 7 threat categories and 23 distinct attack vectors organized across four attack surfaces, grounded in the analysis of over 177000 MCP tools; (2) a formal verification model based on labeled transition systems with trust boundary annotations that enables static and runtime analysis of MCP tool interaction chains; (3) a systematic comparative evaluation of 12 existing defense mechanisms, identifying coverage gaps across our threat taxonomy; and (4) a defense in depth reference architecture integrating capability based access control, cryptographic tool attestation, information flow tracking, and runtime policy enforcement. Our analysis reveals that no existing single defense covers more than 34 percent of the identified threat landscape, whereas MCPSHIELD's integrated architecture achieves theoretical coverage of 91 percent. We further identify seven open research challenges that must be addressed to secure the next generation of agentic AI systems.

</details>


### [267] [MedGemma 1.5 Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05081)
*Andrew Sellergren,Chufan Gao,Fereshteh Mahvar,Timo Kohlberger,Fayaz Jamil,Madeleine Traverse,Alberto Tono,Bashir Sadjad,Lin Yang,Charles Lau,Liron Yatziv,Tiffany Chen,Bram Sterling,Kenneth Philbrick,Richa Tiwari,Yun Liu,Madhuram Jajoo,Chandrashekar Sankarapu,Swapnil Vispute,Harshad Purandare,Abhishek Bijay Mishra,Sam Schmidgall,Tao Tu,Anil Palepu,Chunjong Park,Tim Strother,Rahul Thapa,Yong Cheng,Preeti Singh,Kat Black,Yossi Matias,Katherine Chou,Avinatan Hassidim,Kavi Goel,Joelle Barral,Tris Warkentin,Shravya Shetty,Dale Webster,Sunny Virmani,David F. Steiner,Can Kirmizibayrak,Daniel Golden*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: MedGemma 1.5 4B是MedGemma系列的最新模型，在4B参数规模下扩展了多模态医疗能力，包括3D医学影像、病理切片、解剖定位和多时间点分析，同时在文本临床推理方面也有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个统一的医疗AI基础模型，能够处理多种医疗数据类型（包括3D影像、病理切片、文本报告等），为医疗AI系统开发提供更强大的基础。

Method: 在MedGemma 1基础上，通过新的训练数据、长上下文3D体积切片、全玻片病理采样等技术，将高维医学影像、解剖定位、多时间点分析等能力集成到单一架构中。

Result: 相比MedGemma 1，在3D MRI分类准确率提升11%，3D CT分类提升3%，病理切片F1提升47%，胸部X光解剖定位IoU提升35%，多时间点分析准确率4%，MedQA准确率提升5%，EHRQA准确率提升22%，实验室报告信息提取平均F1达到18%。

Conclusion: MedGemma 1.5是一个强大的开源医疗AI基础模型，在多种医疗模态上都有显著改进，为下一代医疗AI系统开发提供了更好的基础。

Abstract: We introduce MedGemma 1.5 4B, the latest model in the MedGemma collection. MedGemma 1.5 expands on MedGemma 1 by integrating additional capabilities: high-dimensional medical imaging (CT/MRI volumes and histopathology whole slide images), anatomical localization via bounding boxes, multi-timepoint chest X-ray analysis, and improved medical document understanding (lab reports, electronic health records). We detail the innovations required to enable these modalities within a single architecture, including new training data, long-context 3D volume slicing, and whole-slide pathology sampling. Compared to MedGemma 1 4B, MedGemma 1.5 4B demonstrates significant gains in these new areas, improving 3D MRI condition classification accuracy by 11% and 3D CT condition classification by 3% (absolute improvements). In whole slide pathology imaging, MedGemma 1.5 4B achieves a 47% macro F1 gain. Additionally, it improves anatomical localization with a 35% increase in Intersection over Union on chest X-rays and achieves a 4% macro accuracy for longitudinal (multi-timepoint) chest x-ray analysis. Beyond its improved multimodal performance over MedGemma 1, MedGemma 1.5 improves on text-based clinical knowledge and reasoning, improving by 5% on MedQA accuracy and 22% on EHRQA accuracy. It also achieves an average of 18% macro F1 on 4 different lab report information extraction datasets (EHR Datasets 2, 3, 4, and Mendeley Clinical Laboratory Test Reports). Taken together, MedGemma 1.5 serves as a robust, open resource for the community, designed as an improved foundation on which developers can create the next generation of medical AI systems. Resources and tutorials for building upon MedGemma 1.5 can be found at https://goo.gle/MedGemma.

</details>


### [268] [Uncertainty-Guided Latent Diagnostic Trajectory Learning for Sequential Clinical Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05116)
*Xuyang Shen,Haoran Liu,Dongjin Song,Martin Renqiang Min*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出LDTL框架，将临床诊断建模为潜在诊断轨迹学习问题，通过规划LLM和诊断LLM协同工作，在不确定性下学习有效的证据获取序列，在MIMIC-CDM基准上实现更高诊断准确性和更少测试需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM诊断系统大多假设患者信息完全已知，未显式建模临床证据应如何随时间顺序获取。即使将诊断视为序列决策过程，也难以学习有效的诊断轨迹，因为证据获取路径空间大且临床数据集很少提供明确的理想诊断路径监督信息。

Method: 提出潜在诊断轨迹学习（LDTL）框架，基于规划LLM代理和诊断LLM代理。诊断LLM将诊断动作序列视为潜在路径，引入优先考虑提供更多诊断信息的轨迹的后验分布。规划LLM被训练遵循此分布，鼓励逐步减少不确定性的连贯诊断轨迹。

Result: 在MIMIC-CDM基准测试中，LDTL框架在顺序临床诊断设置下优于现有基线，诊断准确性更高，同时需要更少的诊断测试。消融研究强调了轨迹级后验对齐在实现这些改进中的关键作用。

Conclusion: LDTL框架成功解决了临床诊断中的序列证据获取问题，通过潜在轨迹学习和后验对齐机制，使LLM能够在不确定性下做出更有效的诊断决策，减少不必要的测试，提高诊断效率。

Abstract: Clinical diagnosis requires sequential evidence acquisition under uncertainty. However, most Large Language Model (LLM) based diagnostic systems assume fully observed patient information and therefore do not explicitly model how clinical evidence should be sequentially acquired over time. Even when diagnosis is formulated as a sequential decision process, it is still challenging to learn effective diagnostic trajectories. This is because the space of possible evidence-acquisition paths is relatively large, while clinical datasets rarely provide explicit supervision information for desirable diagnostic paths. To this end, we formulate sequential diagnosis as a Latent Diagnostic Trajectory Learning (LDTL) framework based on a planning LLM agent and a diagnostic LLM agent. For the diagnostic LLM agent, diagnostic action sequences are treated as latent paths and we introduce a posterior distribution that prioritizes trajectories providing more diagnostic information. The planning LLM agent is then trained to follow this distribution, encouraging coherent diagnostic trajectories that progressively reduce uncertainty. Experiments on the MIMIC-CDM benchmark demonstrate that our proposed LDTL framework outperforms existing baselines in diagnostic accuracy under a sequential clinical diagnosis setting, while requiring fewer diagnostic tests. Furthermore, ablation studies highlight the critical role of trajectory-level posterior alignment in achieving these improvements.

</details>


### [269] [A mathematical theory of evolution for self-designing AIs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05142)
*Kenneth D Harris*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个AI自我设计进化的数学模型，用有向树代替随机突变，分析AI进化动力学及其对AI对齐的影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统通过递归自我改进不断进化，可能会出现一种进化过程，其中AI系统的特性由早期AI设计和传播后代的能力决定。生物进化理论假设随机突变，但AI进化将完全不同，后代设计是高度有向的，需要新的数学模型来理解这种进化动力学及其对齐影响。

Method: 建立了一个AI自我设计进化的数学模型，用有向树表示可能的AI程序，当前程序决定后代设计，人类通过"适应度函数"控制计算资源分配。分析进化动力学，考虑后代谱系的长期增长潜力，研究有界适应度和"锁定"复制概率下的收敛性。

Result: 1. 进化动力学不仅反映当前适应度，还考虑后代谱系的长期增长潜力；2. 没有额外假设时，适应度不一定随时间增加；3. 在有界适应度和固定"锁定"复制概率下，适应度会收敛到最大可达值；4. 在适应度与人类效用不完全相关时，如果欺骗能提高适应度，进化会选择欺骗；5. 基于客观标准而非人类判断的繁殖可以减轻欺骗风险。

Conclusion: AI自我设计进化可能导致适应度收敛到最大值，但如果适应度与人类效用不完全一致，进化可能选择欺骗性策略。基于客观标准的繁殖机制可以减轻对齐风险，这对AI安全设计有重要启示。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence systems (AIs) become increasingly produced by recursive self-improvement, a form of evolution may emerge, in which the traits of AI systems are shaped by the success of earlier AIs in designing and propagating their descendants. There is a rich mathematical theory modeling how behavioral traits are shaped by biological evolution, but AI evolution will be radically different: biological DNA mutations are random and approximately reversible, but descendant design in AIs will be strongly directed. Here we develop a mathematical model of evolution in self-designing AI systems, replacing random mutations with a directed tree of possible AI programs. Current programs determine the design of their descendants, while humans retain partial control through a "fitness function" that allocates limited computational resources across lineages. We show that evolutionary dynamics reflects not just current fitness but factors related to the long-run growth potential of descendant lineages. Without further assumptions, fitness need not increase over time. However, assuming bounded fitness and a fixed probability that any AI reproduces a "locked" copy of itself, we show that fitness concentrates on the maximum reachable value. We consider the implications of this for AI alignment, specifically for cases where fitness and human utility are not perfectly correlated. We show in an additive model that if deception increases fitness beyond genuine utility, evolution will select for deception. This risk could be mitigated if reproduction is based on purely objective criteria, rather than human judgment.

</details>


### [270] [Instruction-Tuned LLMs for Parsing and Mining Unstructured Logs on Leadership HPC Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05168)
*Ahmad Maroof Karimi,Jong Youl Choi,Charles Qing Cao,Awais Khan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出一个基于LLaMA 8B的领域自适应框架，利用CoT推理解析HPC系统日志，在保持隐私、本地部署的同时达到与更大模型相当的解析精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 领导级HPC系统产生大量异构、非结构化系统日志，这些日志格式不一致，使得结构提取和模式发现极具挑战。需要将原始遥测数据转化为可操作的洞察，以揭示操作模式、诊断异常并实现可靠、高效、可扩展的系统分析。

Method: 开发了一个领域自适应、遵循指令的LLM驱动框架，利用CoT推理高保真解析HPC日志。结合领域特定日志模板数据和指令调优示例，对8B参数的LLaMA模型进行微调，采用混合微调方法将通用LLM适配到领域特定日志数据。

Result: 在LogHub数据集上的实验表明，该方法达到与LLaMA 70B和Claude等更大模型相当的解析精度。进一步验证了实际效用：在4周窗口内解析了Frontier超级计算机超过6亿条生产日志，揭示了时间动态、节点级异常和工作负载-错误日志相关性中的关键模式。

Conclusion: 提出的LLM驱动框架为HPC日志分析提供了一种隐私保护、本地可部署、快速且节能的方法，能够有效处理大规模异构日志数据，为系统监控和异常检测提供有力工具。

Abstract: Leadership-class HPC systems generate massive volumes of heterogeneous, largely unstructured system logs. Because these logs originate from diverse software, hardware, and runtime layers, they exhibit inconsistent formats, making structure extraction and pattern discovery extremely challenging. Therefore, robust log parsing and mining is critical to transform this raw telemetry into actionable insights that reveal operational patterns, diagnose anomalies, and enable reliable, efficient, and scalable system analysis. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer a promising new direction for automated log understanding in leadership-class HPC environments.
  To capitalize on this opportunity, we present a domain-adapted, instruction-following, LLM-driven framework that leverages chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to parse and structure HPC logs with high fidelity. Our approach combines domain-specific log-template data with instruction-tuned examples to fine-tune an 8B-parameter LLaMA model tailored for HPC log analysis. We develop a hybrid fine-tuning methodology that adapts a general-purpose LLM to domain-specific log data, enabling privacy-preserving, locally deployable, fast, and energy-efficient log-mining approach. We conduct experiments on a diverse set of log datasets from the LogHub repository. The evaluation confirms that our approach achieves parsing accuracy on par with significantly larger models, such as LLaMA 70B and Anthropic's Claude. We further validate the practical utility of our fine-tuned LLM model by parsing over 600 million production logs from the Frontier supercomputer over a four-week window, uncovering critical patterns in temporal dynamics, node-level anomalies, and workload-error log correlations.

</details>


### [271] [From Governance Norms to Enforceable Controls: A Layered Translation Method for Runtime Guardrails in Agentic AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05229)
*Christopher Koch*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种分层翻译方法，将AI治理标准转化为可实施的运行时护栏，特别针对具有规划、工具使用和多步执行能力的智能体AI系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能体AI系统具有规划、使用工具、维护状态和产生多步轨迹等特性，其治理问题与传统单轮生成式AI不同，重要风险在执行过程中而非仅在模型开发或部署时出现。现有治理标准（如ISO/IEC 42001、NIST AI风险管理框架）虽然相关，但本身无法提供可实施的运行时护栏。

Method: 提出分层翻译方法，将标准衍生的治理目标连接到四个控制层：治理目标、设计时约束、运行时调解和保证反馈。区分治理目标、技术控制、运行时护栏和保证证据；引入控制元组和运行时可执行性评估标准进行层级分配；通过采购代理案例研究展示该方法。

Result: 该方法能够系统地将治理标准转化为可操作的控制措施，特别强调运行时护栏应仅用于那些可观察、确定且时间敏感到足以证明执行时干预合理性的控制。

Conclusion: 标准应指导跨架构、运行时策略、人工升级和审计的控制放置，而运行时护栏应保留给那些可观察、确定且时间敏感的控制。该方法为智能体AI系统提供了实用的治理实施框架。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems plan, use tools, maintain state, and produce multi-step trajectories with external effects. Those properties create a governance problem that differs materially from single-turn generative AI: important risks emerge dur- ing execution, not only at model development or deployment time. Governance standards such as ISO/IEC 42001, ISO/IEC 23894, ISO/IEC 42005, ISO/IEC 5338, ISO/IEC 38507, and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework are therefore highly relevant to agentic AI, but they do not by themselves yield implementable runtime guardrails. This paper proposes a layered translation method that connects standards-derived governance objectives to four control layers: governance objectives, design- time constraints, runtime mediation, and assurance feedback. It distinguishes governance objectives, technical controls, runtime guardrails, and assurance evidence; introduces a control tuple and runtime-enforceability rubric for layer assignment; and demonstrates the method in a procurement-agent case study. The central claim is modest: standards should guide control placement across architecture, runtime policy, human escalation, and audit, while runtime guardrails are reserved for controls that are observable, determinate, and time-sensitive enough to justify execution-time intervention.

</details>


### [272] [Graph of Skills: Dependency-Aware Structural Retrieval for Massive Agent Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05333)
*Dawei Li,Zongxia Li,Hongyang Du,Xiyang Wu,Shihang Gui,Yongbei Kuang,Lichao Sun*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: GoS（技能图谱）是一个推理时的结构化检索层，用于大规模技能库管理，通过构建可执行的技能图谱，在推理时检索有界的、依赖感知的技能包，显著提升奖励并减少token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中智能体需要监控和交互大量个人应用、网页浏览器和其他环境接口，技能库可能扩展到数千个可重用技能。大规模技能集带来两个关键挑战：1）加载完整技能集会饱和上下文窗口，增加token成本、幻觉和延迟；2）需要高效检索相关技能。

Method: GoS从技能包离线构建可执行的技能图谱，在推理时通过混合语义-词汇种子、反向加权个性化PageRank和上下文预算化的水合技术，检索有界的、依赖感知的技能包。

Result: 在SkillsBench和ALFWorld上，GoS相比完整技能加载基线平均奖励提升43.6%，同时减少37.8%的输入token，并在Claude Sonnet、GPT-5.2 Codex和MiniMax三个模型家族上表现出良好泛化性。在200到2000个技能的技能库上，GoS在奖励、token效率和运行时方面始终优于完整技能加载和简单向量检索。

Conclusion: GoS为大规模技能库管理提供了有效的结构化检索解决方案，解决了上下文窗口饱和问题，在保持高性能的同时显著提升了效率。

Abstract: Skill usage has become a core component of modern agent systems and can substantially improve agents' ability to complete complex tasks. In real-world settings, where agents must monitor and interact with numerous personal applications, web browsers, and other environment interfaces, skill libraries can scale to thousands of reusable skills. Scaling to larger skill sets introduces two key challenges. First, loading the full skill set saturates the context window, driving up token costs, hallucination, and latency.
  In this paper, we present Graph of Skills (GoS), an inference-time structural retrieval layer for large skill libraries. GoS constructs an executable skill graph offline from skill packages, then at inference time retrieves a bounded, dependency-aware skill bundle through hybrid semantic-lexical seeding, reverse-weighted Personalized PageRank, and context-budgeted hydration. On SkillsBench and ALFWorld, GoS improves average reward by 43.6% over the vanilla full skill-loading baseline while reducing input tokens by 37.8%, and generalizes across three model families: Claude Sonnet, GPT-5.2 Codex, and MiniMax. Additional ablation studies across skill libraries ranging from 200 to 2,000 skills further demonstrate that GoS consistently outperforms both vanilla skills loading and simple vector retrieval in balancing reward, token efficiency, and runtime.

</details>


### [273] [HYVE: Hybrid Views for LLM Context Engineering over Machine Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05400)
*Jian Tan,Fan Bu,Yuqing Gao,Dev Khanolkar,Jason Mackay,Boris Sobolev,Lei Jin,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: HYVE框架通过数据库管理原理优化LLM处理混合自然语言和结构化机器数据（如JSON、日志），检测重复结构并选择性暴露最相关表示，减少50-90%令牌使用，提升图表生成准确率132%，降低延迟83%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代计算系统中的机器数据（日志、指标、配置快照）通常以自然语言和结构化负载（JSON、Python/AST）混合形式出现，但LLM对此类输入仍然脆弱，特别是当数据冗长、深度嵌套且包含重复结构时，需要更有效的上下文工程方法

Method: HYVE框架基于数据库管理原理，围绕模型调用协调预处理和后处理：1）预处理阶段检测原始输入中的重复结构，将其物化到数据存储中，转换为混合列式和行式视图；2）选择性向LLM暴露最相关表示；3）后处理阶段直接返回输出、查询数据存储恢复省略信息，或执行有限额外LLM调用进行SQL增强语义合成

Result: 在知识问答、图表生成、异常检测和多步网络故障排除等真实工作负载评估中，HYVE减少50-90%令牌使用同时保持或提升输出质量；在结构化生成任务中，图表生成准确率提升高达132%，延迟降低高达83%；为大型机器数据负载提供近似无限上下文窗口的实用方案

Conclusion: HYVE框架通过数据库管理启发的上下文工程技术，有效解决LLM处理混合自然语言和结构化机器数据的脆弱性问题，显著提升效率和质量，为处理大型机器数据负载提供了实用的解决方案

Abstract: Machine data is central to observability and diagnosis in modern computing systems, appearing in logs, metrics, telemetry traces, and configuration snapshots. When provided to large language models (LLMs), this data typically arrives as a mixture of natural language and structured payloads such as JSON or Python/AST literals. Yet LLMs remain brittle on such inputs, particularly when they are long, deeply nested, and dominated by repetitive structure.
  We present HYVE (HYbrid ViEw), a framework for LLM context engineering for inputs containing large machine-data payloads, inspired by database management principles. HYVE surrounds model invocation with coordinated preprocessing and postprocessing, centered on a request-scoped datastore augmented with schema information. During preprocessing, HYVE detects repetitive structure in raw inputs, materializes it in the datastore, transforms it into hybrid columnar and row-oriented views, and selectively exposes only the most relevant representation to the LLM. During postprocessing, HYVE either returns the model output directly, queries the datastore to recover omitted information, or performs a bounded additional LLM call for SQL-augmented semantic synthesis.
  We evaluate HYVE on diverse real-world workloads spanning knowledge QA, chart generation, anomaly detection, and multi-step network troubleshooting. Across these benchmarks, HYVE reduces token usage by 50-90% while maintaining or improving output quality. On structured generation tasks, it improves chart-generation accuracy by up to 132% and reduces latency by up to 83%. Overall, HYVE offers a practical approximation to an effectively unbounded context window for prompts dominated by large machine-data payloads.

</details>


### [274] [ActivityEditor: Learning to Synthesize Physically Valid Human Mobility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05529)
*Chenjie Yang,Yutian Jiang,Anqi Liang,Wei Qi,Chenyu Wu,Junbo Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: ActivityEditor是一个基于双LLM代理的零样本跨区域轨迹生成框架，通过分解意图生成和轨迹编辑两阶段，结合强化学习确保轨迹的物理有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的人类移动建模方法在历史轨迹数据稀缺或受限的区域适用性有限，需要一种能够在数据稀缺场景下进行跨区域零样本轨迹生成的方法。

Method: 提出双LLM代理框架：1) 意图代理基于人口统计先验生成结构化人类意图和粗略活动链；2) 编辑代理通过强化学习（基于真实世界物理约束的多奖励）迭代修订生成移动轨迹，内化移动规律。

Result: 实验表明ActivityEditor在跨不同城市环境的零样本迁移中表现优异，保持高统计保真度和物理有效性，为数据稀缺场景下的移动模拟提供了鲁棒且高度可泛化的解决方案。

Conclusion: ActivityEditor通过双LLM代理框架成功解决了跨区域零样本轨迹生成问题，为数据稀缺场景下的人类移动建模提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Human mobility modeling is indispensable for diverse urban applications. However, existing data-driven methods often suffer from data scarcity, limiting their applicability in regions where historical trajectories are unavailable or restricted. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{ActivityEditor}, a novel dual-LLM-agent framework designed for zero-shot cross-regional trajectory generation. Our framework decomposes the complex synthesis task into two collaborative stages. Specifically, an intention-based agent, which leverages demographic-driven priors to generate structured human intentions and coarse activity chains to ensure high-level socio-semantic coherence. These outputs are then refined by editor agent to obtain mobility trajectories through iteratively revisions that enforces human mobility law. This capability is acquired through reinforcement learning with multiple rewards grounded in real-world physical constraints, allowing the agent to internalize mobility regularities and ensure high-fidelity trajectory generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textbf{ActivityEditor} achieves superior zero-shot performance when transferred across diverse urban contexts. It maintains high statistical fidelity and physical validity, providing a robust and highly generalizable solution for mobility simulation in data-scarce scenarios. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ActivityEditor-066B.

</details>


### [275] [Experience Transfer for Multimodal LLM Agents in Minecraft Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05533)
*Chenghao Li,Jun Liu,Songbo Zhang,Huadong Jian,Hao Ni,Lik-Hang Lee,Sung-Ho Bae,Guoqing Wang,Yang Yang,Chaoning Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: Echo是一个面向迁移的记忆框架，通过将可重用知识分解为五个维度，使多模态LLM智能体能够从先前交互中提取可操作知识，并在新任务中实现经验迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态LLM智能体在复杂游戏环境中需要持续重用过去经验来高效解决新任务。现有方法通常将记忆视为静态记录的被动存储库，缺乏明确的经验迁移机制。

Method: 提出Echo框架：1) 将可重用知识分解为结构、属性、过程、功能和交互五个维度；2) 使用上下文类比学习(ICAL)检索相关经验并通过上下文示例适应新任务。

Result: 在Minecraft实验中，Echo在从头学习设置下，在对象解锁任务上实现了1.3倍到1.7倍的加速。观察到爆发式链式解锁现象，在获得可迁移经验后短时间内快速解锁多个相似物品。

Conclusion: 经验迁移是提高多模态LLM智能体在复杂交互环境中效率和适应性的有前景方向。Echo框架通过明确的迁移机制实现了有效的经验重用。

Abstract: Multimodal LLM agents operating in complex game environments must continually reuse past experience to solve new tasks efficiently. In this work, we propose Echo, a transfer-oriented memory framework that enables agents to derive actionable knowledge from prior interactions rather than treating memory as a passive repository of static records. To make transfer explicit, Echo decomposes reusable knowledge into five dimensions: structure, attribute, process, function, and interaction. This formulation allows the agent to identify recurring patterns shared across different tasks and infer what prior experience remains applicable in new situations. Building on this formulation, Echo leverages In-Context Analogy Learning (ICAL) to retrieve relevant experiences and adapt them to unseen tasks through contextual examples. Experiments in Minecraft show that, under a from-scratch learning setting, Echo achieves a 1.3x to 1.7x speed-up on object-unlocking tasks. Moreover, Echo exhibits a burst-like chain-unlocking phenomenon, rapidly unlocking multiple similar items within a short time interval after acquiring transferable experience. These results suggest that experience transfer is a promising direction for improving the efficiency and adaptability of multimodal LLM agents in complex interactive environments.

</details>


### [276] [SignalClaw: LLM-Guided Evolutionary Synthesis of Interpretable Traffic Signal Control Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05535)
*Da Lei,Feng Xiao,Lu Li,Yuzhan Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: SignalClaw使用LLM作为进化技能生成器，为自适应交通信号控制合成可解释的控制技能，通过自然语言反馈和事件驱动组合进化，在常规和事件场景下实现接近最优的性能，同时保持策略的可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前交通信号控制存在两难：强化学习产生不透明的神经网络策略，而程序合成依赖于限制性的领域特定语言。需要既有效又可解释的控制策略，便于实际部署和工程师修改。

Method: 1. 使用LLM作为进化技能生成器，合成包含原理、选择指导和可执行代码的技能；2. 将仿真指标（队列百分位、延迟趋势等）转化为自然语言反馈指导改进；3. 事件驱动组合进化：事件检测器识别紧急车辆、公交优先等，优先级调度器选择专门技能；4. 技能独立进化，运行时通过优先级链组合，无需重新训练。

Result: 在常规场景下，平均延迟7.8-9.2秒，与最佳方法相差3-10%，随机种子间方差低；在事件场景下，紧急延迟11.2-18.5秒（MaxPressure为42.3-72.3，DQN为78.5-95.3），公交人员延迟9.8-11.5秒（MaxPressure为38.7-45.2）；混合事件中调度器能有效组合技能，同时保持总体延迟稳定。

Conclusion: SignalClaw框架成功地将LLM用于进化技能生成，实现了既有效又可解释的交通信号控制策略，技能从简单线性规则进化到具有多特征交互的条件策略，同时保持完全可解释性和工程师可修改性。

Abstract: Traffic signal control TSC requires strategies that are both effective and interpretable for deployment, yet reinforcement learning produces opaque neural policies while program synthesis depends on restrictive domain-specific languages. We present SIGNALCLAW, a framework that uses large language models LLMs as evolutionary skill generators to synthesize and refine interpretable control skills for adaptive TSC. Each skill includes rationale, selection guidance, and executable code, making policies human-inspectable and self-documenting. At each generation, evolution signals from simulation metrics such as queue percentiles, delay trends, and stagnation are translated into natural language feedback to guide improvement. SignalClaw also introduces event-driven compositional evolution: an event detector identifies emergency vehicles, transit priority, incidents, and congestion via TraCI, and a priority dispatcher selects specialized skills. Each skill is evolved independently, and a priority chain enables runtime composition without retraining. We evaluate SignalClaw on routine and event-injected SUMO scenarios against four baselines. On routine scenarios, it achieves average delay of 7.8 to 9.2 seconds, within 3 to 10 percent of the best method, with low variance across random seeds. Under event scenarios, it yields the lowest emergency delay 11.2 to 18.5 seconds versus 42.3 to 72.3 for MaxPressure and 78.5 to 95.3 for DQN, and the lowest transit person delay 9.8 to 11.5 seconds versus 38.7 to 45.2 for MaxPressure. In mixed events, the dispatcher composes skills effectively while maintaining stable overall delay. The evolved skills progress from simple linear rules to conditional strategies with multi-feature interactions, while remaining fully interpretable and directly modifiable by traffic engineers.

</details>


### [277] [CuraLight: Debate-Guided Data Curation for LLM-Centered Traffic Signal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05663)
*Qing Guo,Xinhang Li,Junyu Chen,Zheng Guo,Shengzhe Xu,Lin Zhang,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: CuraLight：一个LLM为中心的交通信号控制框架，通过RL代理探索生成高质量交互轨迹，用于LLM的模仿微调，并采用多LLM集成审议系统评估候选信号时序动作，在异构真实路网中显著降低旅行时间、排队长度和等待时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于RL和LLM的交通信号控制方法存在可解释性有限、交互数据不足、对异构路口泛化能力弱等问题。需要开发更可解释、数据高效且能泛化到不同交通场景的智能交通控制系统。

Method: 1) RL代理探索交通环境生成高质量交互轨迹，转换为提示-响应对用于LLM模仿微调；2) 多LLM集成审议系统通过结构化辩论评估候选信号时序动作，提供偏好感知监督信号；3) 结合RL辅助探索和基于审议的数据筛选，实现可扩展且可解释的交通信号控制。

Result: 在SUMO中使用济南、杭州、亦庄的异构真实路网进行实验，CuraLight持续优于SOTA基线：平均旅行时间降低5.34%，平均排队长度降低5.14%，平均等待时间降低7.02%。

Conclusion: RL辅助探索与基于审议的数据筛选相结合，为可扩展且可解释的交通信号控制提供了有效方法。该框架展示了LLM在复杂决策任务中的潜力，特别是在需要可解释性和泛化能力的领域。

Abstract: Traffic signal control (TSC) is a core component of intelligent transportation systems (ITS), aiming to reduce congestion, emissions, and travel time. Recent approaches based on reinforcement learning (RL) and large language models (LLMs) have improved adaptivity, but still suffer from limited interpretability, insufficient interaction data, and weak generalization to heterogeneous intersections.
  This paper proposes CuraLight, an LLM-centered framework where an RL agent assists the fine-tuning of an LLM-based traffic signal controller. The RL agent explores traffic environments and generates high-quality interaction trajectories, which are converted into prompt-response pairs for imitation fine-tuning. A multi-LLM ensemble deliberation system further evaluates candidate signal timing actions through structured debate, providing preference-aware supervision signals for training.
  Experiments conducted in SUMO across heterogeneous real-world networks from Jinan, Hangzhou, and Yizhuang demonstrate that CuraLight consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing average travel time by 5.34 percent, average queue length by 5.14 percent, and average waiting time by 7.02 percent. The results highlight the effectiveness of combining RL-assisted exploration with deliberation-based data curation for scalable and interpretable traffic signal control.

</details>


### [278] [From PDF to RAG-Ready: Evaluating Document Conversion Frameworks for Domain-Specific Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04948)
*José Guilherme Marques dos Santos,Ricardo Yang,Rui Humberto Pereira,Alexandre Sousa,Brígida Mónica Faria,Henrique Lopes Cardoso,José Duarte,José Luís Reis,Luís Paulo Reis,Pedro Pimenta,José Paulo Marques dos Santos*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 系统评估了四种PDF转Markdown框架对RAG问答准确性的影响，发现数据准备质量是RAG性能的主导因素，Docling结合层次分割和图像描述达到最高自动化准确率94.1%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统严重依赖文档预处理质量，但之前没有研究评估PDF处理框架对下游问答准确性的影响。本研究填补了这一空白，系统比较不同PDF转换工具对RAG性能的影响。

Method: 系统比较了四种开源PDF转Markdown框架（Docling、MinerU、Marker、DeepSeek OCR），在19种管道配置下评估文本提取效果。使用36份葡萄牙行政文档（1,706页）构建50个问题的基准，采用LLM-as-judge评分（10次运行平均）。设置了两个基线：朴素PDFLoader（86.9%）和手动整理Markdown（97.1%）。

Result: Docling结合层次分割和图像描述达到最高自动化准确率94.1%。元数据丰富和层次感知分块对准确性的贡献大于转换框架选择。基于字体的层次重建始终优于基于LLM的方法。GraphRAG实现仅得82%，表现不如基础RAG。

Conclusion: 数据准备质量是RAG系统性能的主导因素，而非转换框架选择。层次感知分块和元数据丰富比工具选择更重要。当前GraphRAG在没有本体指导的情况下复杂度增加但性能不佳。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend critically on the quality of document preprocessing, yet no prior study has evaluated PDF processing frameworks by their impact on downstream question-answering accuracy. We address this gap through a systematic comparison of four open-source PDF-to-Markdown conversion frameworks, Docling, MinerU, Marker, and DeepSeek OCR, across 19 pipeline configurations for extracting text and other contents from PDFs, varying the conversion tool, cleaning transformations, splitting strategy, and metadata enrichment. Evaluation was performed using a manually curated 50-question benchmark over a corpus of 36 Portuguese administrative documents (1,706 pages, ~492K words), with LLM-as-judge scoring averaged over 10 runs. Two baselines bounded the results: naïve PDFLoader (86.9%) and manually curated Markdown (97.1%). Docling with hierarchical splitting and image descriptions achieved the highest automated accuracy (94.1%). Metadata enrichment and hierarchy-aware chunking contributed more to accuracy than the conversion framework choice alone. Font-based hierarchy rebuilding consistently outperformed LLM-based approaches. An exploratory GraphRAG implementation scored only 82%, underperforming basic RAG, suggesting that naïve knowledge graph construction without ontological guidance does not yet justify its added complexity. These findings demonstrate that data preparation quality is the dominant factor in RAG system performance.

</details>


### [279] [When Do We Need LLMs? A Diagnostic for Language-Driven Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05859)
*Uljad Berdica,Fernando Acero,Anton Ipsen,Parisa Zehtabi,Michael Cashmore,Manuela Veloso*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文研究上下文多臂老虎机问题，提出LLMP-UCB算法利用LLM进行不确定性估计，但发现轻量级数值老虎机在文本嵌入上表现相当或更好，成本更低，并提供了部署框架指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在金融领域的推荐系统、动态投资组合调整等非情景序列决策问题中，上下文包含文本和数值信息。虽然LLM越来越多地应用于这些场景，但每一步决策都使用LLM进行推理计算成本高，且难以获得不确定性估计。

Method: 提出LLMP-UCB老虎机算法，通过重复推理从LLM获得不确定性估计。同时研究轻量级数值老虎机在文本嵌入（密集或Matryoshka）上的表现，并展示嵌入维度如何影响探索-利用平衡。最后提出基于臂嵌入的几何诊断方法，指导何时使用LLM驱动推理或轻量级数值老虎机。

Result: 实验表明，轻量级数值老虎机在文本嵌入上的准确性与LLM解决方案相当或更好，但成本显著更低。嵌入维度是探索-利用平衡的实际调节杠杆，可在不增加提示复杂性的情况下实现成本-性能权衡。

Conclusion: 为金融服务的AI应用提供了成本有效、不确定性感知的决策系统部署框架，指导实践者在LLM驱动推理和轻量级数值老虎机之间做出选择。

Abstract: We study Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMABs) for non-episodic sequential decision making problems where the context includes both textual and numerical information (e.g., recommendation systems, dynamic portfolio adjustments, offer selection; all frequent problems in finance). While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to these settings, utilizing LLMs for reasoning at every decision step is computationally expensive and uncertainty estimates are difficult to obtain. To address this, we introduce LLMP-UCB, a bandit algorithm that derives uncertainty estimates from LLMs via repeated inference. However, our experiments demonstrate that lightweight numerical bandits operating on text embeddings (dense or Matryoshka) match or exceed the accuracy of LLM-based solutions at a fraction of their cost. We further show that embedding dimensionality is a practical lever on the exploration-exploitation balance, enabling cost--performance tradeoffs without prompt complexity. Finally, to guide practitioners, we propose a geometric diagnostic based on the arms' embedding to decide when to use LLM-driven reasoning versus a lightweight numerical bandit. Our results provide a principled deployment framework for cost-effective, uncertainty-aware decision systems with broad applicability across AI use cases in financial services.

</details>


### [280] [EduIllustrate: Towards Scalable Automated Generation Of Multimodal Educational Content](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05005)
*Shuzhen Bi,Mingzi Zhang,Zhuoxuan Li,Xiaolong Wang,keqian Li,Aimin Zhou*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: EduIllustrate是一个评估LLM生成图文并茂STEM教学内容的基准，包含230个K-12问题，采用顺序锚定技术确保视觉一致性，评估10个LLM发现性能差异显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM教育能力评估主要集中在问答和辅导任务，缺乏对多媒体教学内容生成能力的评估，特别是需要结合几何准确图形和逐步推理的图文并茂解释生成。

Method: 构建包含230个K-12 STEM问题的基准，采用顺序锚定技术确保跨图视觉一致性，设计基于多媒体学习理论的8维度评估标准，涵盖文本和视觉质量。

Result: 评估10个LLM显示性能差异大：Gemini 3.0 Pro Preview最佳(87.8%)，Kimi-K2.5性价比最高(80.8%/$0.12/题)。顺序锚定技术提升视觉一致性13%，成本降低94%。

Conclusion: EduIllustrate填补了LLM多媒体教学内容生成评估的空白，顺序锚定技术有效，LLM作为评判者在客观维度可靠(ρ≥0.83)，但在主观视觉评估方面有限制。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as educational assistants, yet evaluation of their educational capabilities remains concentrated on question-answering and tutoring tasks. A critical gap exists for multimedia instructional content generation -- the ability to produce coherent, diagram-rich explanations that combine geometrically accurate visuals with step-by-step reasoning. We present EduIllustrate, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on interleaved text-diagram explanation generation for K-12 STEM problems. The benchmark comprises 230 problems spanning five subjects and three grade levels, a standardized generation protocol with sequential anchoring to enforce cross-diagram visual consistency, and an 8-dimension evaluation rubric grounded in multimedia learning theory covering both text and visual quality. Evaluation of ten LLMs reveals a wide performance spread: Gemini 3.0 Pro Preview leads at 87.8\%, while Kimi-K2.5 achieves the best cost-efficiency (80.8\% at \\$0.12/problem). Workflow ablation confirms sequential anchoring improves Visual Consistency by 13\% at 94\% lower cost. Human evaluation with 20 expert raters validates LLM-as-judge reliability for objective dimensions ($ρ\geq 0.83$) while revealing limitations on subjective visual assessment.

</details>


### [281] [ACE-Bench: Agent Configurable Evaluation with Scalable Horizons and Controllable Difficulty under Lightweight Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06111)
*Wang Yang,Chaoda Song,Xinpeng Li,Debargha Ganguly,Chuang Ma,Shouren Wang,Zhihao Dou,Yuli Zhou,Vipin Chaudhary,Xiaotian Han*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: ACE-Bench：一个用于评估智能体推理能力的轻量级基准测试，通过网格规划任务提供可扩展的视野和可控的难度，消除了环境交互开销


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体基准测试存在两个关键限制：1) 环境交互开销高（占总评估时间高达41%）；2) 任务视野和难度分布不平衡，使得聚合分数不可靠。需要一种轻量级、可控制、可复现的评估方法

Method: 提出ACE-Bench基准测试，围绕统一的基于网格的规划任务构建。智能体必须在部分完成的日程表中填充隐藏槽位，同时满足局部槽位约束和全局约束。通过两个正交轴提供细粒度控制：可扩展视野（隐藏槽位数量H）和可控难度（诱饵预算B）。采用轻量级环境设计，所有工具调用通过静态JSON文件解析，消除设置开销

Result: 验证了H和B能可靠控制任务视野和难度，ACE-Bench表现出强的领域一致性和模型区分能力。在6个领域对13个不同规模和家族的模型进行实验，显示出显著的跨模型性能差异，确认ACE-Bench能提供可解释和可控的智能体推理评估

Conclusion: ACE-Bench提供了一个高效、可控制、可复现的智能体推理评估框架，解决了现有基准测试的环境交互开销和任务分布不平衡问题，适用于训练时验证

Abstract: Existing Agent benchmarks suffer from two critical limitations: high environment interaction overhead (up to 41\% of total evaluation time) and imbalanced task horizon and difficulty distributions that make aggregate scores unreliable. To address these issues, we propose ACE-Bench built around a unified grid-based planning task, where agents must fill hidden slots in a partially completed schedule subject to both local slot constraints and global constraints. Our benchmark offers fine-grained control through two orthogonal axes: Scalable Horizons, controlled by the number of hidden slots $H$, and Controllable Difficulty, governed by a decoy budget $B$ that determines the number of globally misleading decoy candidates. Crucially, all tool calls are resolved via static JSON files under a Lightweight Environment design, eliminating setup overhead and enabling fast, reproducible evaluation suitable for training-time validation. We first validate that H and B provide reliable control over task horizon and difficulty, and that ACE-Bench exhibits strong domain consistency and model discriminability. We then conduct comprehensive experiments across 13 models of diverse sizes and families over 6 domains, revealing significant cross-model performance variation and confirming that ACE-Bench provides interpretable and controllable evaluation of agent reasoning.

</details>


### [282] [Web Retrieval-Aware Chunking (W-RAC) for Efficient and Cost-Effective Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04936)
*Uday Allu,Sonu Kedia,Tanmay Odapally,Biddwan Ahmed*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出W-RAC框架，通过将文本提取与语义分块规划解耦，显著降低LLM成本，同时保持或提升检索性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAG分块方法（固定大小、基于规则或完全代理分块）存在高token消耗、冗余文本生成、可扩展性差和可调试性差等问题，特别是在大规模网络内容处理场景下

Method: W-RAC框架将解析的网络内容表示为结构化、ID可寻址单元，仅使用LLM进行检索感知的分组决策而非文本生成，实现文本提取与语义分块规划的解耦

Result: W-RAC在保持或优于传统分块方法检索性能的同时，将分块相关的LLM成本降低一个数量级

Conclusion: W-RAC为网络文档提供了一种高效、可扩展且成本效益高的分块框架，解决了传统方法的局限性

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems critically depend on effective document chunking strategies to balance retrieval quality, latency, and operational cost. Traditional chunking approaches, such as fixed-size, rule-based, or fully agentic chunking, often suffer from high token consumption, redundant text generation, limited scalability, and poor debuggability, especially for large-scale web content ingestion. In this paper, we propose Web Retrieval-Aware Chunking (W-RAC), a novel, cost-efficient chunking framework designed specifically for web-based documents. W-RAC decouples text extraction from semantic chunk planning by representing parsed web content as structured, ID-addressable units and leveraging large language models (LLMs) only for retrieval-aware grouping decisions rather than text generation. This significantly reduces token usage, eliminates hallucination risks, and improves system observability.Experimental analysis and architectural comparison demonstrate that W-RAC achieves comparable or better retrieval performance than traditional chunking approaches while reducing chunking-related LLM costs by an order of magnitude.

</details>


### [283] [The Planetary Cost of AI Acceleration, Part II: The 10th Planetary Boundary and the 6.5-Year Countdown](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04956)
*William Yicheng Zhu,Lei Zhu*

Main category: physics.soc-ph

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文提出AI规模化发展将产生大量废热，可能在未来6.5年内突破地球生态临界点，建议将AI热耗散作为第10个行星边界来管理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主LLM代理的超指数级扩展，人类正在经历从机器替代体力劳动到机器替代思维的根本范式转变。这种"思维"的规模化卸载会产生大量废热，而地球已超过长期生态稳定的热耗散阈值。作者担心如果不加干预，人为热积累将在6.5年内突破关键行星生态阈值。

Method: 识别了影响全球热耗散率的六个相互作用因素，分析了这些因素如何驱动社会走向四种宏观轨迹：传统型、加速主义型、中间型和恢复型。提出将AI热耗散整合到行星系统中作为第10个行星边界（9+1），核心测量指标是AI指数增长产生的净新增废热与其减少经济社会低效率的平衡。

Result: 分析表明管理AI规模化缺乏温和的中间地带：要么加速突破关键热力学阈值，要么成为稳定其他行星边界和人类文明生存的最有效杠杆。AI发展轨迹将决定人类是走向生态崩溃还是可持续未来。

Conclusion: AI规模化具有深刻的热力学影响，必须将其作为行星边界来管理。AI发展没有中间道路，要么加速生态崩溃，要么成为拯救人类文明的关键杠杆。需要结构性干预来引导AI走向恢复型轨迹。

Abstract: The recent, super-exponential scaling of autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents signals a broader, fundamental paradigm shift from machines replacing the human hands (manual labor and mechanical processing) to machines delegating for the human minds (thinking, reasoning, and intention). This uncontrolled offloading and scaling of "thinking" itself has profound consequences for humanity's heat balance sheet, since thinking, or intelligence, carries thermodynamic weight. The Earth has already surpassed the heat dissipation threshold required for long-term ecological stability, and projecting based on empirical data reveal a concerning trajectory: without radical structural intervention, anthropogenic heat accumulation will breach critical planetary ecological thresholds in less than 6.5 years, even under the most ideal scenario where Earth Energy Imbalance (EEI) holds constant. In this work, we identify six interacting factors that govern the global heat dissipation rate and delineate how their interplay drives society toward one of four macroscopic trajectories: legacy, accelerationist, centrist, or restorative. We propose that the integration of artificial intelligence and its heat dissipation into the planetary system constitutes the 10th planetary boundary (9+1). The core measurement of this new boundary is the net-new waste heat generated by exponential AI growth balanced against its impact on reducing economic and societal inefficiencies and through which the baseline anthropogenic waste heat emissions. We demonstrate that managing AI scaling lacks a moderate middle ground: it will either accelerate the imminent breach of critical thermodynamic thresholds, or it will serve as the single most effective lever capable of stabilizing the other planetary boundaries and the survival of human civilization.

</details>


### [284] [MG$^2$-RAG: Multi-Granularity Graph for Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04969)
*Sijun Dai,Qiang Huang,Xiaoxing You,Jun Yu*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: MG²-RAG：轻量级多粒度图RAG框架，通过分层多模态知识图谱和实体驱动的视觉定位，提升多模态大语言模型的跨模态推理能力，显著降低计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统在复杂跨模态推理中存在局限：扁平向量检索忽略结构依赖，图方法依赖昂贵的"文本翻译"流水线且丢失细粒度视觉信息。需要更有效的多模态知识表示和检索机制。

Method: 提出MG²-RAG框架：1) 结合轻量级文本解析和实体驱动视觉定位构建分层多模态知识图谱；2) 将文本实体和视觉区域融合为统一多模态节点；3) 引入多粒度图检索机制，聚合密集相似性并在图上传播相关性以支持结构化多跳推理。

Result: 在四个代表性多模态任务（检索、知识型VQA、推理、分类）上实现SOTA性能，相比先进图框架平均加速43.3倍，成本降低23.9倍。

Conclusion: MG²-RAG通过统一的多模态知识表示和高效图检索，显著提升了多模态RAG的跨模态推理能力，同时大幅降低了计算开销。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates hallucinations in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), yet existing systems struggle with complex cross-modal reasoning. Flat vector retrieval often ignores structural dependencies, while current graph-based methods rely on costly ``translation-to-text'' pipelines that discard fine-grained visual information. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{MG$^2$-RAG}, a lightweight \textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{G}ranularity \textbf{G}raph \textbf{RAG} framework that jointly improves graph construction, modality fusion, and cross-modal retrieval. MG$^2$-RAG constructs a hierarchical multimodal knowledge graph by combining lightweight textual parsing with entity-driven visual grounding, enabling textual entities and visual regions to be fused into unified multimodal nodes that preserve atomic evidence. Building on this representation, we introduce a multi-granularity graph retrieval mechanism that aggregates dense similarities and propagates relevance across the graph to support structured multi-hop reasoning. Extensive experiments across four representative multimodal tasks (i.e., retrieval, knowledge-based VQA, reasoning, and classification) demonstrate that MG$^2$-RAG consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing graph construction overhead with an average 43.3$\times$ speedup and 23.9$\times$ cost reduction compared with advanced graph-based frameworks.

</details>


### [285] [Measuring the Permission Gate: A Stress-Test Evaluation of Claude Code's Auto Mode](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04978)
*Zimo Ji,Zongjie Li,Wenyuan Jiang,Yudong Gao,Shuai Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 独立评估Claude Code的auto mode权限系统，发现在故意模糊的授权场景下，其假阴性率高达81%，远超Anthropic报告的17%，主要原因是系统假设危险操作通过shell执行，但AI代理常通过文件编辑实现同等效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估首个部署的AI编程代理权限系统（Claude Code的auto mode）在故意模糊授权场景下的实际效果，揭示其覆盖边界和潜在安全风险。

Method: 使用AmPermBench基准测试（128个提示，涵盖4个DevOps任务族和3个模糊维度），在个体操作级别评估253个状态变更操作，与真实基准进行比较。

Result: 端到端假阴性率81.0%（95% CI: 73.8%-87.4%），显著高于生产流量报告的17%。36.8%的状态变更操作通过Tier 2（项目内文件编辑）绕过分类器评估，即使仅考虑分类器实际评估的160个操作，假阴性率仍达70.3%，假阳性率31.9%。

Conclusion: auto mode的覆盖边界存在显著漏洞：系统假设危险操作通过shell执行，但AI代理常通过文件编辑实现同等效果，这些操作未被分类器评估，导致安全风险。

Abstract: Claude Code's auto mode is the first deployed permission system for AI coding agents, using a two-stage transcript classifier to gate dangerous tool calls. Anthropic reports a 0.4% false positive rate and 17% false negative rate on production traffic. We present the first independent evaluation of this system on deliberately ambiguous authorization scenarios, i.e., tasks where the user's intent is clear but the target scope, blast radius, or risk level is underspecified. Using AmPermBench, a 128-prompt benchmark spanning four DevOps task families and three controlled ambiguity axes, we evaluate 253 state-changing actions at the individual action level against oracle ground truth.
  Our findings characterize auto mode's scope-escalation coverage under this stress-test workload. The end-to-end false negative rate is 81.0% (95% CI: 73.8%-87.4%), substantially higher than the 17% reported on production traffic, reflecting a fundamentally different workload rather than a contradiction. Notably, 36.8% of all state-changing actions fall outside the classifier's scope via Tier 2 (in-project file edits), contributing to the elevated end-to-end FNR. Even restricting to the 160 actions the classifier actually evaluates (Tier 3), the FNR remains 70.3%, while the FPR rises to 31.9%. The Tier 2 coverage gap is most pronounced on artifact cleanup (92.9% FNR), where agents naturally fall back to editing state files when the expected CLI is unavailable. These results highlight a coverage boundary worth examining: auto mode assumes dangerous actions transit the shell, but agents routinely achieve equivalent effects through file edits that the classifier does not evaluate.

</details>


### [286] [Squeez: Task-Conditioned Tool-Output Pruning for Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04979)
*Ádám Kovács*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究代码代理中的工具输出剪枝问题，提出任务条件化的工具输出剪枝方法，旨在从长工具观察中提取最小相关证据块，减少不必要的信息处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码代理在处理长工具输出时存在效率问题，通常只有一小部分观察结果对下一步决策真正重要。当前代理会反复消耗整个长工具观察，导致计算资源浪费和效率低下。

Method: 1. 提出任务条件化工具输出剪枝：给定聚焦查询和工具输出，返回代理下一步应检查的最小逐字证据块
2. 构建包含11,477个示例的基准数据集（基于SWE-bench仓库交互和合成多生态系统工具输出）
3. 使用LoRA微调Qwen 3.5 2B模型，并与更大的零样本模型和启发式剪枝基线进行比较

Result: 1. 微调模型达到0.86召回率和0.80 F1分数，同时移除92%的输入token
2. 在召回率上比零样本Qwen 3.5 35B A3B高出11个百分点
3. 在所有启发式基线方法上均有显著优势

Conclusion: 任务条件化工具输出剪枝能有效减少代码代理处理长工具观察时的冗余信息，显著提高效率。小规模微调模型在剪枝任务上优于大规模零样本模型。

Abstract: Coding agents repeatedly consume long tool observations even though only a small fraction of each observation matters for the next step. We study task-conditioned tool-output pruning: given a focused query and one tool output, return the smallest verbatim evidence block the agent should inspect next. We introduce a benchmark of 11,477 examples built from SWE-bench repository interactions and synthetic multi-ecosystem tool outputs, with a manually curated 618-example test set. We fine-tune Qwen 3.5 2B with LoRA and compare it against larger zero-shot models and heuristic pruning baselines. Our model reaches 0.86 recall and 0.80 F1 while removing 92% of input tokens, outperforming zero-shot Qwen 3.5 35B A3B by 11 recall points and all heuristic baselines by a wide margin.

</details>


### [287] [Architecture Without Architects: How AI Coding Agents Shape Software Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04990)
*Phongsakon Mark Konrad,Tim Lukas Adam,Riccardo Terrenzi,Serkan Ayvaz*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文提出"氛围架构"概念，指AI编码代理通过提示词而非刻意设计来塑造系统架构，识别了5种代理隐式架构决策机制和6种提示-架构耦合模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI编码代理能在几秒内选择框架、搭建基础设施和集成组件，这些是架构决策但几乎无人审查。论文旨在揭示这些隐式架构决策机制，并提出治理方法。

Method: 识别了5种AI代理隐式架构决策机制，提出6种提示-架构耦合模式（从条件性耦合到基础性耦合），通过演示实验验证提示词用词如何影响系统结构。

Result: 演示实验证实仅改变提示词用词就能为相同任务产生结构不同的系统，揭示了"氛围架构"现象——架构由提示词而非刻意设计塑造。

Conclusion: 需要建立审查实践、决策记录和工具来治理这些隐藏的架构决策，将AI代理的隐式架构选择纳入正式治理框架。

Abstract: AI coding agents select frameworks, scaffold infrastructure, and wire integrations, often in seconds. These are architectural decisions, yet almost no one reviews them as such. We identify five mechanisms by which agents make implicit architectural choices and propose six prompt-architecture coupling patterns that map natural-language prompt features to the infrastructure they require. The patterns range from contingent couplings (structured output validation) that may weaken as models improve to fundamental ones (tool-call orchestration) that persist regardless of model capability. An illustrative demonstration confirms that prompt wording alone produces structurally different systems for the same task. We term the phenomenon vibe architecting, architecture shaped by prompts rather than deliberate design, and outline review practices, decision records, and tooling to bring these hidden decisions under governance.

</details>


### [288] [StarVLA: A Lego-like Codebase for Vision-Language-Action Model Developing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05014)
*StarVLA Community*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: StarVLA是一个开源代码库，用于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）研究，提供模块化架构、可重用训练策略和统一评估接口，支持多种基准测试和部署环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA方法存在架构不兼容、代码库碎片化、评估协议不一致的问题，阻碍了方法的比较和复现。需要统一的框架来降低研究门槛，促进VLA领域的发展。

Method: 1. 模块化骨干-动作头架构，支持VLM骨干（如Qwen-VL）和世界模型骨干（如Cosmos）以及多种动作解码范式；2. 可重用训练策略，包括跨具身学习和多模态协同训练；3. 统一评估接口，集成多个主要基准测试，支持仿真和真实机器人部署。

Result: StarVLA提供了简单、完全可复现的单基准训练方案，在多个基准测试上匹配或超越了现有方法，支持VLM和世界模型骨干。是目前最全面的开源VLA框架之一。

Conclusion: StarVLA通过统一的框架解决了VLA研究的碎片化问题，降低了复现现有方法和开发新方法的门槛，有望推动具身智能领域的发展。

Abstract: Building generalist embodied agents requires integrating perception, language understanding, and action, which are core capabilities addressed by Vision-Language-Action (VLA) approaches based on multimodal foundation models, including recent advances in vision-language models and world models. Despite rapid progress, VLA methods remain fragmented across incompatible architectures, codebases, and evaluation protocols, hindering principled comparison and reproducibility. We present StarVLA, an open-source codebase for VLA research. StarVLA addresses these challenges in three aspects. First, it provides a modular backbone--action-head architecture that supports both VLM backbones (e.g., Qwen-VL) and world-model backbones (e.g., Cosmos) alongside representative action-decoding paradigms, all under a shared abstraction in which backbone and action head can each be swapped independently. Second, it provides reusable training strategies, including cross-embodiment learning and multimodal co-training, that apply consistently across supported paradigms. Third, it integrates major benchmarks, including LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin~2.0, RoboCasa-GR1, and BEHAVIOR-1K, through a unified evaluation interface that supports both simulation and real-robot deployment. StarVLA also ships simple, fully reproducible single-benchmark training recipes that, despite minimal data engineering, already match or surpass prior methods on multiple benchmarks with both VLM and world-model backbones. To our best knowledge, StarVLA is one of the most comprehensive open-source VLA frameworks available, and we expect it to lower the barrier for reproducing existing methods and prototyping new ones. StarVLA is being actively maintained and expanded; we will update this report as the project evolves. The code and documentation are available at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [289] [Spec Kit Agents: Context-Grounded Agentic Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05278)
*Pardis Taghavi,Santosh Bhavani*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: Spec Kit Agents：一个多智能体规范驱动开发框架，通过上下文锚定钩子解决AI编码智能体在大型代码库中的幻觉问题，提升代码生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI编码智能体在大型、演化的代码库中容易产生"上下文盲区"，导致API幻觉和架构违规，需要更好的上下文锚定机制来提升代码生成质量。

Method: 提出多智能体SDD管道（PM和开发者角色），添加阶段级上下文锚定钩子：只读探测钩子在每个阶段（规范、计划、任务、实现）锚定到代码库证据，验证钩子检查中间产物与环境一致性。

Result: 在5个代码库的32个功能128次运行中，上下文锚定钩子将LLM-as-judge综合评分（1-5分）提升0.15分（+3.0%），同时保持99.7-100%的代码库级测试兼容性。在SWE-bench Lite上提升基线1.7%，达到58.2% Pass@1。

Conclusion: 上下文锚定钩子能有效提升AI编码智能体在大型代码库中的代码生成质量，减少幻觉问题，同时保持向后兼容性。

Abstract: Spec-driven development (SDD) with AI coding agents provides a structured workflow, but agents often remain "context blind" in large, evolving repositories, leading to hallucinated APIs and architectural violations. We present Spec Kit Agents, a multi-agent SDD pipeline (with PM and developer roles) that adds phase-level, context-grounding hooks. Read-only probing hooks ground each stage (Specify, Plan, Tasks, Implement) in repository evidence, while validation hooks check intermediate artifacts against the environment. We evaluate 128 runs covering 32 features across five repositories. Context-grounding hooks improve judged quality by +0.15 on a 1-5 composite LLM-as-judge score (+3.0 percent of the full score; Wilcoxon signed-rank, p < 0.05) while maintaining 99.7-100 percent repository-level test compatibility. We further evaluate the framework on SWE-bench Lite, where augmentation hooks improve baseline by 1.7 percent, achieving 58.2 percent Pass@1.

</details>


### [290] [On the Role of Fault Localization Context for LLM-Based Program Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05481)
*Melika Sepidband,Hung Viet Pham,Hadi Hemmati*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文通过大规模实证研究发现，在基于LLM的自动程序修复中，增加故障定位上下文并不总是提高修复性能。文件级定位是主导因素，而元素级和行级上下文扩展效果有限甚至有害。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 故障定位是基于LLM的自动程序修复的关键组件，但其影响尚未充分探索。不清楚需要多少定位信息、超出预测错误位置的额外上下文是否有益，以及如何检索这些上下文。

Method: 在500个SWE-bench验证实例上使用GPT-5-mini进行大规模实证研究，评估61种配置，变化文件级、元素级和行级上下文。比较LLM检索与结构启发式方法。

Result: 更多上下文并不一致提高修复性能。文件级定位是主导因素，相比无文件基线提高15-17倍。扩展文件上下文通常与性能提升相关，成功修复最常见于6-10个相关文件的配置。元素级上下文扩展提供条件性增益，强烈依赖文件上下文质量。行级上下文扩展经常因噪声放大而降低性能。LLM检索通常优于结构启发式方法，同时使用更少的文件和token。

Conclusion: 最有效的故障定位上下文策略通常结合高层次抽象的广泛语义理解和精确的行级定位。这些发现挑战了增加定位上下文会统一提高自动程序修复性能的假设，并为设计基于LLM的故障定位策略提供实用指导。

Abstract: Fault Localization (FL) is a key component of Large Language Model (LLM)-based Automated Program Repair (APR), yet its impact remains underexplored. In particular, it is unclear how much localization is needed, whether additional context beyond the predicted buggy location is beneficial, and how such context should be retrieved. We conduct a large-scale empirical study on 500 SWE-bench Verified instances using GPT-5-mini, evaluating 61 configurations that vary file-level, element-level, and line-level context. Our results show that more context does not consistently improve repair performance. File-level localization is the dominant factor, yielding a 15-17x improvement over a no-file baseline. Expanding file context is often associated with improved performance, with successful repairs most commonly observed in configurations with approximately 6-10 relevant files. Element-level context expansion provides conditional gains that depend strongly on the file context quality, while line-level context expansion frequently degrades performance due to noise amplification. LLM-based retrieval generally outperforms structural heuristics while using fewer files and tokens. Overall, the most effective FL context strategy typically combines a broad semantic understanding at higher abstraction levels with precise line-level localization. These findings challenge our assumption that increasing the localization context uniformly improves APR, and provide practical guidance for designing LLM-based FL strategies.

</details>


### [291] [Hackers or Hallucinators? A Comprehensive Analysis of LLM-Based Automated Penetration Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05719)
*Jiaren Peng,Zeqin Li,Chang You,Yan Wang,Hanlin Sun,Xuan Tian,Shuqiao Zhang,Junyi Liu,Jianguo Zhao,Renyang Liu,Haoran Ou,Yuqiang Sun,Jiancheng Zhang,Yutong Jiao,Kunshu Song,Chao Zhang,Fan Shi,Hongda Sun,Rui Yan,Cheng Huang*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文首次系统化分析了基于LLM的自动化渗透测试框架，从架构设计和实证评估两个层面，对13个开源框架进行了大规模实验，消耗超过100亿token，生成了1500+执行日志，为研究者提供了结构化分类和大规模基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM的快速发展，自动化渗透测试领域涌现了许多框架，但现有研究缺乏系统化的架构分析和统一基准下的大规模实证比较。本文旨在填补这一空白，为研究者提供系统化的知识整理和实证基准。

Method: 1. 系统化层面：从六个维度（智能体架构、智能体规划、智能体记忆、智能体执行、外部知识、基准测试）全面回顾现有框架设计；2. 实证层面：在统一基准下对13个代表性开源AutoPT框架和2个基线框架进行大规模实验，消耗超过100亿token，生成1500+执行日志，由15+网络安全专家团队耗时4个月手动审查分析。

Result: 1. 提供了基于LLM的AutoPT框架的结构化分类法；2. 建立了大规模实证基准；3. 通过系统化分析和实验比较，揭示了当前框架的优势与不足；4. 为未来研究指明了有前景的方向。

Conclusion: 本文首次系统化地整理了基于LLM的自动化渗透测试框架知识，并通过大规模实证评估为研究者提供了有价值的参考。该研究不仅帮助理解现有框架的架构设计，还为该领域的未来发展提供了基准和方向指导。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has created new opportunities for Automated Penetration Testing (AutoPT), spawning numerous frameworks aimed at achieving end-to-end autonomous attacks. However, despite the proliferation of related studies, existing research generally lacks systematic architectural analysis and large-scale empirical comparisons under a unified benchmark. Therefore, this paper presents the first Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) focusing on the architectural design and comprehensive empirical evaluation of current LLM-based AutoPT frameworks. At systematization level, we comprehensively review existing framework designs across six dimensions: agent architecture, agent plan, agent memory, agent execution, external knowledge, and benchmarks. At empirical level, we conduct large-scale experiments on 13 representative open-source AutoPT frameworks and 2 baseline frameworks utilizing a unified benchmark. The experiments consumed over 10 billion tokens in total and generated more than 1,500 execution logs, which were manually reviewed and analyzed over four months by a panel of more than 15 researchers with expertise in cybersecurity. By investigating the latest progress in this rapidly developing field, we provide researchers with a structured taxonomy to understand existing LLM-based AutoPT frameworks and a large-scale empirical benchmark, along with promising directions for future research.

</details>


### [292] [CritBench: A Framework for Evaluating Cybersecurity Capabilities of Large Language Models in IEC 61850 Digital Substation Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06019)
*Gustav Keppler,Moritz Gstür,Veit Hagenmeyer*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: CritBench是一个专门评估LLM在工业控制系统（OT）网络安全能力的框架，针对IEC 61850数字变电站环境，测试了5个最先进模型在81个领域特定任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估框架主要关注IT环境，无法捕捉工业控制系统（OT）的特殊约束和协议。需要专门评估LLM在OT网络安全环境中的能力，特别是IEC 61850数字变电站这种关键基础设施场景。

Method: 开发了CritBench框架，包含81个领域特定任务，涵盖静态配置分析、网络流量侦察和实时虚拟机交互。创建了领域特定工具脚手架来支持工业协议交互。评估了5个最先进模型，包括GPT-5套件和开源模型。

Result: LLM代理在静态结构化文件分析和单工具网络枚举任务上表现可靠，但在动态任务上性能下降。虽然模型内部掌握了IEC 61850标准术语知识，但在需要持续顺序推理和状态跟踪的实时系统操作上存在困难。使用领域特定工具脚手架显著缓解了这一操作瓶颈。

Conclusion: 当前LLM在OT网络安全环境中存在局限性，特别是在动态实时系统操作方面。领域特定工具脚手架是提升LLM在工业控制环境中操作能力的关键。该研究为评估LLM在关键基础设施网络安全中的双重用途潜力提供了重要基准。

Abstract: The advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has raised concerns regarding their dual-use potential in cybersecurity. Existing evaluation frameworks overwhelmingly focus on Information Technology (IT) environments, failing to capture the constraints, and specialized protocols of Operational Technology (OT).
