To address this gap, we introduce CritBench, a novel framework designed to evaluate the cybersecurity capabilities of LLM agents within IEC 61850 Digital Substation environments. We assess five state-of-the-art models, including OpenAI's GPT-5 suite and open-weight models, across a corpus of 81 domain-specific tasks spanning static configuration analysis, network traffic reconnaissance, and live virtual machine interaction. To facilitate industrial protocol interaction, we develop a domain-specific tool scaffold. Our empirical results show that agents reliably execute static structured-file analysis and single-tool network enumeration, but their performance degrades on dynamic tasks. Despite demonstrating explicit, internalized knowledge of the IEC 61850 standards terminology, current models struggle with the persistent sequential reasoning and state tracking required to manipulate live systems without specialized tools. Equipping agents with our domain-specific tool scaffold significantly mitigates this operational bottleneck. Code and evaluation scripts are available at: https://github.com/GKeppler/CritBench

</details>


### [293] [LLM4CodeRE: Generative AI for Code Decompilation Analysis and Reverse Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06095)
*Hamed Jelodar,Samita Bai,Tochukwu Emmanuel Nwankwo,Parisa Hamedi,Mohammad Meymani,Roozbeh Razavi-Far,Ali A. Ghorbani*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: LLM4CodeRE：一个面向恶意软件逆向工程的领域自适应LLM框架，支持汇编到源代码的反编译和源代码到汇编的双向翻译


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在代码反编译分析中主要依赖通用代码预训练，缺乏对恶意软件的专门适应。恶意软件广泛使用混淆技术，使得代码反编译成为逆向工程中的基础性挑战任务。

Method: 提出LLM4CodeRE框架，采用两种互补的微调策略：1）多适配器方法用于任务特定的语法和语义对齐；2）序列到序列统一方法使用任务条件前缀来强制执行端到端生成约束

Result: 实验结果表明LLM4CodeRE优于现有的反编译工具和通用代码模型，实现了鲁棒的双向泛化能力

Conclusion: 该框架为恶意软件逆向工程提供了有效的领域自适应解决方案，支持双向代码逆向工程任务

Abstract: Code decompilation analysis is a fundamental yet challenging task in malware reverse engineering, particularly due to the pervasive use of sophisticated obfuscation techniques. Although recent large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in translating low-level representations into high-level source code, most existing approaches rely on generic code pretraining and lack adaptation to malicious software. We propose LLM4CodeRE, a domain-adaptive LLM framework for bidirectional code reverse engineering that supports both assembly-to-source decompilation and source-to-assembly translation within a unified model. To enable effective task adaptation, we introduce two complementary fine-tuning strategies: (i) a Multi-Adapter approach for task-specific syntactic and semantic alignment, and (ii) a Seq2Seq Unified approach using task-conditioned prefixes to enforce end-to-end generation constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that LLM4CodeRE outperforms existing decompilation tools and general-purpose code models, achieving robust bidirectional generalization.

</details>


### [294] [MMORF: A Multi-agent Framework for Designing Multi-objective Retrosynthesis Planning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05075)
*Frazier N. Baker,Trieu Nguyen,Reza Averly,Botao Yu,Daniel Adu-Ampratwum,Huan Sun,Xia Ning*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: MMORF是一个用于多目标逆合成规划的模块化多智能体系统框架，通过可组合的智能体组件支持不同系统设计，在安全性和成本指标上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多目标逆合成规划需要动态平衡质量、安全性和成本等多个目标，传统方法难以有效整合这些目标。基于语言模型的多智能体系统通过专业智能体的交互为这一问题提供了有前景的解决方案。

Method: 提出了MMORF框架，包含模块化的智能体组件，可以灵活组合和配置成不同的多智能体系统。使用该框架构建了两个代表性系统：MASIL和RFAS，并在包含218个多目标逆合成规划任务的新基准上进行了评估。

Result: MASIL在软约束任务上实现了强大的安全性和成本指标，经常帕累托支配基线路线；RFAS在硬约束任务上达到了48.6%的成功率，优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: MMORF作为探索多目标逆合成规划多智能体系统的基础框架是有效的，为系统设计提供了模块化和可配置的方法。

Abstract: Multi-objective retrosynthesis planning is a critical chemistry task requiring dynamic balancing of quality, safety, and cost objectives. Language model-based multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a promising approach for this task: leveraging interactions of specialized agents to incorporate multiple objectives into retrosynthesis planning. We present MMORF, a framework for constructing MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. MMORF features modular agentic components, which can be flexibly combined and configured into different systems, enabling principled evaluation and comparison of different system designs. Using MMORF, we construct two representative MAS: MASIL and RFAS. On a newly curated benchmark consisting of 218 multi-objective retrosynthesis planning tasks, MASIL achieves strong safety and cost metrics on soft-constraint tasks, frequently Pareto-dominating baseline routes, while RFAS achieves a 48.6% success rate on hard-constraint tasks, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Together, these results show the effectiveness of MMORF as a foundational framework for exploring MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MMORF/.

</details>


### [295] [IntentScore: Intent-Conditioned Action Evaluation for Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05157)
*Rongqian Chen,Yu Li,Zeyu Fang,Sizhe Tang,Weidong Cao,Tian Lan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: IntentScore是一个计划感知的奖励模型，通过学习离线GUI交互轨迹来评估计算机使用代理的动作质量，提高任务成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算机使用代理（CUAs）在桌面环境中执行GUI操作时，缺乏对动作质量的评估机制，导致不可逆错误在后续步骤中传播。需要一种能够评估动作质量的方法来减少错误。

Method: 提出IntentScore计划感知奖励模型，从三个操作系统的398K离线GUI交互步骤中学习。采用两种互补的训练目标：状态-动作相关性的对比对齐和动作正确性的边际排序。在架构上，将每个候选动作的规划意图嵌入到动作编码器中，以区分具有相似动作但不同推理的候选动作。

Result: 在保留评估集上达到97.5%的成对判别准确率。在训练期间完全未见过的OSWorld环境中，作为Agent S3的重新排序器，将任务成功率提高了6.9个百分点。

Conclusion: 从异构离线轨迹学习的奖励估计能够泛化到未见过的代理和任务分布，验证了离线学习方法的有效性。

Abstract: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) leverage large language models to execute GUI operations on desktop environments, yet they generate actions without evaluating action quality, leading to irreversible errors that cascade through subsequent steps. We propose IntentScore, a plan-aware reward model that learns to score candidate actions from 398K offline GUI interaction steps spanning three operating systems. IntentScore trains with two complementary objectives: contrastive alignment for state-action relevance and margin ranking for action correctness. Architecturally, it embeds each candidate's planning intent in the action encoder, enabling discrimination between candidates with similar actions but different rationales. IntentScore achieves 97.5% pairwise discrimination accuracy on held-out evaluation. Deployed as a re-ranker for Agent S3 on OSWorld, an environment entirely unseen during training, IntentScore improves task success rate by 6.9 points, demonstrating that reward estimation learned from heterogeneous offline trajectories generalizes to unseen agents and task distributions.

</details>


### [296] [Dynamic Agentic AI Expert Profiler System Architecture for Multidomain Intelligence Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05345)
*Aisvarya Adeseye,Jouni Isoaho,Seppo Virtanen,Mohammad Tahir*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个基于LLaMA v3.1的AI能力评测系统，通过自然语言响应将用户分为四个专业等级（新手、基础、高级、专家），在静态和动态测试中与用户自评的匹配率达到83%-97%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在AI驱动的现代系统中，需要根据用户背景和技能水平进行有意义的交互。系统必须能够感知上下文和用户专业水平，以实现有效的人机交互。

Method: 使用基于LLaMA v3.1（8B）的模块化分层架构，包含文本预处理、评分、聚合和分类组件。评估分为两个阶段：静态阶段使用82名参与者的预录文本，动态阶段通过AI面试官进行402次实时访谈。

Result: 在不同领域中，评测系统的评估与参与者自评的匹配率为83%到97%。剩余差异主要源于自评偏差、回答不清晰以及语言模型偶尔对细微专业水平的误解。

Conclusion: 提出的AI能力评测系统能够有效评估用户专业水平，为人机交互中的个性化适应提供了可行方案。系统在动态评估中表现出色，能够实时调整对用户专业水平的判断。

Abstract: In today's artificial intelligence driven world, modern systems communicate with people from diverse backgrounds and skill levels. For human-machine interaction to be meaningful, systems must be aware of context and user expertise. This study proposes an agentic AI profiler that classifies natural language responses into four levels: Novice, Basic, Advanced, and Expert. The system uses a modular layered architecture built on LLaMA v3.1 (8B), with components for text preprocessing, scoring, aggregation, and classification. Evaluation was conducted in two phases: a static phase using pre-recorded transcripts from 82 participants, and a dynamic phase with 402 live interviews conducted by an agentic AI interviewer. In both phases, participant self-ratings were compared with profiler predictions. In the dynamic phase, expertise was assessed after each response rather than at the end of the interview. Across domains, 83% to 97% of profiler evaluations matched participant self-assessments. Remaining differences were due to self-rating bias, unclear responses, and occasional misinterpretation of nuanced expertise by the language model.

</details>


### [297] [TFRBench: A Reasoning Benchmark for Evaluating Forecasting Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05364)
*Md Atik Ahamed,Mihir Parmar,Palash Goyal,Yiwen Song,Long T. Le,Qiang Cheng,Chun-Liang Li,Hamid Palangi,Jinsung Yoon,Tomas Pfister*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: TFRBench是首个评估预测系统推理能力的基准，通过多智能体框架生成数值基础的推理轨迹，用于评估跨通道依赖、趋势和外部事件分析，显著提升LLM预测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统时间序列预测仅评估数值精度，将基础模型视为"黑箱"。需要建立能够评估预测系统推理能力的基准，以提供更可解释的评估标准。

Method: 提出系统性多智能体框架，利用迭代验证循环合成数值基础的推理轨迹。涵盖5个领域的10个数据集，评估跨通道依赖、趋势和外部事件分析。

Result: 生成的推理轨迹具有因果有效性，对评估有用。使用这些轨迹提示LLM可将预测准确率从平均40.2%提升至56.6%。现成LLM在推理和数值预测方面都表现不佳。

Conclusion: TFRBench为时间序列预测建立了新的可解释、基于推理的评估标准，揭示了LLM在领域特定动态捕捉方面的局限性。

Abstract: We introduce TFRBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of forecasting systems. Traditionally, time-series forecasting has been evaluated solely on numerical accuracy, treating foundation models as ``black boxes.'' Unlike existing benchmarks, TFRBench provides a protocol for evaluating the reasoning generated by forecasting systems--specifically their analysis of cross-channel dependencies, trends, and external events. To enable this, we propose a systematic multi-agent framework that utilizes an iterative verification loop to synthesize numerically grounded reasoning traces. Spanning ten datasets across five domains, our evaluation confirms that this reasoning is causally effective; useful for evaluation; and prompting LLMs with our generated traces significantly improves forecasting accuracy compared to direct numerical prediction (e.g., avg. $\sim40.2\%\to56.6\%)$, validating the quality of our reasoning. Conversely, benchmarking experiments reveal that off-the-shelf LLMs consistently struggle with both reasoning (lower LLM-as-a-Judge scores) and numerical forecasting, frequently failing to capture domain-specific dynamics. TFRBench thus establishes a new standard for interpretable, reasoning-based evaluation in time-series forecasting. Our benchmark is available at: https://tfrbench.github.io

</details>


### [298] [LLM-as-Judge for Semantic Judging of Powerline Segmentation in UAV Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05371)
*Akram Hossain,Rabab Abdelfattah,Xiaofeng Wang,Kareem Abdelfatah*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 使用大语言模型作为语义裁判评估无人机电力线分割结果的可靠性，通过重复性和感知敏感性测试验证其作为监控分割质量的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机电力线巡检中，轻量级分割模型在真实环境中的性能可能不可靠，存在安全隐患。需要一种方法来评估分割结果的可靠性，确保安全关键任务的可信度。

Method: 提出"看门狗"场景，让离线LLM评估分割叠加图像。设计两个评估协议：1) 重复性测试：固定输入和提示下多次查询LLM，测量质量分数和置信度估计的稳定性；2) 感知敏感性测试：引入受控视觉干扰（雾、雨、雪、阴影、阳光耀斑），分析LLM输出对分割质量逐渐退化的响应。

Result: LLM在相同条件下产生高度一致的分类判断，同时随着视觉可靠性下降，置信度适当降低。即使在挑战性条件下，裁判仍能响应缺失或错误识别的电力线等感知线索。

Conclusion: 当受到适当约束时，LLM可以作为安全关键空中巡检任务中监控分割质量的可靠语义裁判。

Abstract: The deployment of lightweight segmentation models on drones for autonomous power line inspection presents a critical challenge: maintaining reliable performance under real-world conditions that differ from training data. Although compact architectures such as U-Net enable real-time onboard inference, their segmentation outputs can degrade unpredictably in adverse environments, raising safety concerns. In this work, we study the feasibility of using a large language model (LLM) as a semantic judge to assess the reliability of power line segmentation results produced by drone-mounted models. Rather than introducing a new inspection system, we formalize a watchdog scenario in which an offboard LLM evaluates segmentation overlays and examine whether such a judge can be trusted to behave consistently and perceptually coherently. To this end, we design two evaluation protocols that analyze the judge's repeatability and sensitivity. First, we assess repeatability by repeatedly querying the LLM with identical inputs and fixed prompts, measuring the stability of its quality scores and confidence estimates. Second, we evaluate perceptual sensitivity by introducing controlled visual corruptions (fog, rain, snow, shadow, and sunflare) and analyzing how the judge's outputs respond to progressive degradation in segmentation quality. Our results show that the LLM produces highly consistent categorical judgments under identical conditions while exhibiting appropriate declines in confidence as visual reliability deteriorates. Moreover, the judge remains responsive to perceptual cues such as missing or misidentified power lines, even under challenging conditions. These findings suggest that, when carefully constrained, an LLM can serve as a reliable semantic judge for monitoring segmentation quality in safety-critical aerial inspection tasks.

</details>


### [299] [Automated Auditing of Hospital Discharge Summaries for Care Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05435)
*Akshat Dasula,Prasanna Desikan,Jaideep Srivastava*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出基于本地部署大语言模型的自动化出院小结审计框架，用于大规模检查医疗文档完整性，减少护理碎片化和再入院风险


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 出院文档不完整或不一致是导致护理碎片化和可避免再入院的主要原因。目前审计主要依赖人工审查，难以规模化，需要自动化解决方案来提升患者安全和文档质量。

Method: 基于DISCHARGED框架将核心过渡护理要求（随访说明、用药历史、患者信息等）转化为结构化验证检查清单问题。使用MIMIC-IV数据库的成人住院总结，通过隐私保护的大语言模型识别关键文档元素的存在、缺失或模糊性。

Result: 证明了可扩展的自动化临床审计的可行性，为电子健康记录文档的系统性质量改进提供了基础。展示了LLM在医疗文档审计中的实际应用潜力。

Conclusion: 本地部署的LLM可以有效地自动化审计出院小结，支持大规模质量改进。该方法为临床文档的标准化和完整性检查提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Incomplete or inconsistent discharge documentation is a primary driver of care fragmentation and avoidable readmissions. Despite its critical role in patient safety, auditing discharge summaries relies heavily on manual review and is difficult to scale. We propose an automated framework for large-scale auditing of discharge summaries using locally deployed Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach operationalizes core transition-of-care requirements such as follow-up instructions, medication history and changes, patient information and clinical course, etc. into a structured validation checklist of questions based on DISCHARGED framework. Using adult inpatient summaries from the MIMIC-IV database, we utilize a privacy-preserving LLM to identify the presence, absence, or ambiguity of key documentation elements. This work demonstrates the feasibility of scalable, automated clinical auditing and provides a foundation for systematic quality improvement in electronic health record documentation.

</details>


### [300] [Joint Knowledge Base Completion and Question Answering by Combining Large Language Models and Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05875)
*Yinan Liu,Dongying Lin,Sigang Luo,Xiaochun Yang,Bin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: JCQL是一个结合大型语言模型（LLM）和小型语言模型（SLM）的联合知识库补全（KBC）与知识库问答（KBQA）框架，通过迭代方式让两个任务相互增强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常依赖小型语言模型（SLM）来联合增强KBC和KBQA，而忽略了大型语言模型（LLM）的强大推理能力。KBC和KBQA是密切相关的知识库任务，具有内在互补性，联合解决这两个任务可以让它们相互促进。

Method: 提出JCQL框架，结合LLM和SLM的优势：1）让KBC增强KBQA：将SLM训练的KBC模型作为LLM智能体的一个动作，增强基于LLM智能体的KBQA模型的推理路径，减轻LLM的幻觉和高计算成本问题；2）让KBQA增强KBC：利用KBQA的推理路径作为补充训练数据，增量微调KBC模型，提升SLM在KBC中的能力。

Result: 在两个公共基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，JCQL在KBC和KBQA任务上都超越了所有基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过结合LLM和SLM的优势，JCQL框架能够以迭代方式让KBC和KBQA任务相互增强，有效解决了现有方法忽略LLM推理能力的问题。

Abstract: Knowledge Bases (KBs) play a key role in various applications. As two representative KB-related tasks, knowledge base completion (KBC) and knowledge base question answering (KBQA) are closely related and inherently complementary with each other. Thus, it will be beneficial to solve the task of joint KBC and KBQA to make them reinforce each other. However, existing studies usually rely on the small language model (SLM) to enhance them jointly, and the large language model (LLM)'s strong reasoning ability is ignored. In this paper, by combining the strengths of the LLM with the SLM, we propose a novel framework JCQL, which can make these two tasks enhance each other in an iterative manner. To make KBC enhance KBQA, we augment the LLM agent-based KBQA model's reasoning paths by incorporating an SLM-trained KBC model as an action of the agent, alleviating the LLM's hallucination and high computational costs issue in KBQA. To make KBQA enhance KBC, we incrementally fine-tune the KBC model by leveraging KBQA's reasoning paths as its supplementary training data, improving the ability of the SLM in KBC. Extensive experiments over two public benchmark data sets demonstrate that JCQL surpasses all baselines for both KBC and KBQA tasks.

</details>


### [301] [Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05952)
*Yi Yuan,Xuhong Wang,Shanzhe Lei*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合渐进置信度估计与校准的深度研究智能体，用于生成可信赖的研究报告，通过深思熟虑的搜索模型和多跳推理来验证证据并分配置信度分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于智能体的研究系统能够自动生成跨领域的研究报告，但现有评估框架主要基于主观维度，无法有效衡量报告的可信度。在开放研究场景中，由于缺乏真实答案，现有方法难以评估生成内容的认知置信度，导致校准困难，用户容易受到误导或幻觉信息的影响。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的深度研究智能体，在报告生成流程中整合了渐进置信度估计与校准。系统采用深思熟虑的搜索模型，结合深度检索和多跳推理，将输出基于可验证的证据，并为每个主张分配置信度分数。通过精心设计的工作流程，生成具有增强透明度的可信报告。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著提高了可解释性，并大幅增强了用户信任度。案例研究证实了系统在生成可信赖研究报告方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过整合置信度估计与校准机制，该深度研究智能体能够生成更可信赖的研究报告，解决了现有评估框架在衡量报告可信度方面的不足，为开放研究场景中的信息合成提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: As agent-based systems continue to evolve, deep research agents are capable of automatically generating research-style reports across diverse domains. While these agents promise to streamline information synthesis and knowledge exploration, existing evaluation frameworks-typically based on subjective dimensions-fail to capture a critical aspect of report quality: trustworthiness. In open-ended research scenarios where ground-truth answers are unavailable, current evaluation methods cannot effectively measure the epistemic confidence of generated content, making calibration difficult and leaving users susceptible to misleading or hallucinated information. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research agent that incorporates progressive confidence estimation and calibration within the report generation pipeline. Our system leverages a deliberative search model, featuring deep retrieval and multi-hop reasoning to ground outputs in verifiable evidence while assigning confidence scores to individual claims. Combined with a carefully designed workflow, this approach produces trustworthy reports with enhanced transparency. Experimental results and case studies demonstrate that our method substantially improves interpretability and significantly increases user trust.

</details>


### [302] [Artificial Intelligence and the Structure of Mathematics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06107)
*Maissam Barkeshli,Michael R. Douglas,Michael H. Freedman*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文探讨AI如何通过分析形式证明的全局结构来理解数学的本质，提出使用AI探索数学的柏拉图世界，并讨论数学是发现还是发明的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI在数学领域的进展有望解决重大开放问题并自主发现新数学概念。本文旨在探索AI如何通过分析形式证明的全局结构，提供理解数学本质的新途径，这不同于传统的数理逻辑方法。

Method: 1. 提出使用通用证明和结构超图来描述数学的形式结构；2. 制定AI模型实现自动化数学发现所需满足的标准；3. 设想派遣AI代理探索数学的柏拉图世界来分析数学的整体结构。

Result: 论文提出了一个理论框架，但尚未展示具体实验结果。主要贡献在于概念性框架：1. 形式化数学结构的描述方法；2. AI自动化数学发现的标准；3. 探索数学柏拉图世界的愿景。

Conclusion: AI有望通过分析形式证明的全局结构，为我们理解数学本质提供新视角。AI代理探索数学柏拉图世界可能揭示数学是发现还是发明的古老问题，并帮助我们理解适合人类认知的数学结构。

Abstract: Recent progress in artificial intelligence (AI) is unlocking transformative capabilities for mathematics. There is great hope that AI will help solve major open problems and autonomously discover new mathematical concepts. In this essay, we further consider how AI may open a grand perspective on mathematics by forging a new route, complementary to mathematical\textbf{ logic,} to understanding the global structure of formal \textbf{proof}\textbf{s}. We begin by providing a sketch of the formal structure of mathematics in terms of universal proof and structural hypergraphs and discuss questions this raises about the foundational structure of mathematics. We then outline the main ingredients and provide a set of criteria to be satisfied for AI models capable of automated mathematical discovery. As we send AI agents to traverse Platonic mathematical worlds, we expect they will teach us about the nature of mathematics: both as a whole, and the small ribbons conducive to human understanding. Perhaps they will shed light on the old question: "Is mathematics discovered or invented?" Can we grok the terrain of these \textbf{Platonic worlds}?

</details>


### [303] [Offline RL for Adaptive Policy Retrieval in Prior Authorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05125)
*Ruslan Sharifullin,Maxim Gorshkov,Hannah Clay*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于医疗先授权政策检索的序列决策方法，将自适应检索建模为马尔可夫决策过程，使用离线强化学习训练智能体在准确性和检索成本之间进行权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索增强系统使用固定的top-K策略进行政策检索，这种方法效率低下且可能检索到无关或不足的信息。医疗先授权需要解释复杂且分散的覆盖政策，因此需要更智能的自适应检索方法。

Method: 将政策检索建模为马尔可夫决策过程，智能体迭代地从top-K候选集中选择政策块或停止并做出决策。使用离线强化学习方法（CQL、IQL、DPO）在从基线检索策略生成的日志轨迹上进行训练，奖励函数平衡决策正确性和检索成本。

Result: 在包含10个CMS程序的186个政策块语料库上，CQL达到92%决策准确率（比最佳固定K基线提高30个百分点），IQL使用44%更少的检索步骤达到相同准确率，DPO在保持92%准确率的同时使用47%更少的检索步骤（10.6 vs 20.0）。

Conclusion: 自适应检索策略在医疗先授权政策检索中显著优于固定检索方法，离线强化学习方法能够有效学习在准确性和效率之间权衡的智能检索策略，其中DPO方法在Pareto前沿上占据"选择性-准确"区域。

Abstract: Prior authorization (PA) requires interpretation of complex and fragmented coverage policies, yet existing retrieval-augmented systems rely on static top-$K$ strategies with fixed numbers of retrieved sections. Such fixed retrieval can be inefficient and gather irrelevant or insufficient information. We model policy retrieval for PA as a sequential decision-making problem, formulating adaptive retrieval as a Markov Decision Process (MDP). In our system, an agent iteratively selects policy chunks from a top-$K$ candidate set or chooses to stop and issue a decision. The reward balances decision correctness against retrieval cost, capturing the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. We train policies using Conservative Q-Learning (CQL), Implicit Q-Learning (IQL), and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) in an offline RL setting on logged trajectories generated from baseline retrieval strategies over synthetic PA requests derived from publicly available CMS coverage data. On a corpus of 186 policy chunks spanning 10 CMS procedures, CQL achieves 92% decision accuracy (+30 percentage points over the best fixed-$K$ baseline) via exhaustive retrieval, while IQL matches the best baseline accuracy using 44% fewer retrieval steps and achieves the only positive episodic return among all policies. Transition-level DPO matches CQL's 92% accuracy while using 47% fewer retrieval steps (10.6 vs. 20.0), occupying a "selective-accurate" region on the Pareto frontier that dominates both CQL and BC. A behavioral cloning baseline matches CQL, confirming that advantage-weighted or preference-based policy extraction is needed to learn selective retrieval. Lambda ablation over step costs $λ\in \{0.05, 0.1, 0.2\}$ reveals a clear accuracy-efficiency inflection: only at $λ= 0.2$ does CQL transition from exhaustive to selective retrieval.

</details>


### [304] [RoboPlayground: Democratizing Robotic Evaluation through Structured Physical Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05226)
*Yi Ru Wang,Carter Ung,Evan Gubarev,Christopher Tan,Siddhartha Srinivasa,Dieter Fox*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: RoboPlayground：一个语言驱动的机器人操作评估框架，让用户能用自然语言创建可执行的任务规范，支持语义和行为变化，相比固定基准测试能揭示更多泛化失败


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人操作系统的评估主要依赖少数专家设计的固定基准测试，任务实例、约束和成功标准都预先定义且难以扩展。这种范式限制了评估的参与范围，也掩盖了策略对用户定义的任务意图、约束和成功概念的响应能力

Method: 提出RoboPlayground框架，让用户能在结构化物理领域中使用自然语言编写可执行的机器人操作任务。自然语言指令被编译成可复现的任务规范，包含明确的资产定义、初始化分布和成功谓词。每个指令定义了一个结构化的相关任务族，支持受控的语义和行为变化，同时保持可执行性和可比性

Result: 1) 用户研究表明，语言驱动界面比基于编程和代码辅助的基线更易用且认知负荷更低；2) 在语言定义的任务族上评估学习策略，揭示了固定基准测试中不明显的泛化失败；3) 任务多样性随贡献者多样性而非任务数量而扩展，支持通过众包贡献持续增长评估空间

Conclusion: 评估现代机器人操作策略需要将评估重构为结构化物理领域上的语言驱动过程。RoboPlayground框架通过自然语言接口使评估更加可访问和可扩展，能够揭示传统基准测试中隐藏的泛化问题，并支持通过多样化贡献持续扩展评估空间

Abstract: Evaluation of robotic manipulation systems has largely relied on fixed benchmarks authored by a small number of experts, where task instances, constraints, and success criteria are predefined and difficult to extend. This paradigm limits who can shape evaluation and obscures how policies respond to user-authored variations in task intent, constraints, and notions of success. We argue that evaluating modern manipulation policies requires reframing evaluation as a language-driven process over structured physical domains. We present RoboPlayground, a framework that enables users to author executable manipulation tasks using natural language within a structured physical domain. Natural language instructions are compiled into reproducible task specifications with explicit asset definitions, initialization distributions, and success predicates. Each instruction defines a structured family of related tasks, enabling controlled semantic and behavioral variation while preserving executability and comparability. We instantiate RoboPlayground in a structured block manipulation domain and evaluate it along three axes. A user study shows that the language-driven interface is easier to use and imposes lower cognitive workload than programming-based and code-assist baselines. Evaluating learned policies on language-defined task families reveals generalization failures that are not apparent under fixed benchmark evaluations. Finally, we show that task diversity scales with contributor diversity rather than task count alone, enabling evaluation spaces to grow continuously through crowd-authored contributions. Project Page: https://roboplayground.github.io

</details>


### [305] [SUMMIR: A Hallucination-Aware Framework for Ranking Sports Insights from LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04947)
*Nitish Kumar,Sannu Kumar,S Akash,Manish Gupta,Ankith Karat,Sriparna Saha*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个从体育新闻文章中自动提取赛前赛后洞察的系统，使用LLMs生成洞察，并通过FactScore和SummaC评估事实准确性，最后提出SUMMIR架构根据用户兴趣对洞察进行排序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着在线体育新闻的快速增长，需要从文章中提取有意义的赛前赛后洞察来增强用户参与度和理解。当前缺乏自动提取高质量体育洞察的可靠框架。

Method: 1) 构建包含7,900篇新闻文章的数据集，覆盖4种主要体育项目；2) 使用两步验证流程确保上下文相关性；3) 采用多种先进LLMs生成洞察；4) 使用FactScore方法评估事实准确性，SummaC框架检测幻觉；5) 提出SUMMIR架构根据用户兴趣对洞察进行排序。

Result: 成功生成了高质量、相关的洞察，揭示了不同LLMs在事实一致性和趣味性方面的显著差异。SUMMIR能够有效根据用户特定兴趣对洞察进行排序。

Conclusion: 该工作为从体育新闻内容中自动生成可靠洞察提供了一个稳健的框架，在LLM评估和个性化信息提取方面做出了贡献。

Abstract: With the rapid proliferation of online sports journalism, extracting meaningful pre-game and post-game insights from articles is essential for enhancing user engagement and comprehension. In this paper, we address the task of automatically extracting such insights from articles published before and after matches. We curate a dataset of 7,900 news articles covering 800 matches across four major sports: Cricket, Soccer, Basketball, and Baseball. To ensure contextual relevance, we employ a two-step validation pipeline leveraging both open-source and proprietary large language models (LLMs). We then utilize multiple state-of-the-art LLMs (GPT-4o, Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct, Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, and Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1) to generate comprehensive insights. The factual accuracy of these outputs is rigorously assessed using a FactScore-based methodology, complemented by hallucination detection via the SummaC (Summary Consistency) framework with GPT-4o. Finally, we propose SUMMIR (Sentence Unified Multimetric Model for Importance Ranking), a novel architecture designed to rank insights based on user-specific interests. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach in generating high-quality, relevant insights, while also revealing significant differences in factual consistency and interestingness across LLMs. This work contributes a robust framework for automated, reliable insight generation from sports news content. The source code is availble here https://github.com/nitish-iitp/SUMMIR.

</details>


### [306] [Bridging Natural Language and Microgrid Dynamics: A Context-Aware Simulator and Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05429)
*Tinko Sebastian Bartels,Ruixiang Wu,Xinyu Lu,Yikai Lu,Fanzeng Xia,Haoxiang Yang,Yue Chen,Tongxin Li*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: OpenCEM是一个开源数字孪生平台，集成了丰富的非结构化上下文信息与可再生能源动态，用于开发基于大语言模型的智能能源管理系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统能源管理主要依赖数值时间序列，忽略了人类生成上下文（如事件安排、系统日志、用户意图）中的预测能力。需要将丰富的非结构化上下文信息与定量可再生能源动态相结合。

Method: 开发了OpenCEM模拟器和数据集：包含来自真实世界光伏-电池微电网安装的精心对齐、语言丰富的数据集，以及能够原生处理这种多模态上下文的模块化模拟器。采用基于组件的架构和混合数据驱动与物理建模能力。

Result: 创建了首个开源数字孪生平台，专门用于集成上下文信息与能源动态。通过实际示例展示了其效用，包括上下文感知负载预测和在线最优电池充电控制策略的实现。

Conclusion: OpenCEM平台旨在加速下一代智能、可持续和真正上下文感知能源系统的研究，特别适合利用大语言模型开发新型控制算法和预测模型。

Abstract: Addressing the critical need for intelligent, context-aware energy management in renewable systems, we introduce the \textbf{OpenCEM Simulator and Dataset}: the first open-source digital twin explicitly designed to integrate rich, unstructured contextual information with quantitative renewable energy dynamics. Traditional energy management relies heavily on numerical time series, thereby neglecting the significant predictive power embedded in human-generated context (e.g., event schedules, system logs, user intentions). OpenCEM bridges this gap by offering a unique platform comprising both a meticulously aligned, language-rich dataset from a real-world PV-and-battery microgrid installation and a modular simulator capable of natively processing this multi-modal context. The OpenCEM Simulator provides a high-fidelity environment for developing and validating novel control algorithms and prediction models, particularly those leveraging Large Language Models. We detail its component-based architecture, hybrid data-driven and physics-based modelling capabilities, and demonstrate its utility through practical examples, including context-aware load forecasting and the implementation of online optimal battery charging control strategies. By making this platform publicly available, OpenCEM aims to accelerate research into the next generation of intelligent, sustainable, and truly context-aware energy systems.

</details>


### [307] [SemLink: A Semantic-Aware Automated Test Oracle for Hyperlink Verification using Siamese Sentence-BERT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05711)
*Guan-Yan Yang,Wei-Ling Wen,Shu-Yuan Ku,Farn Wang,Kuo-Hui Yeh*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SemLink：基于Siamese神经网络和Sentence-BERT的语义超链接验证工具，用于检测网页链接的语义漂移问题，比传统HTTP状态码检查更智能，比大语言模型更高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前网页链接验证工具主要检查HTTP状态码，无法检测语义漂移（链接目标内容与源上下文不匹配）。大语言模型虽然能理解语义，但存在高延迟、隐私问题和成本高昂等限制，不适合大规模回归测试。

Method: 提出SemLink系统，采用Siamese神经网络架构，以预训练的Sentence-BERT为骨干网络，计算超链接源上下文（锚文本、周围DOM元素、视觉特征）与目标页面内容之间的语义连贯性。构建了包含60,000多个语义对的Hyperlink-Webpage Positive Pairs数据集用于训练和评估。

Result: SemLink实现了96.00%的召回率，与最先进的LLM（GPT-5.2）相当，但运行速度提高了约47.5倍，且计算资源需求显著减少。

Conclusion: SemLink填补了传统语法检查器和昂贵的生成式AI之间的空白，为自动化网页质量保证提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Web applications rely heavily on hyperlinks to connect disparate information resources. However, the dynamic nature of the web leads to link rot, where targets become unavailable, and more insidiously, semantic drift, where a valid HTTP 200 connection exists, but the target content no longer aligns with the source context. Traditional verification tools, which primarily function as crash oracles by checking HTTP status codes, often fail to detect semantic inconsistencies, thereby compromising web integrity and user experience. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic understanding, they suffer from high latency, privacy concerns, and prohibitive costs for large-scale regression testing. In this paper, we propose SemLink, a novel automated test oracle for semantic hyperlink verification. SemLink leverages a Siamese Neural Network architecture powered by a pre-trained Sentence-BERT (SBERT) backbone to compute the semantic coherence between a hyperlink's source context (anchor text, surrounding DOM elements, and visual features) and its target page content. To train and evaluate our model, we introduce the Hyperlink-Webpage Positive Pairs (HWPPs) dataset, a rigorously constructed corpus of over 60,000 semantic pairs. Our evaluation demonstrates that SemLink achieves a Recall of 96.00%, comparable to state-of-the-art LLMs (GPT-5.2), while operating approximately 47.5 times faster and requiring significantly fewer computational resources. This work bridges the gap between traditional syntactic checkers and expensive generative AI, offering a robust and efficient solution for automated web quality assurance.

</details>


### [308] [From Use to Oversight: How Mental Models Influence User Behavior and Output in AI Writing Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05166)
*Shalaleh Rismani,Su Lin Blodgett,Q. Vera Liao,Alexandra Olteanu,AJung Moon*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究探索用户对AI写作助手的心智模型如何影响其使用行为，发现结构性心智模型（理解系统工作原理）虽然提升系统理解，但可能导致用户过度信任而忽略AI的错误建议，反而产生更多语法错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI写作助手已无处不在，但用户如何理解这些系统（心智模型）如何影响其使用行为尚不清楚。研究旨在探究功能性心智模型（系统做什么）和结构性心智模型（系统如何工作）如何影响用户对AI建议的控制行为（请求、接受、编辑）和写作结果。

Method: 通过实验设计，向48名参与者提供不同的系统描述来诱导不同类型的心智模型（功能性vs结构性）。参与者使用写作助手完成求职信写作任务，系统偶尔会提供预设的非语法正确建议，以测试心智模型是否影响参与者对AI建议的批判性监督。

Result: 结构性心智模型组的参与者对系统有更好的理解，但这产生了反效果：虽然他们认为系统更易用，但产生的求职信包含更多语法错误。这表明在需要用户监督易出错AI输出的情境中，系统理解、信任和控制之间存在复杂关系。

Conclusion: 对AI系统工作原理的深入理解可能导致用户过度信任，反而降低对错误输出的批判性监督。这强调了在设计AI助手时需要考虑用户心智模型如何影响实际使用效果，特别是在需要用户监督的场景中。

Abstract: AI-based writing assistants are ubiquitous, yet little is known about how users' mental models shape their use. We examine two types of mental models -- functional or related to what the system does, and structural or related to how the system works -- and how they affect control behavior -- how users request, accept, or edit AI suggestions as they write -- and writing outcomes. We primed participants ($N = 48$) with different system descriptions to induce these mental models before asking them to complete a cover letter writing task using a writing assistant that occasionally offered preconfigured ungrammatical suggestions to test whether the mental models affected participants' critical oversight. We find that while participants in the structural mental model condition demonstrate a better understanding of the system, this can have a backfiring effect: while these participants judged the system as more usable, they also produced letters with more grammatical errors, highlighting a complex relationship between system understanding, trust, and control in contexts that require user oversight of error-prone AI outputs.

</details>


### [309] [Anchored Cyclic Generation: A Novel Paradigm for Long-Sequence Symbolic Music Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05343)
*Boyu Cao,Lekai Qian,Dehan Li,Haoyu Gu,Mingda Xu,Qi Liu*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出锚定循环生成(ACG)范式，通过已识别音乐的锚特征引导自回归生成，缓解误差累积问题；进一步提出分层锚定循环生成(Hi-ACG)框架，采用全局到局部生成策略，在长序列符号音乐生成任务中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归模型在生成具有结构连贯性的长序列时面临根本性挑战，特别是在符号音乐生成中，现有方法受限于自回归模型固有的严重误差累积问题，导致音乐质量和结构完整性表现不佳。

Method: 提出锚定循环生成(ACG)范式，利用已识别音乐的锚特征在自回归过程中引导后续生成；进一步提出分层锚定循环生成(Hi-ACG)框架，采用系统性的全局到局部生成策略，并设计了专门的钢琴令牌作为高效音乐表示。

Result: ACG范式将预测特征向量与真实语义向量之间的余弦距离平均降低了34.7%；Hi-ACG框架在长序列符号音乐生成任务中，主观和客观评估均显著优于现有主流方法；框架在音乐补全等相关任务中也表现出优秀的任务泛化能力。

Conclusion: ACG范式和Hi-ACG框架有效缓解了自回归模型在长序列生成中的误差累积问题，在符号音乐生成和相关任务中取得了卓越性能，展示了良好的任务泛化能力。

Abstract: Generating long sequences with structural coherence remains a fundamental challenge for autoregressive models across sequential generation tasks. In symbolic music generation, this challenge is particularly pronounced, as existing methods are constrained by the inherent severe error accumulation problem of autoregressive models, leading to poor performance in music quality and structural integrity. In this paper, we propose the Anchored Cyclic Generation (ACG) paradigm, which relies on anchor features from already identified music to guide subsequent generation during the autoregressive process, effectively mitigating error accumulation in autoregressive methods. Based on the ACG paradigm, we further propose the Hierarchical Anchored Cyclic Generation (Hi-ACG) framework, which employs a systematic global-to-local generation strategy and is highly compatible with our specifically designed piano token, an efficient musical representation. The experimental results demonstrate that compared to traditional autoregressive models, the ACG paradigm achieves reduces cosine distance by an average of 34.7% between predicted feature vectors and ground-truth semantic vectors. In long-sequence symbolic music generation tasks, the Hi-ACG framework significantly outperforms existing mainstream methods in both subjective and objective evaluations. Furthermore, the framework exhibits excellent task generalization capabilities, achieving superior performance in related tasks such as music completion.

</details>


### [310] [LanG -- A Governance-Aware Agentic AI Platform for Unified Security Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05440)
*Anes Abdennebi,Nadjia Kara,Laaziz Lahlou,Hakima Ould-Slimane*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: LanG是一个开源、治理感知的智能AI平台，用于统一安全运营，包含统一事件上下文记录、智能AI编排器、LLM规则生成器、三阶段攻击重构器和分层治理架构，在安全运营中实现高精度检测和快速响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代安全运营中心面临告警疲劳、工具碎片化和跨源事件关联有限等挑战，现有SIEM和XDR系统仅通过碎片化工具部分解决这些问题，需要更统一、智能的解决方案。

Method: 1) 统一事件上下文记录与关联引擎(F1=87%)；2) 基于LangGraph的智能AI编排器，含人工检查点；3) LLM规则生成器，微调四个基础模型生成可部署规则(平均接受率96.2%)；4) 三阶段攻击重构器，结合Louvain社区检测、LLM假设生成和贝叶斯评分；5) 分层治理架构，通过模型上下文协议暴露所有工具，由AI治理策略引擎管理。

Result: 异常和威胁检测器加权F1分数分别为99.0%和91.0%，推理时间约21ms，机器侧平均检测时间1.58秒；规则生成器在实时IDS引擎上部署率超过91%；攻击重构器杀伤链准确率87.5%；治理护栏管道F1分数98.1%，实验零误报。

Conclusion: LanG是首个满足多个工业能力的一体化开源工具，同时强制执行选定的AI治理政策，为托管安全服务提供商提供多租户隔离、基于角色的访问控制和完全本地部署支持。

Abstract: Modern Security Operations Centers struggle with alert fatigue, fragmented tooling, and limited cross-source event correlation. Challenges that current Security Information Event Management and Extended Detection and Response systems only partially address through fragmented tools. This paper presents the LLM-assisted network Governance (LanG), an open-source, governance-aware agentic AI platform for unified security operations contributing: (i) a Unified Incident Context Record with a correlation engine (F1 = 87%), (ii) an Agentic AI Orchestrator on LangGraph with human-in-the-loop checkpoints, (iii) an LLM-based Rule Generator finetuned on four base models producing deployable Snort 2/3, Suricata, and YARA rules (average acceptance rate 96.2%), (iv) a Three-Phase Attack Reconstructor combining Louvain community detection, LLM-driven hypothesis generation, and Bayesian scoring (87.5% kill-chain accuracy), and (v) a layered Governance-MCP-Agentic AI-Security architecture where all tools are exposed via the Model Context Protocol, governed by an AI Governance Policy Engine with a two-layer guardrail pipeline (regex + Llama Prompt Guard 2 semantic classifier, achieving 98.1% F1 score with experimental zero false positives). Designed for Managed Security Service Providers, the platform supports multi-tenant isolation, role-based access, and fully local deployment. Finetuned anomaly and threat detectors achieve weighted F1 scores of 99.0% and 91.0%, respectively, in intrusion-detection benchmarks, running inferences in $\approx$21 ms with a machine-side mean time to detect of 1.58 s, and the rule generator exceeds 91% deployability on live IDS engines. A systematic comparison against eight SOC platforms confirms that LanG uniquely satisfies multiple industrial capabilities all in one open-source tool, while enforcing selected AI governance policies.

</details>


### [311] [MA-IDS: Multi-Agent RAG Framework for IoT Network Intrusion Detection with an Experience Library](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05458)
*Md Shamimul Islam,Luis G. Jaimes,Ayesha S. Dina*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: MA-IDS：基于多智能体LLM+RAG的物联网入侵检测系统，通过经验库实现持续学习和可解释性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统入侵检测系统存在局限性：基于签名的方法无法检测零日攻击和变种攻击，机器学习方法缺乏可解释性。物联网环境因资源限制和异构协议使问题更加严重。

Method: 提出MA-IDS多智能体入侵检测系统，结合LLM和RAG进行推理驱动检测。系统包含：1）流量分类智能体，通过FAISS向量数据库检索历史错误规则；2）错误分析智能体，将误分类转化为可读检测规则存入经验库，实现持续学习。

Result: 在NF-BoT-IoT和NF-ToN-IoT数据集上，Macro F1-Score分别达到89.75%和85.22%，比零样本基线提升超过72和80个百分点，与SVM性能相当但提供规则级解释。

Conclusion: 检索增强推理为物联网网络提供了可解释、自改进入侵检测的原则性路径，LLM+RAG框架在保持性能的同时显著提升可解释性。

Abstract: Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) face important limitations. Signature-based methods are effective for known attack patterns, but they struggle to detect zero-day attacks and often miss modified variants of previously known attacks, while many machine learning approaches offer limited interpretability. These challenges become even more severe in IoT environments because of resource constraints and heterogeneous protocols. To address these issues, we propose MA-IDS, a Multi-Agent Intrusion Detection System that combines Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) for reasoning-driven intrusion detection. The proposed framework grounds LLM reasoning through a persistent, self-building Experience Library. Two specialized agents collaborate through a FAISS-based vector database: a Traffic Classification Agent that retrieves past error rules before each inference, and an Error Analysis Agent that converts misclassifications into human-readable detection rules stored for future retrieval, enabling continual learning through external knowledge accumulation, without modifying the underlying language model. Evaluated on NF-BoT-IoT and NF-ToN-IoT benchmark datasets, MA-IDS achieves Macro F1-Scores of 89.75% and 85.22%, improving over zero-shot baselines of 17% and 4.96% by more than 72 and 80 percentage points. These results are competitive with SVM while providing rule-level explanations for every classification decision, demonstrating that retrieval-augmented reasoning offers a principled path toward explainable, self-improving intrusion detection for IoT networks.

</details>


### [312] [Foundations for Agentic AI Investigations from the Forensic Analysis of OpenClaw](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05589)
*Jan Gruber,Jan-Niclas Hilgert*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文对OpenClaw智能助手进行实证研究，通过静态代码分析和差分取证分析，识别可恢复的痕迹，提出智能体取证分类法，并指出LLM代理执行带来的抽象层和非确定性挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI智能体系统作为个人助手被广泛部署，它们可能成为数字调查的常见对象。然而，目前对其内部状态和行动在取证分析中如何重建知之甚少，系统化的取证方法尚未探索。

Method: 1) 通过静态代码分析OpenClaw的技术设计；2) 应用差分取证分析识别智能体交互循环各阶段的可恢复痕迹；3) 分类和关联这些痕迹以系统评估其调查价值；4) 提出智能体取证分类法。

Result: 识别了OpenClaw智能体交互循环中的可恢复痕迹，提出了捕获重复调查模式的智能体取证分类法，揭示了LLM代理执行带来的抽象层和非确定性对痕迹生成的重大影响。

Conclusion: 智能体AI取证面临基础性挑战：代理执行引入了额外的抽象层和显著的非确定性，LLM、执行环境和演化上下文会影响工具选择和状态转换，这与基于规则的软件有本质区别。研究结果为智能体AI系统调查提供了初步基础。

Abstract: Agentic Al systems are increasingly deployed as personal assistants and are likely to become a common object of digital investigations. However, little is known about how their internal state and actions can be reconstructed during forensic analysis. Despite growing popularity, systematic forensic approaches for such systems remain largely unexplored. This paper presents an empirical study of OpenClaw a widely used single-agent assistant. We examine OpenClaw's technical design via static code analysis and apply differential forensic analysis to identify recoverable traces across stages of the agent interaction loop. We classify and correlate these traces to assess their investigative value in a systematic way. Based on these observations, we propose an agent artifact taxonomy that captures recurring investigative patterns. Finally, we highlight a foundational challenge for agentic Al forensics: agent-mediated execution introduces an additional layer of abstraction and substantial nondeterminism in trace generation. The large language model (LLM), the execution environment, and the evolving context can influence tool choice and state transitions in ways that are largely absent from rule-based software. Overall, our results provide an initial foundation for the systematic investigation of agentic Al and outline implications for digital forensic practice and future research.

</details>


### [313] [From Incomplete Architecture to Quantified Risk: Multimodal LLM-Driven Security Assessment for Cyber-Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05674)
*Shaofei Huang,Christopher M. Poskitt,Lwin Khin Shar*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: ASTRAL：基于多模态LLM的架构中心化安全威胁风险评估方法，用于重建和分析文档不完整的CPS架构


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决网络物理系统（CPS）因遗留技术、知识管理差距和子系统集成复杂性导致的架构文档不完整问题，这种不完整性阻碍了可靠的安全评估

Method: 使用多模态LLM，结合提示链、少样本学习和架构推理，从分散数据源中提取和合成系统表示，将LLM推理与架构建模相结合

Result: 通过多个CPS案例的消融研究和14名网络安全专家的评估，验证了方法的有效性，专家反馈表明ASTRAL对架构中心化安全评估有用且可靠

Conclusion: ASTRAL能够支持更明智的网络安全风险管理决策，特别是在文档不完整的情况下重建和分析CPS架构

Abstract: Cyber-physical systems often contend with incomplete architectural documentation or outdated information resulting from legacy technologies, knowledge management gaps, and the complexity of integrating diverse subsystems over extended operational lifecycles. This architectural incompleteness impedes reliable security assessment, as inaccurate or missing architectural knowledge limits the identification of system dependencies, attack surfaces, and risk propagation pathways. To address this foundational challenge, this paper introduces ASTRAL (Architecture-Centric Security Threat Risk Assessment using LLMs), an architecture-centric security assessment technique implemented in a prototype tool powered by multimodal LLMs. The proposed approach assists practitioners in reconstructing and analysing CPS architectures when documentation is fragmented or absent. By leveraging prompt chaining, few-shot learning, and architectural reasoning, ASTRAL extracts and synthesises system representations from disparate data sources. By integrating LLM reasoning with architectural modelling, our approach supports adaptive threat identification and quantitative risk estimation for cyber-physical systems. We evaluated the approach through an ablation study across multiple CPS case studies and an expert evaluation involving 14 experienced cybersecurity practitioners. Practitioner feedback suggests that ASTRAL is useful and reliable for supporting architecture-centric security assessment. Overall, the results indicate that the approach can support more informed cyber risk management decisions.

</details>


### [314] [Generating Synthetic Doctor-Patient Conversations for Long-form Audio Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06138)
*Yanis Labrak,David Grünert,Séverin Baroudi,Jiyun Chun,Pawel Cyrta,Sergio Burdisso,Ahmed Hassoon,David Liu,Adam Rothschild,Reed Van Deusen,Petr Motlicek,Andrew Perrault,Ricard Marxer,Thomas Schaaf*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出用于长上下文音频推理的合成数据生成流程，专注于首次就诊医患对话和SOAP笔记生成任务，包含对话生成、多说话人音频合成、参考笔记生成三个阶段，发布了8800个合成对话和1300小时音频数据


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文音频推理在训练数据和评估方面都严重不足，现有基准主要针对短上下文任务，而开放生成任务对自动评估具有挑战性

Method: 三阶段合成数据生成流程：1) 角色驱动的对话生成，2) 带重叠/停顿建模、房间声学和声音事件的多说话人音频合成，3) 基于LLM的参考SOAP笔记生成，全部使用开源模型

Result: 发布了8800个合成对话，包含1300小时对应音频和参考笔记；评估显示级联方法仍显著优于端到端模型

Conclusion: 提出的合成数据生成流程可作为训练资源和受控评估环境，为长上下文音频推理提供数据支持，级联方法在当前仍具有优势

Abstract: Long-context audio reasoning is underserved in both training data and evaluation. Existing benchmarks target short-context tasks, and the open-ended generation tasks most relevant to long-context reasoning pose well-known challenges for automatic evaluation. We propose a synthetic data generation pipeline designed to serve both as a training resource and as a controlled evaluation environment, and instantiate it for first-visit doctor-patient conversations with SOAP note generation as the task. The pipeline has three stages, persona-driven dialogue generation, multi-speaker audio synthesis with overlap/pause modeling, room acoustics, and sound events, and LLM-based reference SOAP note production, built entirely on open-weight models. We release 8,800 synthetic conversations with 1.3k hours of corresponding audio and reference notes. Evaluating current open-weight systems, we find that cascaded approaches still substantially outperform end-to-end models.

</details>


### [315] [EAGLE: Edge-Aware Graph Learning for Proactive Delivery Delay Prediction in Smart Logistics Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05254)
*Zhiming Xue,Menghao Huo,Yujue Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出一个混合深度学习框架，结合Transformer时间编码和图注意力网络，用于供应链延迟预测，在真实数据集上取得优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有供应链延迟预测方法要么忽略网络拓扑结构，要么忽视空间依赖关系。现代物流网络产生丰富的运营数据流，但预测交付延迟仍主要依赖反应式方法，需要能同时建模时间动态和空间依赖的主动风险管理框架。

Method: 提出混合深度学习框架：1) 使用轻量级Transformer补丁编码器建模时间订单流动态；2) 通过边缘感知图注意力网络(E-GAT)建模枢纽间关系依赖；3) 通过多任务学习目标进行优化。

Result: 在真实世界DataCo智能供应链数据集上评估，F1分数0.8762，AUC-ROC 0.9773。在四个独立随机种子下，跨种子F1标准差仅0.0089，比最佳消融变体提升3.8倍，在所有评估模型中实现预测准确性和训练稳定性的最佳平衡。

Conclusion: 该混合框架有效结合时间序列建模和图神经网络，为供应链风险管理提供了准确且稳定的预测解决方案，显著优于现有基线方法。

Abstract: Modern logistics networks generate rich operational data streams at every warehouse node and transportation lane -- from order timestamps and routing records to shipping manifests -- yet predicting delivery delays remains predominantly reactive. Existing predictive approaches typically treat this problem either as a tabular classification task, ignoring network topology, or as a time-series anomaly detection task, overlooking the spatial dependencies of the supply chain graph. To bridge this gap, we propose a hybrid deep learning framework for proactive supply chain risk management. The proposed method jointly models temporal order-flow dynamics via a lightweight Transformer patch encoder and inter-hub relational dependencies through an Edge-Aware Graph Attention Network (E-GAT), optimized via a multi-task learning objective. Evaluated on the real-world DataCo Smart Supply Chain dataset, our framework achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, yielding an F1-score of 0.8762 and an AUC-ROC of 0.9773. Across four independent random seeds, the framework exhibits a cross-seed F1 standard deviation of only 0.0089 -- a 3.8 times improvement over the best ablated variant -- achieving the strongest balance of predictive accuracy and training stability among all evaluated models.

</details>


### [316] [SCMAPR: Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement for Complex-Scenario Text-to-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05489)
*Chengyi Yang,Pengzhen Li,Jiayin Qi,Aimin Zhou,Ji Wu,Ji Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: SCMAPR是一个用于文本到视频生成的场景感知自校正多智能体提示词优化框架，通过多智能体协作解决复杂场景下文本提示词模糊和不足的问题，显著提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前文本到视频生成系统在复杂场景下表现不佳，主要原因是文本提示词的模糊性和不足。现有方法难以处理复杂场景中的语义细节和结构要求，需要更智能的提示词优化机制。

Method: 提出SCMAPR框架，采用分阶段多智能体优化流程：1) 场景路由智能体将提示词分类到基于分类的场景中；2) 策略合成智能体生成场景感知的重写策略并进行策略条件优化；3) 结构化语义验证智能体进行条件性修订检测。同时构建了T2V-Complexity基准测试集。

Result: 在3个现有基准测试和自建的T2V-Complexity基准上，SCMAPR在复杂场景下显著提升了文本-视频对齐度和整体生成质量，在VBench和EvalCrafter上分别获得2.67%和3.28的平均分提升，在T2V-CompBench上提升0.028分。

Conclusion: SCMAPR通过多智能体协作的提示词优化框架有效解决了复杂场景下文本到视频生成的挑战，为处理模糊和不足的文本提示词提供了系统化解决方案。

Abstract: Text-to-Video (T2V) generation has benefited from recent advances in diffusion models, yet current systems still struggle under complex scenarios, which are generally exacerbated by the ambiguity and underspecification of text prompts. In this work, we formulate complex-scenario prompt refinement as a stage-wise multi-agent refinement process and propose SCMAPR, i.e., a scenario-aware and Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement framework for T2V prompting. SCMAPR coordinates specialized agents to (i) route each prompt to a taxonomy-grounded scenario for strategy selection, (ii) synthesize scenario-aware rewriting policies and perform policy-conditioned refinement, and (iii) conduct structured semantic verification that triggers conditional revision when violations are detected. To clarify what constitutes complex scenarios in T2V prompting, provide representative examples, and enable rigorous evaluation under such challenging conditions, we further introduce {T2V-Complexity}, which is a complex-scenario T2V benchmark consisting exclusively of complex-scenario prompts. Extensive experiments on 3 existing benchmarks and our T2V-Complexity benchmark demonstrate that SCMAPR consistently improves text-video alignment and overall generation quality under complex scenarios, achieving up to 2.67\% and 3.28 gains in average score on VBench and EvalCrafter, and up to 0.028 improvement on T2V-CompBench over 3 State-Of-The-Art baselines.

</details>


### [317] [OmniDiagram: Advancing Unified Diagram Code Generation via Visual Interrogation Reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05514)
*Haoyue Yang,Xuanle Zhao,Xuexin Liu,Feibang Jiang,Yao Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: OmniDiagram是一个统一的图表代码生成框架，结合了多种图表代码语言和任务定义，通过创新的视觉反馈策略Viva进行强化学习优化，在图表代码生成基准测试中达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可编程图表生成研究局限于狭窄的任务表述和语言支持，限制了其在不同图表类型中的适用性。需要构建一个统一的框架来处理多样化的图表代码语言和任务定义。

Method: 提出OmniDiagram统一框架，包含多样化的图表代码语言和任务定义。为解决RL中代码逻辑与视觉保真度的对齐挑战，引入创新的视觉反馈策略Viva，通过生成有针对性的视觉查询来审查图表视觉保真度，并提供细粒度反馈进行优化。构建了首个大规模图表代码生成数据集M3²Diagram（超过196k高质量实例）。

Result: 实验结果表明，结合SFT和基于Viva的RL，OmniDiagram在图表代码生成基准测试中建立了新的SOTA。

Conclusion: OmniDiagram通过统一的框架设计和创新的视觉反馈机制，有效解决了图表代码生成中的多样性和视觉保真度问题，实现了无需人工标注真实代码的自进化训练过程。

Abstract: The paradigm of programmable diagram generation is evolving rapidly, playing a crucial role in structured visualization. However, most existing studies are confined to a narrow range of task formulations and language support, constraining their applicability to diverse diagram types. In this work, we propose OmniDiagram, a unified framework that incorporates diverse diagram code languages and task definitions. To address the challenge of aligning code logic with visual fidelity in Reinforcement Learning (RL), we introduce a novel visual feedback strategy named Visual Interrogation Verifies All (\textsc{Viva}). Unlike brittle syntax-based rules or pixel-level matching, \textsc{Viva} rewards the visual structure of rendered diagrams through a generative approach. Specifically, \textsc{Viva} actively generates targeted visual inquiries to scrutinize diagram visual fidelity and provides fine-grained feedback for optimization. This mechanism facilitates a self-evolving training process, effectively obviating the need for manually annotated ground truth code. Furthermore, we construct M3$^2$Diagram, the first large-scale diagram code generation dataset, containing over 196k high-quality instances. Experimental results confirm that the combination of SFT and our \textsc{Viva}-based RL allows OmniDiagram to establish a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across diagram code generation benchmarks.

</details>


### [318] [From Large Language Model Predicates to Logic Tensor Networks: Neurosymbolic Offer Validation in Regulated Procurement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05539)
*Cedric Haufe,Frieder Stolzenburg*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出一种神经符号方法，结合符号AI与子符号AI，用于验证受监管公共机构的报价文件。使用语言模型提取信息，通过逻辑张量网络(LTN)聚合做出可审计决策，强调可解释性和法律可验证性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在受监管的公共机构中，决策必须既事实正确又法律可验证。现有方法缺乏透明度和可审计性，需要将领域特定知识与语言模型的语义理解相结合，实现可解释的决策验证。

Method: 神经符号方法：1) 使用语言模型从报价文件中提取信息；2) 通过逻辑张量网络(LTN)聚合信息并做出决策；3) 支持基于谓词值、规则真值和对应文本段落的决策解释。

Result: 在真实报价文件语料库上的实验表明，该流水线性能与现有模型相当，主要优势在于可解释性、模块化谓词提取以及对可解释AI(XAI)的显式支持。

Conclusion: 神经符号方法为受监管环境中的文档验证提供了可审计、可解释的解决方案，成功将符号推理与神经语言理解相结合，满足法律合规性要求。

Abstract: We present a neurosymbolic approach, i.e., combining symbolic and subsymbolic artificial intelligence, to validating offer documents in regulated public institutions. We employ a language model to extract information and then aggregate with an LTN (Logic Tensor Network) to make an auditable decision. In regulated public institutions, decisions must be made in a manner that is both factually correct and legally verifiable. Our neurosymbolic approach allows existing domain-specific knowledge to be linked to the semantic text understanding of language models. The decisions resulting from our pipeline can be justified by predicate values, rule truth values, and corresponding text passages, which enables rule checking based on a real corpus of offer documents. Our experiments on a real corpus show that the proposed pipeline achieves performance comparable to existing models, while its key advantage lies in its interpretability, modular predicate extraction, and explicit support for XAI (Explainable AI).

</details>


### [319] [PECKER: A Precisely Efficient Critical Knowledge Erasure Recipe For Machine Unlearning in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05634)
*Zhiyong Ma,Zhitao Deng,Huan Tang,Jialin Chen,Zhijun Zheng,Zhengping Li,Qingyuan Chuai*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出PECKER方法，通过显著性掩码优先更新对遗忘目标数据贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算，在保持遗忘效果的同时显著缩短训练时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法虽然有效，但训练时间和计算开销过高。分析发现根本原因在于梯度更新方向不佳，降低了训练效率并破坏收敛稳定性。需要一种更高效的机器遗忘方法

Method: 在蒸馏框架中引入显著性掩码，优先更新对遗忘目标数据贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算，从而缩短整体训练时间而不牺牲遗忘效果

Result: 在CIFAR-10和STL-10数据集上，PECKER方法能够更快地生成遗忘相关类别或概念的样本，同时与真实图像分布紧密对齐，在类别遗忘和概念遗忘任务上都实现了更短的训练时间

Conclusion: PECKER是一种高效的机器遗忘方法，能够匹配或超越现有主流方法，通过针对性参数更新显著减少计算开销，为生成式AI模型的安全合规操作提供实用解决方案

Abstract: Machine unlearning (MU) has become a critical technique for GenAI models' safe and compliant operation. While existing MU methods are effective, most impose prohibitive training time and computational overhead. Our analysis suggests the root cause lies in poorly directed gradient updates, which reduce training efficiency and destabilize convergence. To mitigate these issues, we propose PECKER, an efficient MU approach that matches or outperforms prevailing methods. Within a distillation framework, PECKER introduces a saliency mask to prioritize updates to parameters that contribute most to forgetting the targeted data, thereby reducing unnecessary gradient computation and shortening overall training time without sacrificing unlearning efficacy. Our method generates samples that unlearn related class or concept more quickly, while closely aligning with the true image distribution on CIFAR-10 and STL-10 datasets, achieving shorter training times for both class forgetting and concept forgetting.

</details>


### [320] [QA-MoE: Towards a Continuous Reliability Spectrum with Quality-Aware Mixture of Experts for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05704)
*Yitong Zhu,Yuxuan Jiang,Guanxuan Jiang,Bojing Hou,Peng Yuan Zhou,Ge Lin Kan,Yuyang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: QA-MoE：基于质量感知专家混合的多模态情感分析框架，通过自监督偶然不确定性量化模态可靠性，统一处理模态缺失和质量退化问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实场景中多模态输入常受动态噪声或模态缺失影响，现有方法通常将这些缺陷视为离散情况或假设固定损坏比例，限制了其对连续变化可靠性条件的适应性

Method: 提出连续可靠性谱统一缺失和质量退化，构建QA-MoE框架，通过自监督偶然不确定性量化模态可靠性，指导专家路由机制，抑制不可靠信号的错误传播

Result: QA-MoE在多样化退化场景中达到竞争性或最先进性能，并展现出"一个检查点适应所有"的实用特性

Conclusion: QA-MoE通过连续可靠性建模和自监督不确定性估计，有效处理多模态情感分析中的动态噪声和模态缺失问题，具有实际部署价值

Abstract: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) aims to infer human sentiment from textual, acoustic, and visual signals. In real-world scenarios, however, multimodal inputs are often compromised by dynamic noise or modality missingness. Existing methods typically treat these imperfections as discrete cases or assume fixed corruption ratios, which limits their adaptability to continuously varying reliability conditions. To address this, we first introduce a Continuous Reliability Spectrum to unify missingness and quality degradation into a single framework. Building on this, we propose QA-MoE, a Quality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts framework that quantifies modality reliability via self-supervised aleatoric uncertainty. This mechanism explicitly guides expert routing, enabling the model to suppress error propagation from unreliable signals while preserving task-relevant information. Extensive experiments indicate that QA-MoE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance across diverse degradation scenarios and exhibits a promising One-Checkpoint-for-All property in practice.

</details>


### [321] [Flowr -- Scaling Up Retail Supply Chain Operations Through Agentic AI in Large Scale Supermarket Chains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05987)
*Eranga Bandara,Ross Gore,Sachin Shetty,Piumi Siyambalapitiya,Sachini Rajapakse,Isurunima Kularathna,Pramoda Karunarathna,Ravi Mukkamala,Peter Foytik,Safdar H. Bouk,Abdul Rahman,Xueping Liang,Amin Hass,Tharaka Hewa,Ng Wee Keong,Kasun De Zoysa,Aruna Withanage,Nilaan Loganathan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: Flowr是一个用于自动化大型超市零售供应链端到端工作流程的AI代理框架，通过分解手动操作为专门AI代理，使用微调LLM协调，并采用人机协同监督机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超市零售供应链涉及需求预测、采购、供应商协调和库存补货等连续高容量手动工作流程，这些流程重复性强、决策密集、难以规模化，尽管数据分析投资增加，但决策和协调层仍主要依赖人工，反应性且分散。

Method: Flowr将手动供应链操作系统分解为专门AI代理，每个代理负责明确定义的认知角色；使用由中心推理LLM协调的微调领域专用LLM联盟；采用人机协同编排模型，供应链经理通过MCP接口监督和干预工作流程阶段。

Result: Flowr显著减少了手动协调开销，改善了供需对齐，实现了主动异常处理，其规模通过手动流程无法实现；框架已与大型超市连锁合作验证，且具有领域独立性。

Conclusion: Flowr提供了一个可推广的蓝图，用于在大规模企业环境中实现AI代理驱动的供应链自动化，通过专门代理、LLM协调和人机协同监督实现端到端工作流程自动化。

Abstract: Retail supply chain operations in supermarket chains involve continuous, high-volume manual workflows spanning demand forecasting, procurement, supplier coordination, and inventory replenishment, processes that are repetitive, decision-intensive, and difficult to scale without significant human effort. Despite growing investment in data analytics, the decision-making and coordination layers of these workflows remain predominantly manual, reactive, and fragmented across outlets, distribution centers, and supplier networks. This paper introduces Flowr, a novel agentic AI framework for automating end-to-end retail supply chain workflows in large-scale supermarket operations. Flowr systematically decomposes manual supply chain operations into specialized AI agents, each responsible for a clearly defined cognitive role, enabling automation of processes previously dependent on continuous human coordination. To ensure task accuracy and adherence to responsible AI principles, the framework employs a consortium of fine-tuned, domain-specialized large language models coordinated by a central reasoning LLM. Central to the framework is a human-in-the-loop orchestration model in which supply chain managers supervise and intervene across workflow stages via a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-enabled interface, preserving accountability and organizational control. Evaluation demonstrates that Flowr significantly reduces manual coordination overhead, improves demand-supply alignment, and enables proactive exception handling at a scale unachievable through manual processes. The framework was validated in collaboration with a large-scale supermarket chain and is domain-independent, offering a generalizable blueprint for agentic AI-driven supply chain automation across large-scale enterprise settings.

</details>


### [322] [AutoLALA: Automatic Loop Algebraic Locality Analysis for AI and HPC Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05066)
*Yifan Zhu,Yekai Pan,Yanghui Wu,Chen Ding*

Main category: cs.PL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: AutoLALA是一个开源工具，用于分析仿射循环程序的数据局部性，通过符号公式计算重用距离和数据移动复杂度，适用于HPC和AI工作负载。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代计算系统中数据移动是主要瓶颈，特别是在HPC和AI工作负载中（如矩阵乘法、张量收缩、模板计算等），数据移动成本常常超过算术计算成本。需要工具来分析程序的数据局部性以优化性能。

Method: 使用领域特定语言（DSL）编写程序，通过多面体分析将其转换为多面体集合和映射，利用Barvinok计数操作生成符号化的重用距离和数据移动复杂度公式。避免栈模拟和递归工作集公式。

Result: 开发了完整的工具链，包括命令行接口和交互式Web playground，支持LaTeX渲染输出公式。能够处理任意仿射循环嵌套，覆盖张量收缩、einsum表达式、模板计算等典型工作负载。

Conclusion: AutoLALA提供了一个系统化的框架来分析程序的数据局部性，为优化数据移动提供了理论基础和实用工具，有助于提升HPC和AI工作负载的性能。

Abstract: Data movement is the primary bottleneck in modern computing systems. For loop-based programs common in high-performance computing (HPC) and AI workloads, including matrix multiplication, tensor contraction, stencil computation, and einsum operations, the cost of moving data through the memory hierarchy often exceeds the cost of arithmetic.
  This paper presents AutoLALA, an open-source tool that analyzes data locality in affine loop programs. The tool accepts programs written in a small domain-specific language (DSL), lowers them to polyhedral sets and maps, and produces closed-form symbolic formulas for reuse distance and data movement complexity. AutoLALA implements the fully symbolic locality analysis of Zhu et al. together with the data movement distance (DMD) framework of Smith et al. In particular, it computes reuse distance as the image of the access space under the access map, avoiding both stack simulation and Denning's recursive working-set formulation.
  We describe the DSL syntax and its formal semantics, the polyhedral lowering pipeline that constructs timestamp spaces and access maps via affine transformations, and the sequence of Barvinok counting operations used to derive symbolic reuse-interval and reuse-distance distributions. The system is implemented in Rust as a modular library spanning three crates, with safe bindings to the Barvinok library.
  We provide both a command-line interface and an interactive web playground with LaTeX rendering of the output formulas. The tool handles arbitrary affine loop nests, covering workloads such as tensor contractions, einsum expressions, stencil computations, and general polyhedral programs.

</details>


### [323] [Algebraic Structure Discovery for Real World Combinatorial Optimisation Problems: A General Framework from Abstract Algebra to Quotient Space Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04941)
*Min Sun,Federica Storti,Valentina Martino,Miguel Gonzalez-Andrades,Tony Kam-Thong*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 论文提出一个通用框架，通过识别代数结构、构建商空间来缩小组合优化搜索空间，在规则组合任务中利用幺半群结构提升优化效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多组合优化问题隐藏着代数结构，一旦暴露这些结构可以缩小搜索空间并提高找到全局最优解的机会。作者旨在开发一个通用框架来系统性地识别和利用这些代数结构

Method: 提出四步框架：(1)识别代数结构，(2)形式化运算，(3)构建商空间以折叠冗余表示，(4)直接在简化空间上优化。在规则组合任务中，合取规则形成幺半群，通过特征向量编码证明与布尔超立方体的同构

Result: 在真实临床数据和合成基准测试中，商空间感知的遗传算法在48%到77%的运行中恢复全局最优解，而标准方法仅为35%到37%，同时在等价类之间保持多样性

Conclusion: 暴露和利用代数结构为更高效的组合优化提供了一条简单通用的途径，特别是在具有代数结构的组合优化问题中

Abstract: Many combinatorial optimisation problems hide algebraic structures that, once exposed, shrink the search space and improve the chance of finding the global optimal solution. We present a general framework that (i) identifies algebraic structure, (ii) formalises operations, (iii) constructs quotient spaces that collapse redundant representations, and (iv) optimises directly over these reduced spaces. Across a broad family of rule-combination tasks (e.g., patient subgroup discovery and rule-based molecular screening), conjunctive rules form a monoid. Via a characteristic-vector encoding, we prove an isomorphism to the Boolean hypercube $\{0,1\}^n$ with bitwise OR, so logical AND in rules becomes bitwise OR in the encoding. This yields a principled quotient-space formulation that groups functionally equivalent rules and guides structure-aware search. On real clinical data and synthetic benchmarks, quotient-space-aware genetic algorithms recover the global optimum in 48% to 77% of runs versus 35% to 37% for standard approaches, while maintaining diversity across equivalence classes. These results show that exposing and exploiting algebraic structure offers a simple, general route to more efficient combinatorial optimisation.

</details>


### [324] [Evaluation of Embedding-Based and Generative Methods for LLM-Driven Document Classification: Opportunities and Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04997)
*Rong Lu,Hao Liu,Song Hou*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 该研究比较了基于嵌入和生成式模型在地球科学文档分类中的表现，发现使用思维链提示的生成式视觉语言模型（如Qwen2.5-VL）在零样本准确率（82%）上优于多模态嵌入模型（如QQMM的63%），并揭示了监督微调对数据不平衡的敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是评估不同模型在地球科学技术文档分类任务中的性能权衡，包括准确性、稳定性和计算成本，为多学科文档分类提供实用的模型选择指导。

Method: 使用多学科基准数据集进行对比分析，评估嵌入模型（如QQMM）和生成式视觉语言模型（如Qwen2.5-VL），后者采用思维链提示增强。同时研究了监督微调对模型性能的影响。

Result: 生成式视觉语言模型（Qwen2.5-VL）在零样本分类中达到82%准确率，显著优于多模态嵌入模型QQMM（63%）。监督微调虽能提升性能，但对训练数据不平衡敏感。

Conclusion: 思维链提示增强的生成式视觉语言模型在地球科学文档分类任务中表现最佳，但监督微调需要谨慎处理数据平衡问题。该研究为多模态文档分类提供了实用的模型选择建议。

Abstract: This work presents a comparative analysis of embedding-based and generative models for classifying geoscience technical documents. Using a multi-disciplinary benchmark dataset, we evaluated the trade-offs between model accuracy, stability, and computational cost. We find that generative Vision-Language Models (VLMs) like Qwen2.5-VL, enhanced with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, achieve superior zero-shot accuracy (82%) compared to state-of-the-art multimodal embedding models like QQMM (63%). We also demonstrate that while supervised fine-tuning (SFT) can improve VLM performance, it is sensitive to training data imbalance.

</details>


### [325] [INTERACT: An AI-Driven Extended Reality Framework for Accesible Communication Featuring Real-Time Sign Language Interpretation and Emotion Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05605)
*Nikolaos D. Tantaroudas,Andrew J. McCracken,Ilias Karachalios,Evangelos Papatheou*

Main category: cs.CE

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: INTERACT是一个AI驱动的XR平台，集成了实时语音转文本、国际手语3D虚拟人渲染、多语言翻译和情感识别功能，旨在为听障和多语言用户提供沉浸式无障碍视频会议体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频会议已成为专业协作的核心，但现有平台对听障和多语言用户支持有限。全球有超过4.3亿人需要听力康复服务，到2050年将超过7亿人。传统无障碍措施成本高、可用性有限且存在物流障碍，而XR技术为沉浸式和包容性通信提供了新可能。

Method: 基于CORTEX2框架，在Meta Quest 3头显上部署，集成Whisper进行语音识别、NLLB进行多语言翻译、RoBERTa进行情感分类、Google MediaPipe进行手势提取。通过3D虚拟人渲染国际手语，在沉浸式虚拟环境中实现实时通信。

Result: 两阶段试点评估显示：92%用户满意度，转录准确率超过85%，情感检测精度90%，整体体验平均评分4.6/5.0，90%参与者愿意参与进一步测试。

Conclusion: INTERACT展示了在XR环境中通过AI技术显著提升视频会议无障碍性的潜力，在教育、文化和专业场景中具有广泛应用前景。

Abstract: Video conferencing has become central to professional collaboration, yet most platforms offer limited support for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and multilingual users. The World Health Organisation estimates that over 430 million people worldwide require rehabilitation for disabling hearing loss, a figure projected to exceed 700 million by 2050. Conventional accessibility measures remain constrained by high costs, limited availability, and logistical barriers, while Extended Reality (XR) technologies open new possibilities for immersive and inclusive communication. This paper presents INTERACT (Inclusive Networking for Translation and Embodied Real-Time Augmented Communication Tool), an AI-driven XR platform that integrates real-time speech-to-text conversion, International Sign Language (ISL) rendering through 3D avatars, multilingual translation, and emotion recognition within an immersive virtual environment. Built on the CORTEX2 framework and deployed on Meta Quest 3 headsets, INTERACT combines Whisper for speech recognition, NLLB for multilingual translation, RoBERTa for emotion classification, and Google MediaPipe for gesture extraction. Pilot evaluations were conducted in two phases, first with technical experts from academia and industry, and subsequently with members of the deaf community. The trials reported 92% user satisfaction, transcription accuracy above 85%, and 90% emotion-detection precision, with a mean overall experience rating of 4.6 out of 5.0 and 90% of participants willing to take part in further testing. The results highlight strong potential for advancing accessibility across educational, cultural, and professional settings. An extended version of this work, including full pilot data and implementation details, has been published as an Open Research Europe article [Tantaroudas et al., 2026a].

</details>


### [326] [AI and Collective Decisions: Strengthening Legitimacy and Losers' Consent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05368)
*Suyash Fulay,Prerna Ravi,Emily Kubin,Shrestha Mohanty,Michiel Bakker,Deb Roy*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: AI系统通过半结构化访谈收集个人经历，可视化展示政策支持预测和经历，提高集体决策的合法性感知和信任


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI在集体决策中主要关注规模和效率，但较少关注程序合法性，特别是失败者同意（losers' consent）问题——参与者即使未获得期望结果，是否仍认为决策公平。研究探索AI如何基于不同经验和信念支持集体决策，以及接触这些经验是否能增加信任、理解和社会凝聚力。

Method: 构建了一个系统：1）使用半结构化AI访谈员收集政策话题的个人经历；2）交互式可视化展示预测的政策支持度及这些经历。通过随机实验（n=181）评估效果，所有参与者都遇到与自己偏好相反的决策。

Result: 与可视化交互增加了感知合法性、对结果的信任以及对他人观点的理解，尽管所有参与者都遇到了与自己偏好相反的决策结果。

Conclusion: AI不仅可以帮助实现民主过程的规模和效率，还能增加参与者之间的信任和联系。该工具的设计和评估为未来研究提供了方向。

Abstract: AI is increasingly used to scale collective decision-making, but far less attention has been paid to how such systems can support procedural legitimacy, particularly the conditions shaping losers' consent: whether participants who do not get their preferred outcome still accept it as fair. We ask: (1) how can AI help ground collective decisions in participants' different experiences and beliefs, and (2) whether exposure to these experiences can increase trust, understanding, and social cohesion even when people disagree with the outcome. We built a system that uses a semi-structured AI interviewer to elicit personal experiences on policy topics and an interactive visualization that displays predicted policy support alongside those voiced experiences. In a randomized experiment (n = 181), interacting with the visualization increased perceived legitimacy, trust in outcomes, and understanding of others' perspectives, even though all participants encountered decisions that went against their stated preferences. Our hope is that the design and evaluation of this tool spurs future researchers to focus on how AI can help not only achieve scale and efficiency in democratic processes, but also increase trust and connection between participants.

</details>


### [327] [Operational Noncommutativity in Sequential Metacognitive Judgments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04938)
*Enso O. Torres Alegre,Diana E. Mora Jimenez*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个操作框架来区分认知中的顺序效应是经典状态变化还是真正的结构非交换性，通过建模元认知评估为状态转换操作，并建立了可测试的约束条件来验证非交换性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 元认知作为对自身认知过程的监控和调节本质上是顺序性的，但认知中的顺序效应是否反映经典状态变化还是更深层的结构非交换性尚不清楚。论文旨在开发一个操作框架来明确区分这两种可能性。

Method: 将元认知评估建模为在内部状态空间上作用的状态转换操作，将评估的反作用与可观测输出分离。引入反事实确定性和评估非侵入性两个假设，推导出顺序相关性的可测试约束条件。提供了一个三维旋转模型作为数值示例。

Result: 证明了顺序依赖性排除了任何忠实的布尔交换表示。建立了违反约束条件即可排除经典非侵入性解释的测试框架，并提供了展示这种违反的显式三维旋转模型。提出了涉及感知决策后顺序信心、错误可能性和知晓感判断的行为范式。

Conclusion: 该框架为区分认知中的经典状态变化与真正的非交换性提供了操作和代数基础，无需诉诸量子物理基质。违反约束条件可认证所谓的"真正非交换性"，为元认知过程的研究提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: Metacognition, understood as the monitoring and regulation of one's own cognitive processes, is inherently sequential: an agent evaluates an internal state, updates it, and may then re-evaluate under modified criteria. Order effects in cognition are well documented, yet it remains unclear whether such effects reflect classical state changes or reveal a deeper structural non-commutativity. We develop an operational framework that makes this distinction explicit. In our formulation, metacognitive evaluations are modeled as state-transforming operations acting on an internal state space with probabilistic readouts, thereby separating evaluation back-action from observable output.
  We show that order dependence prevents any faithful Boolean-commutative representation. We then address a stronger question: can observed order effects always be explained by enlarging the state space with classical latent variables? To formalize this issue, we introduce two assumptions, counterfactual definiteness and evaluation non-invasiveness, under which the existence of a joint distribution over all sequential readouts implies a family of testable constraints on pairwise sequential correlations. Violation of these constraints rules out any classical non-invasive account and certifies what we call genuine non-commutativity.
  We provide an explicit three-dimensional rotation model with fully worked numerical examples that exhibits such violations. We also outline a behavioral paradigm involving sequential confidence, error-likelihood, and feeling-of-knowing judgments following a perceptual decision, together with the corresponding empirical test. No claim is made regarding quantum physical substrates; the framework is purely operational and algebraic.

</details>


### [328] [Part-Level 3D Gaussian Vehicle Generation with Joint and Hinge Axis Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05070)
*Shiyao Qian,Yuan Ren,Dongfeng Bai,Bingbing Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一个从单张或多视角图像生成可动画化3D高斯车辆模型的框架，解决现有静态生成方法在部件运动时产生变形的问题，通过部件边界优化和运动学推理实现部件感知的仿真。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶仿真需要可动画化的车辆表示，但现有CAD流程受限于库覆盖范围和固定模板，无法重建真实场景中的车辆实例。感知算法越来越依赖车轮转向、车门开启等动态信息，因此需要能够准确模拟部件运动的车辆模型。

Method: 提出生成式框架，从单张或稀疏多视角图像合成可动画化3D高斯车辆。包含两个关键组件：1) 部件边界细化模块，强制高斯分布具有排他性所有权，防止动画时部件边界变形；2) 运动学推理头，预测可移动部件的关节位置和铰链轴。

Result: 该方法能够从有限输入生成高质量的可动画化车辆模型，实现部件感知的仿真，弥合静态生成与可动画化车辆模型之间的差距。

Conclusion: 提出的框架为自动驾驶仿真提供了更真实的车辆表示，通过生成式方法解决了现有CAD流程的限制，实现了从静态图像到可动画化3D模型的转换。

Abstract: Simulation is essential for autonomous driving, yet current frameworks often model vehicles as rigid assets and fail to capture part-level articulation. With perception algorithms increasingly leveraging dynamics such as wheel steering or door opening, realistic simulation requires animatable vehicle representations. Existing CAD-based pipelines are limited by library coverage and fixed templates, preventing faithful reconstruction of in-the-wild instances.
  We propose a generative framework that, from a single image or sparse multi-view input, synthesizes an animatable 3D Gaussian vehicle. Our method addresses two challenges: (i) large 3D asset generators are optimized for static quality but not articulation, leading to distortions at part boundaries when animated; and (ii) segmentation alone cannot provide the kinematic parameters required for motion. To overcome this, we introduce a part-edge refinement module that enforces exclusive Gaussian ownership and a kinematic reasoning head that predicts joint positions and hinge axes of movable parts. Together, these components enable faithful part-aware simulation, bridging the gap between static generation and animatable vehicle models.

</details>


### [329] [Non-monotonic causal discovery with Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05136)
*Jose L. Salmeron*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: KA-FCM是一种新型模糊认知图架构，用可学习的B样条函数替代传统标量权重，能够建模非单调因果关系，保持可解释性的同时提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统模糊认知图（FCM）使用标量权重和单调激活函数，无法有效建模非单调因果依赖关系（如饱和效应或周期性动态），限制了其在复杂系统中的应用。

Method: 基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，提出KA-FCM架构，用可学习的单变量B样条函数替代静态标量权重，将非线性从节点聚合阶段转移到因果影响阶段，无需增加图密度或引入隐藏层。

Result: 在三个领域（非单调推理、符号回归、混沌时间序列预测）的实验表明，KA-FCM显著优于传统FCM，并与多层感知机达到竞争性精度，同时保持基于图的可解释性。

Conclusion: KA-FCM通过重新定义因果传递机制，突破了传统FCM在建模非单调关系方面的限制，实现了性能与可解释性的平衡，能够从学习到的边中显式提取数学规律。

Abstract: Fuzzy Cognitive Maps constitute a neuro-symbolic paradigm for modeling complex dynamic systems, widely adopted for their inherent interpretability and recurrent inference capabilities. However, the standard FCM formulation, characterized by scalar synaptic weights and monotonic activation functions, is fundamentally constrained in modeling non-monotonic causal dependencies, thereby limiting its efficacy in systems governed by saturation effects or periodic dynamics.
