We add the exact and estimated contributions in the unnormalized domain and apply a single normalization, recovering the missing softmax mass without additional attention-side KV reads. Across long-context benchmarks, the proposed method improves over selection-only Top-K at matched token-equivalent read budgets, with the largest gains in high-entropy heads.

</details>


### [367] [The UNDO Flip-Flop: A Controlled Probe for Reversible Semantic State Management in State Space Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05923)
*Hongxu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文引入UNDO Flip-Flop任务来测试状态空间模型的可逆语义状态检索能力，发现Mamba-2模型无法学习到理论可表达的堆栈回滚机制，而是收敛于局部启发式策略，揭示了理论表达性与梯度下降实际学习能力之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 状态空间模型在理论上能够建模无星序列任务和有界层次结构，但理论表达性结果不能保证梯度优化能够可靠地发现相应解决方案。现有基准测试要么关注单调状态跟踪（如Flip-Flop任务），要么关注结构嵌套（如Dyck语言），但都没有孤立地测试可逆语义状态检索能力。

Method: 引入UNDO Flip-Flop任务，扩展标准Flip-Flop任务加入UNDO操作，要求模型维护隐式有界堆栈并在非单调更新序列下恢复历史状态。评估单层和双层Mamba-2模型在此框架下的表现，并进行因果消融分析。

Result: 两种Mamba-2变体都未能获得理论上可表达的基于堆栈的回滚机制，而是收敛于局部切换启发式策略（反转当前状态而非检索存储历史）。在训练长度分布内的对抗性回撤压力测试中，双层模型准确率降至41.10%，低于随机水平。因果消融显示瓶颈在于检索而非存储。

Conclusion: 研究结果确认了系统性而非偶然性失败，清晰划定了架构理论上能够表示的内容与梯度下降可靠学习的内容之间的界限，这是理论表达性分析单独无法捕捉的。

Abstract: State space models (SSMs) have been shown to possess the theoretical capacity to model both star-free sequential tasks and bounded hierarchical structures Sarrof et al. (2024). However, formal expressivity results do not guarantee that gradient-based optimisation will reliably discover the corresponding solutions. Existing benchmarks probe either monotonic state tracking, as in the standard Flip-Flop task, or structural nesting, as in the Dyck languages, but neither isolates reversible semantic state retrieval. We introduce the UNDO Flip-Flop task to fill this gap. By extending the standard Flip-Flop with an UNDO, the task requires a model to maintain an implicit bounded stack and recover historical states under non-monotonic update sequences. We evaluate one-layer and two-layer Mamba-2 under this framework. Both variants fail to acquire the provably expressible stack-based rollback mechanism, converging instead on a local toggle heuristic that inverts the current state rather than retrieving stored history. Under an adversarial retraction pressure test held within the training length distribution, the two-layer model collapses to 41.10% accuracy, which is below random chance. The results confirm systematic rather than incidental failure. Causal ablation shows that the bottleneck lies in retrieval, not storage. These results draw a clear line between what an architecture can in principle represent and what gradient descent reliably learns, a distinction that theoretical expressivity analyses alone cannot capture.

</details>


### [368] [Toward Consistent World Models with Multi-Token Prediction and Latent Semantic Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06155)
*Qimin Zhong,Hao Liao,Haiming Qin,Mingyang Zhou,Rui Mao,Wei Chen,Naipeng Chao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出LSE-MTP方法，通过将多令牌预测锚定到真实隐藏状态轨迹，解决标准MTP中的结构幻觉问题，提升LLM内部世界模型的表示对齐和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLM是否发展出连贯的内部世界模型是核心争议。标准多令牌预测(MTP)虽然比传统下一令牌预测(NTP)能学习更结构化表示，但存在结构幻觉问题，即离散令牌监督在潜在空间中鼓励违反环境约束的非法捷径。

Method: 提出潜在语义增强多令牌预测(LSE-MTP)，通过将预测锚定到真实隐藏状态轨迹，弥合离散令牌与连续状态表示之间的差距。从理论角度分析MTP的梯度归纳偏置，并通过合成图和真实世界曼哈顿出租车行程实验验证。

Result: 实验表明LSE-MTP能有效增强表示对齐、减少结构幻觉，并提高对扰动的鲁棒性。理论分析显示MTP通过梯度耦合诱导表示收缩性，促进向内部信念状态的收敛。

Conclusion: LSE-MTP通过将多令牌预测与真实隐藏状态轨迹对齐，解决了标准MTP的结构幻觉问题，为LLM发展更连贯的内部世界模型提供了有效方法。

Abstract: Whether Large Language Models (LLMs) develop coherent internal world models remains a core debate. While conventional Next-Token Prediction (NTP) focuses on one-step-ahead supervision, Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has shown promise in learning more structured representations. In this work, we provide a theoretical perspective analyzing the gradient inductive bias of MTP, supported by empirical evidence, showing that MTP promotes the convergence toward internal belief states by inducing representational contractivity via gradient coupling. However, we reveal that standard MTP often suffers from structural hallucinations, where discrete token supervision encourages illegal shortcuts in latent space that violate environmental constraints. To address this, we propose a novel method Latent Semantic Enhancement MTP (LSE-MTP), which anchors predictions to ground-truth hidden state trajectories. Experiments on synthetic graphs and real-world Manhattan Taxi Ride show that LSE-MTP effectively bridges the gap between discrete tokens and continuous state representations, enhancing representation alignment, reducing structural hallucinations, and improving robustness to perturbations.

</details>


### [369] [Target Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06159)
*Jean Kaddour*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: TPO是一种新的强化学习方法，将策略更新的两个问题分离：决定哪些完成应获得概率质量，以及如何调整参数实现这一变化。通过构建目标分布并最小化交叉熵损失，TPO在稀疏奖励任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统策略梯度方法将两个问题合并处理，导致更新可能因学习率、裁剪等优化器选择而过度或不足。需要一种更稳定、分离这两个问题的强化学习方法。

Method: TPO首先根据评分构建目标分布q_i ∝ p_i^old exp(u_i)，然后通过交叉熵损失将策略拟合到该目标分布。损失梯度在采样完成的对数上为p^θ - q，当策略匹配目标时消失。

Result: 在表格老虎机、Transformer序列任务和十亿参数LLM RLVR上，TPO在简单任务上与PG、PPO、GRPO、DG表现相当，在稀疏奖励任务中显著优于这些方法。

Conclusion: TPO通过分离策略更新的两个核心问题，提供了一种更稳定有效的强化学习方法，特别适用于稀疏奖励场景。

Abstract: In RL, given a prompt, we sample a group of completions from a model and score them. Two questions follow: which completions should gain probability mass, and how should the parameters move to realize that change? Standard policy-gradient methods answer both at once, so the update can overshoot or undershoot depending on the learning rate, clipping, and other optimizer choices. We introduce \emph{Target Policy Optimization} (TPO), which separates the two questions. Given scored completions, TPO constructs a target distribution $q_i \propto p_i^{\,\mathrm{old}} \exp(u_i)$ and fits the policy to it by cross-entropy. The loss gradient on sampled-completion logits is $p^θ- q$, which vanishes once the policy matches the target. On tabular bandits, transformer sequence tasks, and billion-parameter LLM RLVR, TPO matches PG, PPO, GRPO, and DG on easy tasks and substantially outperforms them under sparse reward. Code is available at https://github.com/JeanKaddour/tpo.

</details>


### [370] [In-Place Test-Time Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06169)
*Guhao Feng,Shengjie Luo,Kai Hua,Ge Zhang,Di He,Wenhao Huang,Tianle Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: In-Place TTT：一种无需重新训练的LLM测试时训练框架，通过动态更新MLP投影矩阵实现持续学习，提升长上下文任务性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统"训练后部署"范式限制了LLM在推理时动态适应新信息的能力。现有测试时训练(TTT)方法存在架构不兼容、计算效率低、目标函数与语言建模不匹配等问题，阻碍了其在LLM生态系统中的应用。

Method: 1) 将MLP块的最终投影矩阵作为可适应快速权重，实现"即插即用"增强；2) 设计理论基础的、与自回归语言建模的下一个词预测任务对齐的目标函数；3) 采用高效的分块更新机制，兼容上下文并行。

Result: 实验验证：作为即插即用增强，使4B参数模型在128k上下文任务上获得优越性能；从头预训练时，持续优于竞争性TTT相关方法。消融研究为设计选择提供了深入见解。

Conclusion: In-Place TTT是迈向LLM持续学习范式的有希望的一步，解决了TTT在LLM中的关键障碍，实现了高效、可扩展的测试时适应能力。

Abstract: The static ``train then deploy" paradigm fundamentally limits Large Language Models (LLMs) from dynamically adapting their weights in response to continuous streams of new information inherent in real-world tasks. Test-Time Training (TTT) offers a compelling alternative by updating a subset of model parameters (fast weights) at inference time, yet its potential in the current LLM ecosystem is hindered by critical barriers including architectural incompatibility, computational inefficiency and misaligned fast weight objectives for language modeling. In this work, we introduce In-Place Test-Time Training (In-Place TTT), a framework that seamlessly endows LLMs with Test-Time Training ability. In-Place TTT treats the final projection matrix of the ubiquitous MLP blocks as its adaptable fast weights, enabling a ``drop-in" enhancement for LLMs without costly retraining from scratch. Furthermore, we replace TTT's generic reconstruction objective with a tailored, theoretically-grounded objective explicitly aligned with the Next-Token-Prediction task governing autoregressive language modeling. This principled objective, combined with an efficient chunk-wise update mechanism, results in a highly scalable algorithm compatible with context parallelism. Extensive experiments validate our framework's effectiveness: as an in-place enhancement, it enables a 4B-parameter model to achieve superior performance on tasks with contexts up to 128k, and when pretrained from scratch, it consistently outperforms competitive TTT-related approaches. Ablation study results further provide deeper insights on our design choices. Collectively, our results establish In-Place TTT as a promising step towards a paradigm of continual learning in LLMs.

</details>


### [371] [Task Ecologies and the Evolution of World-Tracking Representations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05469)
*Giulio Valentino Dalla Riva*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该论文将语言模型视为演化模型生物，研究自回归下一个词元学习何时会选择世界追踪表示。提出了生态真实性概念，分析了不同Transformer架构的适用性，预测了两种特征性失败模式，并通过小规模实验验证了理论框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究语言模型作为演化模型生物，探究自回归下一个词元学习在什么条件下会选择能够追踪世界状态的表示。目标是建立关于表示选择的理论，使用小语言模型作为实验室生物，而不是模拟大规模前沿系统。

Method: 提出贝叶斯最优下一个词元交叉熵分解为不可约条件熵加Jensen-Shannon超额项的理论框架。分析不同Transformer架构（冻结密集、冻结MoE、上下文学习、任务适应）的适用性。预测两种失败模式：简单性压力优先移除低增益区分，以及训练最优模型在细化训练生态的部署生态上仍产生正超额。通过条件动态扩展和受控微GPT实验验证理论。

Result: 理论框架表明超额项当且仅当编码保持训练生态的等价类时消失，这定义了语言模型的生态真实性。冻结密集和冻结MoE Transformer满足条件，上下文学习不扩大模型的分离集，任务适应破坏前提。实验验证了静态分解、分裂合并阈值、离生态失败模式和双生态救援机制。

Conclusion: 该研究为语言模型表示选择提供了理论框架，定义了生态真实性概念，识别了不同Transformer架构的适用条件，预测了特征性失败模式，并通过小规模实验验证了理论。为理解语言模型如何通过自回归学习选择世界追踪表示提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We study language models as evolving model organisms and ask when autoregressive next-token learning selects for world-tracking representations. For any encoding of latent world states, the Bayes-optimal next-token cross-entropy decomposes into the irreducible conditional entropy plus a Jensen--Shannon excess term. That excess vanishes if and only if the encoding preserves the training ecology's equivalence classes. This yields a precise notion of ecological veridicality for language models and identifies the minimum-complexity zero-excess solution as the quotient partition by training equivalence. We then determine when this fixed-encoding analysis applies to transformer families: frozen dense and frozen Mixture-of-Experts transformers satisfy it, in-context learning does not enlarge the model's separation set, and per-task adaptation breaks the premise. The framework predicts two characteristic failure modes: simplicity pressure preferentially removes low-gain distinctions, and training-optimal models can still incur positive excess on deployment ecologies that refine the training ecology. A conditional dynamic extension shows how inter-model selection and post-training can recover such gap distinctions under explicit heredity, variation, and selection assumptions. Exact finite-ecology checks and controlled microgpt experiments validate the static decomposition, split-merge threshold, off-ecology failure pattern, and two-ecology rescue mechanism in a regime where the relevant quantities are directly observable. The goal is not to model frontier systems at scale, but to use small language models as laboratory organisms for theory about representational selection.

</details>


### [372] [AttnDiff: Attention-based Differential Fingerprinting for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05502)
*Haobo Zhang,Zhenhua Xu,Junxian Li,Shangfeng Sheng,Dezhang Kong,Meng Han*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出AttnDiff框架，通过分析注意力模式差异来检测LLM模型是否衍生自特定源模型，即使经过微调、剪枝或模型合并等操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 保护开源大语言模型的知识产权，需要验证可疑模型是否源自受害者模型，即使经过了常见的"洗白"操作如微调、剪枝/压缩和模型合并

Method: 提出AttnDiff白盒框架：1) 使用最小编辑的提示对诱导语义冲突；2) 捕获差异化的注意力模式；3) 用紧凑的谱描述符总结；4) 使用CKA比较模型

Result: 在Llama-2/3和Qwen2.5（3B-14B）等开源模型上，对相关衍生模型显示高相似度（>0.98），对不相关模型家族显示低相似度（<0.22），仅需5-60个多领域探针

Conclusion: AttnDiff能够有效支持实际的知识产权溯源验证和问责，为开源LLM的知识产权保护提供实用解决方案

Abstract: Protecting the intellectual property of open-weight large language models (LLMs) requires verifying whether a suspect model is derived from a victim model despite common laundering operations such as fine-tuning (including PPO/DPO), pruning/compression, and model merging. We propose \textsc{AttnDiff}, a data-efficient white-box framework that extracts fingerprints from models via intrinsic information-routing behavior. \textsc{AttnDiff} probes minimally edited prompt pairs that induce controlled semantic conflicts, captures differential attention patterns, summarizes them with compact spectral descriptors, and compares models using CKA. Across Llama-2/3 and Qwen2.5 (3B--14B) and additional open-source families, it yields high similarity for related derivatives while separating unrelated model families (e.g., $>0.98$ vs.\ $<0.22$ with $M=60$ probes). With 5--60 multi-domain probes, it supports practical provenance verification and accountability.

</details>


### [373] [Stealthy and Adjustable Text-Guided Backdoor Attacks on Multimodal Pretrained Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05809)
*Yiyang Zhang,Chaojian Yu,Ziming Hong,Yuanjie Shao,Qinmu Peng,Tongliang Liu,Xinge You*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对多模态预训练模型的文本引导后门攻击方法，使用文本描述中的常见词作为后门触发器，提高了隐蔽性和实用性，并通过视觉对抗扰动实现可控攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后门攻击方法主要依赖视觉或多模态触发器，但这些视觉嵌入的触发器在真实世界数据中很少出现，缺乏实用性。需要开发更隐蔽、实用的攻击方法来揭示多模态预训练模型的安全漏洞。

Method: 提出文本引导后门攻击：1）使用文本描述中的常见词作为后门触发器；2）在中毒样本上引入视觉对抗扰动来调节模型对文本触发器的学习；3）实现可控可调节的攻击。

Result: 在基于多模态预训练模型的下游任务（包括组合图像检索和视觉问答）上进行了广泛实验，证明TGB在多种现实场景下实现了实用性、隐蔽性和可调节的攻击成功率。

Conclusion: 该方法揭示了多模态预训练模型的关键安全漏洞，使用文本触发器的后门攻击更具隐蔽性和实用性，对模型安全评估提出了新挑战。

Abstract: Multimodal pretrained models are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, yet most existing methods rely on visual or multimodal triggers, which are impractical since visually embedded triggers rarely occur in real-world data. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel Text-Guided Backdoor (TGB) attack on multimodal pretrained models, where commonly occurring words in textual descriptions serve as backdoor triggers, significantly improving stealthiness and practicality. Furthermore, we introduce visual adversarial perturbations on poisoned samples to modulate the model's learning of textual triggers, enabling a controllable and adjustable TGB attack. Extensive experiments on downstream tasks built upon multimodal pretrained models, including Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) and Visual Question Answering (VQA), demonstrate that TGB achieves practicality and stealthiness with adjustable attack success rates across diverse realistic settings, revealing critical security vulnerabilities in multimodal pretrained models.

</details>


### [374] [QiMeng-PRepair: Precise Code Repair via Edit-Aware Reward Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05963)
*Changxin Ke,Rui Zhang,Jiaming Guo,Yuanbo Wen,Li Ding,Shuo Wang,Xuyuan Zhu,Xiong Peng,Di Huang,Zidong Du,Xing Hu,Qi Guo,Yunji Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: PRepair框架通过自破坏和自修复机制减少LLM在代码修复中的过度编辑问题，提高修复精度和效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在代码修复中存在过度编辑问题，过度修改会覆盖正确代码并阻碍错误定位。需要最大化重用正确代码同时只修复错误部分

Method: 提出PRepair框架：1) Self-Breaking通过受控错误注入和min-max采样生成多样化错误程序；2) Self-Repairing使用Edit-Aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (EA-GRPO)训练模型，采用编辑感知奖励鼓励最小但正确的编辑

Result: PRepair在fix_1@1指标下将修复精度提升高达31.4%，该指标综合考虑修复正确性和编辑程度。结合推测编辑显著提高解码吞吐量

Conclusion: PRepair框架有效缓解过度编辑问题，提高代码修复的精确性和实用性，为精确代码修复提供了有前景的解决方案

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong program repair performance but often suffer from over-editing, where excessive modifications overwrite correct code and hinder bug localization. We systematically quantify its impact and introduce precise repair task, which maximizes reuse of correct code while fixing only buggy parts. Building on this insight, we propose PRepair, a framework that mitigates over-editing and improves repair accuracy. PRepair has two components: Self-Breaking, which generates diverse buggy programs via controlled bug injection and min-max sampling, and Self-Repairing, which trains models with Edit-Aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (EA-GRPO) using an edit-aware reward to encourage minimal yet correct edits. Experiments show that PRepair improves repair precision by up to 31.4% under $\mathrm{fix}_1@1$, a metric that jointly considers repair correctness and extent, and significantly increases decoding throughput when combined with speculative editing, demonstrating its potential for precise and practical code repair.

</details>


### [375] [Value Mirror Descent for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06039)
*Zhichao Jia,Guanghui Lan*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的价值优化方法——价值镜像下降（VMD），将凸优化中的镜像下降整合到经典价值迭代框架中，在确定性和随机设置下均实现了理论保证，样本复杂度达到最优或接近最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 价值迭代方法在强化学习中广泛用于计算近似最优价值函数，在生成采样模型下比策略优化方法具有更优的样本复杂度。然而，现有方法在离线训练后转向在线学习时存在局限性，需要开发既能保持理论保证又能支持有效在线学习的新方法。

Method: 提出价值镜像下降（VMD）方法，将凸优化中的镜像下降整合到价值迭代框架中。在确定性设置下使用VMD，在随机设置下开发随机变体SVMD，结合方差减少技术。方法支持一般凸正则化器，在强凸正则化器下进一步优化性能。

Result: VMD在确定性设置下实现线性收敛；SVMD在一般凸正则化器下达到接近最优样本复杂度$\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-3}ε^{-2})$；在强凸正则化器下达到$\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-5}ε^{-1})$。生成策略与最优策略之间的Bregman散度在整个迭代过程中保持有界，这是现有方法不具备的重要特性。

Conclusion: VMD/SVMD方法为强化学习提供了新的价值优化框架，在保持理论最优性的同时，通过Bregman散度有界性支持有效的在线学习，填补了现有方法的空白，对强化学习和优化领域均有重要贡献。

Abstract: Value iteration-type methods have been extensively studied for computing a nearly optimal value function in reinforcement learning (RL). Under a generative sampling model, these methods can achieve sharper sample complexity than policy optimization approaches, particularly in their dependence on the discount factor. In practice, they are often employed for offline training or in simulated environments. In this paper, we consider discounted Markov decision processes with state space S, action space A, discount factor $γ\in(0,1)$ and costs in $[0,1]$. We introduce a novel value optimization method, termed value mirror descent (VMD), which integrates mirror descent from convex optimization into the classical value iteration framework. In the deterministic setting with known transition kernels, we show that VMD converges linearly. For the stochastic setting with a generative model, we develop a stochastic variant, SVMD, which incorporates variance reduction commonly used in stochastic value iteration-type methods. For RL problems with general convex regularizers, SVMD attains a near-optimal sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-3}ε^{-2})$. Moreover, we establish that the Bregman divergence between the generated and optimal policies remains bounded throughout the iterations. This property is absent in existing stochastic value iteration-type methods but is important for enabling effective online (continual) learning following offline training. Under a strongly convex regularizer, SVMD achieves sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(|S||A|(1-γ)^{-5}ε^{-1})$, improving performance in the high-accuracy regime. Furthermore, we prove convergence of the generated policy to the optimal policy. Overall, the proposed method, its analysis, and the resulting guarantees, constitute new contributions to the RL and optimization literature.

</details>


### [376] [Dynamic Linear Coregionalization for Realistic Synthetic Multivariate Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05064)
*Annita Vapsi,Penghang Liu,Saheed Obitayo,Aakriti,Manoj Cherukumalli,Prathamesh Patil,Amit Varshney,Nicolas Marchesotti,Elizabeth Fons,Vamsi K. Potluru,Manuela Veloso*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: DynLMC提出了一种动态线性协同区域化模型，用于生成具有时变相关性和跨通道滞后结构的合成时间序列数据，提升基础时间序列模型的零样本预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列合成数据生成器通常假设静态相关性，缺乏真实的跨通道依赖关系，这限制了基础时间序列模型（FMTS）的预训练效果和迁移能力。

Method: 提出了DynLMC（动态线性协同区域化模型），该模型结合了时变、机制切换的相关性和跨通道滞后结构，能够生成具有真实相关动态的多元时间序列合成数据。

Result: 在三个基础模型上使用DynLMC生成的合成数据进行微调后，在九个基准测试中获得了持续的零样本预测改进，证明了动态跨通道相关性建模的有效性。

Conclusion: 建模动态跨通道相关性能够增强基础时间序列模型的迁移能力，突出了以数据为中心的预训练方法的重要性。

Abstract: Synthetic data is essential for training foundation models for time series (FMTS), but most generators assume static correlations, and are typically missing realistic inter-channel dependencies. We introduce DynLMC, a Dynamic Linear Model of Coregionalization, that incorporates time-varying, regime-switching correlations and cross-channel lag structures. Our approach produces synthetic multivariate time series with correlation dynamics that closely resemble real data. Fine-tuning three foundational models on DynLMC-generated data yields consistent zero-shot forecasting improvements across nine benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that modeling dynamic inter-channel correlations enhances FMTS transferability, highlighting the importance of data-centric pretraining.

</details>


### [377] [Hierarchical SVG Tokenization: Learning Compact Visual Programs for Scalable Vector Graphics Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05072)
*Ximing Xing,Ziteng Xue,Zhenxi Li,Weicong Liang,Linqing Wang,Zhantao Yang,Tiankai Hang,Zijin Yin,Qinglin Lu,Chunyu Wang,Qian Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: HiVG：针对矢量图形生成的分层SVG标记化框架，通过原子标记和段标记改进几何结构表示，解决坐标碎片化和空间关系破坏问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在SVG生成中仍使用通用的字节级标记化方法，导致数值坐标被碎片化为离散符号，破坏了空间关系并引入严重的标记冗余，常导致坐标幻觉和低效的长序列生成

Method: 1) 分层SVG标记化框架：将原始SVG字符串分解为结构化原子标记，并将可执行命令-参数组压缩为几何约束的段标记；2) 分层均值-噪声初始化策略：向新标记嵌入注入数值排序信号和语义先验；3) 课程训练范式：逐步增加程序复杂度

Result: 在文本到SVG和图像到SVG任务上的广泛实验表明，相比传统标记化方案，HiVG在生成保真度、空间一致性和序列效率方面均有改进

Conclusion: HiVG通过分层标记化框架和专门的初始化策略，有效解决了SVG生成中的坐标碎片化和空间关系破坏问题，实现了更稳定可执行的SVG程序学习

Abstract: Recent large language models have shifted SVG generation from differentiable rendering optimization to autoregressive program synthesis. However, existing approaches still rely on generic byte-level tokenization inherited from natural language processing, which poorly reflects the geometric structure of vector graphics. Numerical coordinates are fragmented into discrete symbols, destroying spatial relationships and introducing severe token redundancy, often leading to coordinate hallucination and inefficient long-sequence generation. To address these challenges, we propose HiVG, a hierarchical SVG tokenization framework tailored for autoregressive vector graphics generation. HiVG decomposes raw SVG strings into structured \textit{atomic tokens} and further compresses executable command--parameter groups into geometry-constrained \textit{segment tokens}, substantially improving sequence efficiency while preserving syntactic validity. To further mitigate spatial mismatch, we introduce a Hierarchical Mean--Noise (HMN) initialization strategy that injects numerical ordering signals and semantic priors into new token embeddings. Combined with a curriculum training paradigm that progressively increases program complexity, HiVG enables more stable learning of executable SVG programs. Extensive experiments on both text-to-SVG and image-to-SVG tasks demonstrate improved generation fidelity, spatial consistency, and sequence efficiency compared with conventional tokenization schemes.

</details>


### [378] [A Theoretical Framework for Statistical Evaluability of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05324)
*Shashaank Aiyer,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Han Shao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个评估生成模型的理论框架，分析了测试基指标（如积分概率度量）和Rényi散度的可评估性，发现IPMs可以从有限样本中评估，而Rényi和KL散度则不能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型的评估比监督学习更困难，因为其开放性质使得难以确定合适的评估指标，且不清楚这些指标是否能从有限样本中可靠评估

Method: 建立理论框架分析生成模型评估，研究两类指标：测试基指标（包括积分概率度量IPMs）和Rényi散度，分析它们的可评估性

Result: IPMs相对于任何有界测试类可以从有限样本中评估，具有乘性和加性近似误差；当测试类具有有限fat-shattering维度时，IPMs可以任意精度评估；而Rényi和KL散度不能从有限样本中评估

Conclusion: 为生成模型评估提供了理论基础，明确了哪些指标可以从有限样本中可靠评估，哪些不能，对生成模型评估实践有重要指导意义

Abstract: Statistical evaluation aims to estimate the generalization performance of a model using held-out i.i.d.\ test data sampled from the ground-truth distribution. In supervised learning settings such as classification, performance metrics such as error rate are well-defined, and test error reliably approximates population error given sufficiently large datasets. In contrast, evaluation is more challenging for generative models due to their open-ended nature: it is unclear which metrics are appropriate and whether such metrics can be reliably evaluated from finite samples.
  In this work, we introduce a theoretical framework for evaluating generative models and establish evaluability results for commonly used metrics. We study two categories of metrics: test-based metrics, including integral probability metrics (IPMs), and Rényi divergences. We show that IPMs with respect to any bounded test class can be evaluated from finite samples up to multiplicative and additive approximation errors. Moreover, when the test class has finite fat-shattering dimension, IPMs can be evaluated with arbitrary precision. In contrast, Rényi and KL divergences are not evaluable from finite samples, as their values can be critically determined by rare events. We also analyze the potential and limitations of perplexity as an evaluation method.

</details>


### [379] [Same Graph, Different Likelihoods: Calibration of Autoregressive Graph Generators via Permutation-Equivalent Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05613)
*Laurits Fredsgaard,Aaron Thomas,Michael Riis Andersen,Mikkel N. Schmidt,Mahito Sugiyama*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了图生成模型中线性化不确定性(LU)的问题，发现传统负对数似然(NLL)评估存在偏差，而基于排列的线性化不确定性评估能更可靠地衡量生成分子的质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归图生成器通过顺序构建过程定义似然，但这些似然只有在同一图的所有线性化之间保持一致时才有意义。现有线性化方法（如SENT）允许同一图的多个等价线性化，导致评估不一致的问题。

Method: 提出线性化不确定性(LU)概念，通过等价线性化间负对数似然的变异系数来量化。在四个线性化策略下训练Transformer，使用两个数据集，比较NLL和LU在不同排列下的表现。

Result: 有偏排序在其原生顺序下获得较低NLL，但在随机排列下预期校准误差(ECE)高出两个数量级，表明模型只是学习了训练线性化而非底层图结构。在QM9分子图基准上，生成图的NLL与分子稳定性负相关(AUC=0.43)，而LU达到AUC=0.85，显示排列评估更可靠。

Conclusion: 传统NLL评估存在线性化偏差，而线性化不确定性(LU)提供了更可靠的生成质量评估指标，特别是在分子图生成任务中能更好地预测分子稳定性。

Abstract: Autoregressive graph generators define likelihoods via a sequential construction process, but these likelihoods are only meaningful if they are consistent across all linearizations of the same graph. Segmented Eulerian Neighborhood Trails (SENT), a recent linearization method, converts graphs into sequences that can be perfectly decoded and efficiently processed by language models, but admit multiple equivalent linearizations of the same graph. We quantify violations in assigned negative log-likelihood (NLL) using the coefficient of variation across equivalent linearizations, which we call Linearization Uncertainty (LU). Training transformers under four linearization strategies on two datasets, we show that biased orderings achieve lower NLL on their native order but exhibit expected calibration error (ECE) two orders of magnitude higher under random permutation, indicating that these models have learned their training linearization rather than the underlying graph. On the molecular graph benchmark QM9, NLL for generated graphs is negatively correlated with molecular stability (AUC $=0.43$), while LU achieves AUC $=0.85$, suggesting that permutation-based evaluation provides a more reliable quality check for generated molecules. Code is available at https://github.com/lauritsf/linearization-uncertainty

</details>


### [380] [Controllable Image Generation with Composed Parallel Token Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05730)
*Jamie Stirling,Noura Al-Moubayed,Chris G. Willcocks,Hubert P. H. Shum*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出一种理论驱动的离散概率生成过程组合方法，用于解决条件离散生成模型在组合多个输入条件时的忠实性问题，在多个数据集上显著提升性能并实现实时加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 条件离散生成模型在忠实组合多个输入条件方面存在困难，需要一种理论严谨的方法来精确指定训练数据之外的新条件组合，并实现对单个条件的强调或否定。

Method: 推导出离散概率生成过程组合的理论公式，以掩码生成（吸收扩散）为特例，结合VQ-VAE/VQ-GAN的丰富组合词汇，实现概念加权和条件组合控制。

Result: 在3个数据集（positional CLEVR、relational CLEVR和FFHQ）上平均相对错误率降低63.4%，FID平均绝对改进-9.58，同时实现2.3-12倍实时加速，并能应用于预训练文本到图像模型进行细粒度控制。

Conclusion: 提出的理论框架有效解决了条件离散生成模型的条件组合问题，在性能、速度和灵活性方面均有显著提升，为文本到图像生成提供了更精细的控制能力。

Abstract: Conditional discrete generative models struggle to faithfully compose multiple input conditions. To address this, we derive a theoretically-grounded formulation for composing discrete probabilistic generative processes, with masked generation (absorbing diffusion) as a special case. Our formulation enables precise specification of novel combinations and numbers of input conditions that lie outside the training data, with concept weighting enabling emphasis or negation of individual conditions. In synergy with the richly compositional learned vocabulary of VQ-VAE and VQ-GAN, our method attains a $63.4\%$ relative reduction in error rate compared to the previous state-of-the-art, averaged across 3 datasets (positional CLEVR, relational CLEVR and FFHQ), simultaneously obtaining an average absolute FID improvement of $-9.58$. Meanwhile, our method offers a $2.3\times$ to $12\times$ real-time speed-up over comparable methods, and is readily applied to an open pre-trained discrete text-to-image model for fine-grained control of text-to-image generation.

</details>


### [381] [Gym-Anything: Turn any Software into an Agent Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06126)
*Pranjal Aggarwal,Graham Neubig,Sean Welleck*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出了Gym-Anything框架，可将任何软件转换为交互式计算机使用环境，并创建了包含10K+长时程任务的CUA-World基准，涵盖医疗、天文、工程等领域，任务步骤可达500+。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算机使用代理研究主要局限于短时程任务和有限软件（如基础电商和操作系统配置），缺乏经济价值高的复杂软件环境，因为创建这些环境需要大量人力和时间，难以扩展。

Method: 1. 将环境创建本身构建为多智能体任务：编码智能体编写设置脚本、下载真实数据、配置软件并生成正确设置证据；独立审计智能体根据质量检查清单验证环境设置证据。2. 基于美国GDP数据中的职业分类，将该流程应用于200个软件应用。3. 创建CUA-World基准，包含训练和测试分割。4. 在测试时应用相同审计原则：使用单独的视觉语言模型审查完成轨迹并提供反馈。

Result: 1. 创建了CUA-World，包含超过10K个长时程任务，涵盖医疗科学、天文、工程和企业系统等领域，每个任务都配置了真实数据。2. 创建了CUA-World-Long基准，任务通常需要500+步骤，远超现有基准。3. 从训练分割中提取成功轨迹到2B视觉语言模型，性能超过2倍大小的模型。4. 测试时审计将Gemini-3-Flash在CUA-World-Long上的表现从11.5%提升到14.0%。

Conclusion: Gym-Anything框架能够高效创建复杂软件环境，CUA-World基准为计算机使用代理研究提供了大规模、多样化的长时程任务，多智能体审计方法在训练和测试阶段都能有效提升性能。

Abstract: Computer-use agents hold the promise of assisting in a wide range of digital economic activities. However, current research has largely focused on short-horizon tasks over a limited set of software with limited economic value, such as basic e-commerce and OS-configuration tasks. A key reason is that creating environments for complex software requires significant time and human effort, and therefore does not scale. To address this, we introduce Gym-Anything, a framework for converting any software into an interactive computer-use environment. We frame environment creation itself as a multi-agent task: a coding agent writes setup scripts, downloads real-world data, and configures the software, while producing evidence of correct setup. An independent audit agent then verifies evidence for the environment setup against a quality checklist. Using a taxonomy of economically valuable occupations grounded in U.S. GDP data, we apply this pipeline to 200 software applications with broad occupational coverage. The result is CUA-World, a collection of over 10K long-horizon tasks spanning domains from medical science and astronomy to engineering and enterprise systems, each configured with realistic data along with train and test splits. CUA-World also includes CUA-World-Long, a challenging long-horizon benchmark with tasks often requiring over 500 steps, far exceeding existing benchmarks. Distilling successful trajectories from the training split into a 2B vision-language model outperforms models 2$\times$ its size. We also apply the same auditing principle at test time: a separate VLM reviews completed trajectories and provides feedback on what remains, improving Gemini-3-Flash on CUA-World-Long from 11.5% to 14.0%. We release all code, infrastructure, and benchmark data to facilitate future research in realistic computer-use agents.

</details>


### [382] [Governance-Aware Agent Telemetry for Closed-Loop Enforcement in Multi-Agent AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05119)
*Anshul Pathak,Nishant Jain*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: GAAT是一个治理感知的智能体遥测架构，通过扩展OpenTelemetry、实时策略违规检测和分级干预机制，实现多智能体系统中遥测收集与自动化策略执行的闭环。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有企业多智能体AI系统每小时产生数千次智能体间交互，但现有可观测性工具（如OpenTelemetry和Langfuse）仅捕获依赖关系而不强制执行治理。它们将治理视为下游分析问题而非实时执行目标，导致"观察但不行动"的差距，策略违规只能在损害发生后被检测到。

Method: GAAT提出四个核心组件：1) 治理遥测模式(GTS)，扩展OpenTelemetry加入治理属性；2) 实时策略违规检测引擎，使用OPA兼容的声明式规则，延迟低于200毫秒；3) 治理执行总线(GEB)，提供分级干预机制；4) 可信遥测平面，提供加密来源证明。

Result: GAAT架构填补了多智能体系统中遥测收集与自动化策略执行之间的空白，实现了从被动观察到主动执行的转变，能够在策略违规发生时实时检测并采取干预措施。

Conclusion: GAAT为多智能体系统提供了一个治理感知的遥测参考架构，通过将治理属性集成到遥测数据中并实现实时策略执行，解决了现有可观测性工具的局限性，为可信AI系统提供了重要基础设施。

Abstract: Enterprise multi-agent AI systems produce thousands of inter-agent interactions per hour, yet existing observability tools capture these dependencies without enforcing anything. OpenTelemetry and Langfuse collect telemetry but treat governance as a downstream analytics concern, not a real-time enforcement target. The result is an "observe-but-do-not-act" gap where policy violations are detected only after damage is done.
  We present Governance-Aware Agent Telemetry (GAAT), a reference architecture that closes the loop between telemetry collection and automated policy enforcement for multi-agent systems. GAAT introduces (1) a Governance Telemetry Schema (GTS) extending OpenTelemetry with governance attributes; (2) a real-time policy violation detection engine using OPA-compatible declarative rules under sub-200 ms latency; (3) a Governance Enforcement Bus (GEB) with graduated interventions; and (4) a Trusted Telemetry Plane with cryptographic provenance.

</details>


### [383] [Spike Hijacking in Late-Interaction Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05253)
*Karthik Suresh,Tushar Vatsa,Tracy King,Asim Kadav,Michael Friedrich*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 研究发现，基于硬最大相似度（MaxSim）的检索模型存在梯度集中和长度敏感性缺陷，揭示了稀疏性与鲁棒性的权衡，为多向量检索系统提供了改进方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探究晚期交互检索模型中使用的硬最大相似度（MaxSim）池化机制的结构性偏差。MaxSim虽然有效，但其"赢家通吃"的特性可能对训练动态产生结构性偏见，特别是在梯度路由和鲁棒性方面。

Method: 研究方法包括：1）在受控合成环境中使用批次内对比训练；2）比较MaxSim与Top-k池化和softmax聚合等平滑替代方案；3）分析梯度集中程度；4）在真实多向量检索基准上进行文档长度扫描验证。

Result: 研究结果显示：1）MaxSim导致显著更高的补丁级梯度集中；2）稀疏路由虽能提升早期判别能力，但增加对文档长度的敏感性；3）随着文档补丁数量增加，MaxSim比平滑变体退化更严重；4）真实基准测试证实了硬最大池化的脆弱性。

Conclusion: 研究结论是：池化诱导的梯度集中是晚期交互检索的结构性特性，揭示了稀疏性与鲁棒性的权衡关系。这为多向量检索系统中硬最大池化的替代方案提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Late-interaction retrieval models rely on hard maximum similarity (MaxSim) to aggregate token-level similarities. Although effective, this winner-take-all pooling rule may structurally bias training dynamics. We provide a mechanistic study of gradient routing and robustness in MaxSim-based retrieval. In a controlled synthetic environment with in-batch contrastive training, we demonstrate that MaxSim induces significantly higher patch-level gradient concentration than smoother alternatives such as Top-k pooling and softmax aggregation. While sparse routing can improve early discrimination, it also increases sensitivity to document length: as the number of document patches grows, MaxSim degrades more sharply than mild smoothing variants. We corroborate these findings on a real-world multi-vector retrieval benchmark, where controlled document-length sweeps reveal similar brittleness under hard max pooling. Together, our results isolate pooling-induced gradient concentration as a structural property of late-interaction retrieval and highlight a sparsity-robustness tradeoff. These findings motivate principled alternatives to hard max pooling in multi-vector retrieval systems.

</details>


### [384] [Pixel-Translation-Equivariant Quantum Convolutional Neural Networks via Fourier Multiplexers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06094)
*Dmitry Chirkov,Igor Lobanov*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了像素循环移位等变的量子卷积神经网络（PCS-QCNN），通过量子傅里叶变换实现精确的平移等变性，并证明了在深度缩放机制下不会出现梯度消失问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统卷积神经网络的成功很大程度上归功于平移等变的硬编码。量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）作为近期量子模拟器被提出，但平移等变的概念取决于数据编码方式。现有QCNN在像素循环移位对称性方面存在不匹配问题，需要构建精确等变的量子卷积层。

Method: 1. 形式化像素循环移位（PCS）对称性不匹配问题
2. 构建与PCS对称性精确对易的QCNN层
3. 核心技术：通过量子傅里叶变换对角化平移操作，证明所有PCS等变酉操作都是傅里叶模式复用器后接逆QFT
4. 提出深度PCS-QCNN架构，包含测量诱导池化、延迟条件化和层间QFT抵消
5. 分析随机初始化时的可训练性

Result: 1. 成功构建了PCS等变的量子卷积神经网络层
2. 证明了在深度缩放机制下，期望平方梯度范数有下界保持常数，排除了深度诱导的梯度消失问题
3. 提供了PCS等变酉操作的完整构造性表征

Conclusion: 该研究为量子卷积神经网络提供了精确的平移等变性框架，解决了编码相关的对称性不匹配问题，并通过理论分析证明了在深度缩放机制下的可训练性，为量子机器学习架构设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Convolutional neural networks owe much of their success to hard-coding translation equivariance. Quantum convolutional neural networks (QCNNs) have been proposed as near-term quantum analogues, but the relevant notion of translation depends on the data encoding. For address/amplitude encodings such as FRQI, a pixel shift acts as modular addition on an index register, whereas many MERA-inspired QCNNs are equivariant only under cyclic permutations of physical qubits. We formalize this mismatch and construct QCNN layers that commute exactly with the pixel cyclic shift (PCS) symmetry induced by the encoding. Our main technical result is a constructive characterization of all PCS-equivariant unitaries: conjugation by the quantum Fourier transform (QFT) diagonalizes translations, so any PCS-equivariant layer is a Fourier-mode multiplexer followed by an inverse QFT (IQFT). Building on this characterization, we introduce a deep PCS-QCNN with measurement-induced pooling, deferred conditioning, and inter-layer QFT cancellation. We also analyze trainability at random initialization and prove a lower bound on the expected squared gradient norm that remains constant in a depth-scaling regime, ruling out a depth-induced barren plateau in that sense.

</details>


### [385] [Territory Paint Wars: Diagnosing and Mitigating Failure Modes in Competitive Multi-Agent PPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04983)
*Diyansha Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Territory Paint Wars——一个基于Unity的竞争性多智能体强化学习环境，用于系统研究PPO在自博弈中的失效模式。研究发现PPO在对称零和游戏中表现不佳，识别了5个实现层面的失效模式，并发现了竞争性过拟合现象，提出了对手混合策略来缓解该问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是系统性地探究PPO在竞争性多智能体强化学习环境中的失效模式。当前自博弈训练存在诸多挑战，但缺乏系统性的失效模式分析。作者希望通过一个最小化的竞争环境来识别和解决这些问题，为MARL研究提供可复现的基准。

Method: 方法包括：1）开发Territory Paint Wars环境（Unity实现）；2）使用PPO进行自博弈训练；3）通过控制变量实验识别5个实现层面的失效模式；4）发现竞争性过拟合现象；5）提出对手混合策略（20%训练轮次使用固定随机策略对手）来缓解过拟合。

Result: 结果：1）初始PPO训练仅获得26.8%胜率；2）修正5个失效模式后，泛化胜率提升至73.5%；3）发现竞争性过拟合导致泛化胜率降至21.6%；4）对手混合策略恢复泛化胜率至77.1%（±12.6%，10次种子）。

Conclusion: 结论：PPO在竞争性MARL中存在多种失效模式，包括实现层面的技术问题和竞争性过拟合现象。对手混合策略是缓解竞争性过拟合的有效方法。该研究为MARL失效模式分析提供了可复现的基准环境。

Abstract: We present Territory Paint Wars, a minimal competitive multi-agent reinforcement learning environment implemented in Unity, and use it to systematically investigate failure modes of Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO) under self-play. A first agent trained for $84{,}000$ episodes achieves only $26.8\%$ win rate against a uniformly-random opponent in a symmetric zero-sum game. Through controlled ablations we identify five implementation-level failure modes -- reward-scale imbalance, missing terminal signal, ineffective long-horizon credit assignment, unnormalised observations, and incorrect win detection -- each of which contributes critically to this failure in this setting.
  After correcting these issues, we uncover a distinct emergent pathology: competitive overfitting, where co-adapting agents maintain stable self-play performance while generalisation win rate collapses from $73.5\%$ to $21.6\%$. Critically, this failure is undetectable via standard self-play metrics: both agents co-adapt equally, so the self-play win rate remains near $50\%$ throughout the collapse.
  We propose a minimal intervention -- opponent mixing, where $20\%$ of training episodes substitute a fixed uniformly-random policy for the co-adaptive opponent -- which mitigates competitive overfitting and restores generalisation to $77.1\%$ ($\pm 12.6\%$, $10$ seeds) without population-based training or additional infrastructure. We open-source Territory Paint Wars to provide a reproducible benchmark for studying competitive MARL failure modes.

</details>


### [386] [Prune-Quantize-Distill: An Ordered Pipeline for Efficient Neural Network Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04988)
*Longsheng Zhou,Yu Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种针对CPU推理的压缩管道，结合了非结构化剪枝、INT8量化感知训练和知识蒸馏三种技术，通过有序组合实现更好的准确率-大小-延迟权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代部署需要在CPU和内存限制下权衡准确率和效率，但常见的压缩代理指标（如参数量、FLOPs）不能可靠预测实际推理时间。非结构化稀疏性虽然能减少模型存储，但由于不规则内存访问和稀疏核开销，有时反而会减慢标准CPU执行。因此需要研究能直接针对实测延迟的实用压缩方法。

Method: 提出一个有序的三阶段压缩管道：1) 非结构化剪枝作为容量减少的预调节器；2) INT8量化感知训练提供主要的运行时加速；3) 知识蒸馏在稀疏INT8约束下恢复准确率而不改变部署形式。在CIFAR-10/100数据集上使用ResNet-18、WRN-28-10和VGG-16-BN三个骨干网络进行评估。

Result: 有序管道在所有设置下都实现了比任何单一技术更好的准确率-大小-延迟边界，达到0.99-1.42 ms CPU延迟，同时保持有竞争力的准确率和紧凑的检查点。控制顺序消融实验（固定20/40/40 epoch分配）证实阶段顺序很重要，提出的顺序在测试的排列中表现最佳。

Conclusion: 研究结果为边缘部署提供了简单指导：使用实测运行时间来评估压缩选择，而不是仅仅依赖代理指标。INT8量化感知训练提供主要的运行时优势，剪枝主要作为容量减少的预调节器，知识蒸馏在约束条件下恢复准确率。

Abstract: Modern deployment often requires trading accuracy for efficiency under tight CPU and memory constraints, yet common compression proxies such as parameter count or FLOPs do not reliably predict wall-clock inference time. In particular, unstructured sparsity can reduce model storage while failing to accelerate (and sometimes slightly slowing down) standard CPU execution due to irregular memory access and sparse kernel overhead. Motivated by this gap between compression and acceleration, we study a practical, ordered pipeline that targets measured latency by combining three widely used techniques: unstructured pruning, INT8 quantization-aware training (QAT), and knowledge distillation (KD). Empirically, INT8 QAT provides the dominant runtime benefit, while pruning mainly acts as a capacity-reduction pre-conditioner that improves the robustness of subsequent low-precision optimization; KD, applied last, recovers accuracy within the already constrained sparse INT8 regime without changing the deployment form. We evaluate on CIFAR-10/100 using three backbones (ResNet-18, WRN-28-10, and VGG-16-BN). Across all settings, the ordered pipeline achieves a stronger accuracy-size-latency frontier than any single technique alone, reaching 0.99-1.42 ms CPU latency with competitive accuracy and compact checkpoints. Controlled ordering ablations with a fixed 20/40/40 epoch allocation further confirm that stage order is consequential, with the proposed ordering generally performing best among the tested permutations. Overall, our results provide a simple guideline for edge deployment: evaluate compression choices in the joint accuracy-size-latency space using measured runtime, rather than proxy metrics alone.

</details>


### [387] [Blind-Spot Mass: A Good-Turing Framework for Quantifying Deployment Coverage Risk in Machine Learning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05057)
*Biplab Pal,Santanu Bhattacharya,Madanjit Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出盲点质量（blind-spot mass）作为评估机器学习部署覆盖风险的Good-Turing框架，用于量化在有限训练数据中结构上支持不足但有效的罕见状态的风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代ML系统的操作状态分布通常是重尾的，意味着大量有效但罕见的状态在有限的训练和评估数据中结构上支持不足。这导致"覆盖盲区"：模型在标准测试集上表现准确，但在部署状态空间的大片区域中仍不可靠。

Method: 提出盲点质量B_n(τ)，使用Good-Turing未观测物种估计来计算，估计经验支持低于阈值τ的状态的总概率质量。进一步推导出覆盖强加的准确率上限，将整体性能分解为支持部分和盲点部分。

Result: 在可穿戴人类活动识别（HAR）和MIMIC-IV医院数据库（275个入院记录）中验证了该框架。盲点质量曲线在τ=5时收敛到相同的95%，表明该方法在不同领域具有普适性。

Conclusion: 盲点质量是一个通用的ML方法，用于量化组合覆盖风险，而非特定应用的产物。盲点分解识别哪些活动或临床状态主导风险，为工业实践者提供有针对性的数据收集、归一化和安全部署的指导。

Abstract: Blind-spot mass is a Good-Turing framework for quantifying deployment coverage risk in machine learning. In modern ML systems, operational state distributions are often heavy-tailed, implying that a long tail of valid but rare states is structurally under-supported in finite training and evaluation data. This creates a form of 'coverage blindness': models can appear accurate on standard test sets yet remain unreliable across large regions of the deployment state space.
  We propose blind-spot mass B_n(tau), a deployment metric estimating the total probability mass assigned to states whose empirical support falls below a threshold tau. B_n(tau) is computed using Good-Turing unseen-species estimation and yields a principled estimate of how much of the operational distribution lies in reliability-critical, under-supported regimes. We further derive a coverage-imposed accuracy ceiling, decomposing overall performance into supported and blind components and separating capacity limits from data limits.
  We validate the framework in wearable human activity recognition (HAR) using wrist-worn inertial data. We then replicate the same analysis in the MIMIC-IV hospital database with 275 admissions, where the blind-spot mass curve converges to the same 95% at tau = 5 across clinical state abstractions. This replication across structurally independent domains - differing in modality, feature space, label space, and application - shows that blind-spot mass is a general ML methodology for quantifying combinatorial coverage risk, not an application-specific artifact.
  Blind-spot decomposition identifies which activities or clinical regimes dominate risk, providing actionable guidance for industrial practitioners on targeted data collection, normalization/renormalization, and physics- or domain-informed constraints for safer deployment.

</details>


### [388] [Cross-fitted Proximal Learning for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05185)
*Nishanth Venkatesh,Andreas A. Malikopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一种K折交叉拟合的桥函数估计方法，用于解决带隐藏混杂的离线强化学习中的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在离线强化学习中，当存在隐藏混杂变量时，直接从观测数据学习的模型可能存在偏差。这个问题在部分可观测系统中尤为突出，因为潜在因素可能同时影响动作、奖励和未来观测。需要开发更有效的统计估计方法来处理这种带混杂的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程

Method: 将桥函数学习表述为带有条件矩限制的问题，其中nuisance对象由条件均值嵌入和条件密度给出。开发了现有两阶段桥估计器的K折交叉拟合扩展，保留原始基于桥的识别策略，同时比单一样本分割更有效地利用可用数据

Result: 提出了交叉拟合估计器，并推导了其oracle-comparator界，将误差分解为nuisance估计引起的阶段I误差和经验平均引起的阶段II误差

Conclusion: 该方法为带隐藏混杂的离线强化学习中的部分可观测系统提供了更有效的统计估计框架，通过交叉拟合提高了数据利用效率

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning is attractive for sequential decision-making because it explicitly estimates reward and transition models and then supports planning through simulated rollouts. In offline settings with hidden confounding, however, models learned directly from observational data may be biased. This challenge is especially pronounced in partially observable systems, where latent factors may jointly affect actions, rewards, and future observations. Recent work has shown that policy evaluation in such confounded partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) can be reduced to estimating reward-emission and observation-transition bridge functions satisfying conditional moment restrictions (CMRs). In this paper, we study the statistical estimation of these bridge functions. We formulate bridge learning as a CMR problem with nuisance objects given by a conditional mean embedding and a conditional density. We then develop a $K$-fold cross-fitted extension of the existing two-stage bridge estimator. The proposed procedure preserves the original bridge-based identification strategy while using the available data more efficiently than a single sample split. We also derive an oracle-comparator bound for the cross-fitted estimator and decompose the resulting error into a Stage I term induced by nuisance estimation and a Stage II term induced by empirical averaging.

</details>


### [389] [Reproducing AlphaZero on Tablut: Self-Play RL for an Asymmetric Board Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05476)
*Tõnis Lees,Tambet Matiisen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 将AlphaZero算法应用于非对称历史棋盘游戏Tablut，通过为不同玩家角色设计独立策略/价值头，并采用数据增强、增大回放缓冲区等技术解决训练不稳定问题，验证了自博弈框架在高度非对称游戏中的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AlphaZero算法在对称游戏中表现优异，但在非对称游戏（如Tablut）中，单一网络需要学习相互冲突的评估函数，这会降低学习效率和性能。本研究旨在探索如何将AlphaZero的自博弈框架有效应用于高度非对称的游戏环境。

Method: 修改AlphaZero核心架构：为攻击者和防御者分别设计独立的策略和价值头，同时保留共享的残差主干网络来学习共同的棋盘特征。采用C4数据增强、增大回放缓冲区大小、让模型与随机采样的历史检查点进行25%训练对局等技术来缓解训练不稳定和灾难性遗忘问题。

Result: 经过100次自博弈迭代，改进后的模型表现出稳定提升，相对于随机初始化基线的BayesElo评分为1235。训练指标显示策略熵显著降低，平均剩余棋子数减少，表明游戏策略更加专注和果断。

Conclusion: AlphaZero的自博弈框架可以成功迁移到高度非对称游戏中，但需要为不同玩家角色设计独立的策略/价值头，并采用稳健的稳定化技术来解决训练过程中的不稳定性问题。

Abstract: This work investigates the adaptation of the AlphaZero reinforcement learning algorithm to Tablut, an asymmetric historical board game featuring unequal piece counts and distinct player objectives (king capture versus king escape). While the original AlphaZero architecture successfully leverages a single policy and value head for symmetric games, applying it to asymmetric environments forces the network to learn two conflicting evaluation functions, which can hinder learning efficiency and performance. To address this, the core architecture is modified to use separate policy and value heads for each player role, while maintaining a shared residual trunk to learn common board features. During training, the asymmetric structure introduced training instabilities, notably catastrophic forgetting between the attacker and defender roles. These issues were mitigated by applying C4 data augmentation, increasing the replay buffer size, and having the model play 25 percent of training games against randomly sampled past checkpoints. Over 100 self-play iterations, the modified model demonstrated steady improvement, achieving a BayesElo rating of 1235 relative to a randomly initialized baseline. Training metrics also showed a significant decrease in policy entropy and average remaining pieces, reflecting increasingly focused and decisive play. Ultimately, the experiments confirm that AlphaZero's self-play framework can transfer to highly asymmetric games, provided that distinct policy/value heads and robust stabilization techniques are employed.

</details>


### [390] [Hidden in the Multiplicative Interaction: Uncovering Fragility in Multimodal Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05834)
*Tillmann Rheude,Stefan Hegselmann,Roland Eils,Benjamin Wild*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Gated Symile通过引入门控机制改进Symile多模态对比学习，自适应调节不可靠模态的贡献，提高在模态不对齐、信息弱或缺失情况下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Symile方法对称处理所有模态，未显式建模模态可靠性差异。在实际应用中，图像-文本之外的模态可能存在不对齐、信息弱或缺失问题，统一处理会降低性能。这种脆弱性可能被乘法交互隐藏，即使单个不可靠模态也会污染乘积项。

Method: 提出Gated Symile，基于注意力的对比门控机制，按候选样本自适应调节模态贡献。门控通过将嵌入向可学习中性方向插值来抑制不可靠输入，并在可靠跨模态对齐不可能时提供显式NULL选项。

Result: 在控制合成基准和三个真实世界三模态数据集上，Gated Symile比调优良好的Symile和CLIP模型获得更高的top-1检索准确率。

Conclusion: 门控是迈向在非完美和超过两个模态情况下鲁棒多模态对比学习的一步，能有效处理模态可靠性差异问题。

Abstract: Multimodal contrastive learning is increasingly enriched by going beyond image-text pairs. Among recent contrastive methods, Symile is a strong approach for this challenge because its multiplicative interaction objective captures higher-order cross-modal dependence. Yet, we find that Symile treats all modalities symmetrically and does not explicitly model reliability differences, a limitation that becomes especially present in trimodal multiplicative interactions. In practice, modalities beyond image-text pairs can be misaligned, weakly informative, or missing, and treating them uniformly can silently degrade performance. This fragility can be hidden in the multiplicative interaction: Symile may outperform pairwise CLIP even if a single unreliable modality silently corrupts the product terms. We propose Gated Symile, a contrastive gating mechanism that adapts modality contributions on an attention-based, per-candidate basis. The gate suppresses unreliable inputs by interpolating embeddings toward learnable neutral directions and incorporating an explicit NULL option when reliable cross-modal alignment is unlikely. Across a controlled synthetic benchmark that uncovers this fragility and three real-world trimodal datasets for which such failures could be masked by averages, Gated Symile achieves higher top-1 retrieval accuracy than well-tuned Symile and CLIP models. More broadly, our results highlight gating as a step toward robust multimodal contrastive learning under imperfect and more than two modalities.

</details>


### [391] [Gated-SwinRMT: Unifying Swin Windowed Attention with Retentive Manhattan Decay via Input-Dependent Gating](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06014)
*Dipan Maity,Suman Mondal,Arindam Roy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Gated-SwinRMT是一种混合视觉Transformer，结合了Swin Transformer的移位窗口注意力和Retentive Networks的曼哈顿距离空间衰减，通过输入相关门控增强。提出了两个变体：Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT和Gated-SwinRMT-Retention，在Mini-ImageNet上分别达到80.22%和78.20%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结合Swin Transformer的移位窗口注意力和Retentive Networks的空间衰减机制，通过输入相关门控来增强模型表达能力，解决传统注意力机制中的低秩瓶颈问题，提高视觉任务的性能。

Method: 将自注意力分解为宽度方向和高度方向的连续保留传递，在每个移位窗口内使用每头指数衰减掩码提供二维局部先验。提出两个变体：1) SWAT变体使用sigmoid激活替代softmax，实现平衡的ALiBi斜率，通过SwiGLU门控值投影；2) Retention变体保留softmax归一化保留，添加对数空间衰减偏置，并引入显式G1 sigmoid门控来缓解低秩瓶颈。

Result: 在Mini-ImageNet上，Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT达到80.22% top-1准确率，Gated-SwinRMT-Retention达到78.20%，相比RMT基线的73.74%有显著提升。在CIFAR-10上，由于小特征图导致自适应窗口机制崩溃，准确率优势从+6.48pp压缩到+0.56pp。

Conclusion: Gated-SwinRMT通过结合移位窗口注意力、空间衰减机制和输入相关门控，有效提升了视觉Transformer的性能，特别是在中等规模图像分类任务上表现优异。但在小特征图场景下，自适应窗口机制的效果有限。

Abstract: We introduce Gated-SwinRMT, a family of hybrid vision transformers that combine the shifted-window attention of the Swin Transformer with the Manhattan-distance spatial decay of Retentive Networks (RMT), augmented by input-dependent gating. Self-attention is decomposed into consecutive width-wise and height-wise retention passes within each shifted window, where per-head exponential decay masks provide a two-dimensional locality prior without learned positional biases.
  Two variants are proposed. \textbf{Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT} substitutes softmax with sigmoid activation, implements balanced ALiBi slopes with multiplicative post-activation spatial decay, and gates the value projection via SwiGLU; the Normalized output implicitly suppresses uninformative attention scores. \textbf{Gated-SwinRMT-Retention} retains softmax-normalized retention with an additive log-space decay bias and incorporates an explicit G1 sigmoid gate -- projected from the block input and applied after local context enhancement (LCE) but prior to the output projection~$W_O$ -- to alleviate the low-rank $W_V \!\cdot\! W_O$ bottleneck and enable input-dependent suppression of attended outputs.
  We assess both variants on Mini-ImageNet ($224{\times}224$, 100 classes) and CIFAR-10 ($32{\times}32$, 10 classes) under identical training protocols, utilizing a single GPU due to resource limitations. At ${\approx}77$--$79$\,M parameters, Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT achieves $80.22\%$ and Gated-SwinRMT-Retention $78.20\%$ top-1 test accuracy on Mini-ImageNet, compared with $73.74\%$ for the RMT baseline. On CIFAR-10 -- where small feature maps cause the adaptive windowing mechanism to collapse attention to global scope -- the accuracy advantage compresses from $+6.48$\,pp to $+0.56$\,pp.

</details>


### [392] [Sparse Autoencoders as a Steering Basis for Phase Synchronization in Graph-Based CFD Surrogates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04946)
*Yeping Hu,Ruben Glatt,Shusen Liu*

Main category: cs.CE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出相位引导框架，通过稀疏自编码器解耦图神经网络CFD模型的潜在表示，结合希尔伯特分析和SVD实现时间相干、相位感知的干预，纠正振荡流中的相位漂移问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于图的CFD代理模型虽然计算快速，但其不透明的潜在空间和有限的可控性限制了在安全关键场景中的应用。振荡流中的相位漂移问题（预测保持定性正确但逐渐失去时间对齐）限制了数字孪生和闭环控制的应用，而重新训练成本高昂且部署时不实用

Method: 1) 使用稀疏自编码器(SAE)对冻结的MeshGraphNet嵌入进行解耦表示学习；2) 通过希尔伯特分析识别振荡特征对；3) 通过SVD将空间场投影到低秩时间系数；4) 应用平滑时变旋转来提前或延迟周期模式，同时保持振幅-相位结构

Result: 稀疏解耦表示在相位引导方面优于密集或纠缠表示，静态干预在动态设置中失败。SAE引导优于PCA和原始嵌入空间，表明稀疏特征既可用于可解释性，也可作为物理上有意义的控制轴

Conclusion: 当干预尊重底层动力学时，潜在空间引导可以从语义领域扩展到时间依赖的物理系统。用于可解释性的稀疏特征也可以作为物理上有意义的控制轴

Abstract: Graph-based surrogate models provide fast alternatives to high-fidelity CFD solvers, but their opaque latent spaces and limited controllability restrict use in safety-critical settings. A key failure mode in oscillatory flows is phase drift, where predictions remain qualitatively correct but gradually lose temporal alignment with observations, limiting use in digital twins and closed-loop control. Correcting this through retraining is expensive and impractical during deployment. We ask whether phase drift can instead be corrected post hoc by manipulating the latent space of a frozen surrogate. We propose a phase-steering framework for pretrained graph-based CFD models that combines the right representation with the right intervention mechanism. To obtain disentangled representation for effective steering, we use sparse autoencoders (SAEs) on frozen MeshGraphNet embeddings. To steer dynamics, we move beyond static per-feature interventions such as scaling or clamping, and introduce a temporally coherent, phase-aware method. Specifically, we identify oscillatory feature pairs with Hilbert analysis, project spatial fields into low-rank temporal coefficients via SVD, and apply smooth time-varying rotations to advance or delay periodic modes while preserving amplitude-phase structure. Using a representation-agnostic setup, we compare SAE-based steering with PCA and raw embedding spaces under the same intervention pipeline. Results show that sparse, disentangled representations outperform dense or entangled ones, while static interventions fail in this dynamical setting. Overall, this work shows that latent-space steering can be extended from semantic domains to time-dependent physical systems when interventions respect the underlying dynamics, and that the same sparse features used for interpretability can also serve as physically meaningful control axes.

</details>


### [393] [Belief Dynamics for Detecting Behavioral Shifts in Safe Collaborative Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04967)
*Devashri Naik,Divake Kumar,Nastaran Darabi,Amit Ranjan Trivedi*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出UA-TOM，一个轻量级信念追踪模块，用于检测协作机器人任务中的行为策略切换，通过选择性状态空间动态、因果注意力和预测误差信号增强冻结的视觉-语言-动作控制骨干网络，显著减少碰撞风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人在共享工作空间操作时，需要与其他可能中途改变策略的智能体保持安全协调。如果协作智能体在任务执行中切换策略，继续使用过时的假设会导致不安全动作和碰撞风险增加。因此，可靠检测这种行为策略切换至关重要。

Method: 提出UA-TOM（Unassisted Tracking of Others' Models）模块，采用选择性状态空间动态、因果注意力和预测误差信号来增强冻结的视觉-语言-动作控制骨干网络。该模块通过信念追踪来检测行为策略切换，无需修改基础策略。

Result: 在ManiSkill共享工作空间操作任务中，启用检测可将切换后碰撞减少52%。UA-TOM在±3步容忍度下达到85.7%检测率（无辅助方法中最高），近距离时间仅4.8步，优于Oracle的5.3步。分析显示隐藏状态更新幅度在策略切换时增加17倍，并在约10个时间步内衰减。

Conclusion: UA-TOM提供了一种轻量级、高效的策略切换检测方法，通过选择性状态空间动态、因果注意力和预测误差信号的组合，能够可靠检测协作智能体的行为变化，显著提高机器人操作的安全性，同时引入最小的推理开销。

Abstract: Robots operating in shared workspaces must maintain safe coordination with other agents whose behavior may change during task execution. When a collaborating agent switches strategy mid-episode, continuing under outdated assumptions can lead to unsafe actions and increased collision risk. Reliable detection of such behavioral regime changes is therefore critical. We study regime-switch detection under controlled non-stationarity in ManiSkill shared-workspace manipulation tasks. Across ten detection methods and five random seeds, enabling detection reduces post-switch collisions by 52%. However, average performance hides significant reliability differences: under a realistic tolerance of +-3 steps, detection ranges from 86% to 30%, while under +-5 steps all methods achieve 100%. We introduce UA-TOM, a lightweight belief-tracking module that augments frozen vision-language-action (VLA) control backbones using selective state-space dynamics, causal attention, and prediction-error signals. Across five seeds and 1200 episodes, UA-TOM achieves the highest detection rate among unassisted methods (85.7% at +-3) and the lowest close-range time (4.8 steps), outperforming an Oracle (5.3 steps). Analysis shows hidden-state update magnitude increases by 17x at regime switches and decays over roughly 10 timesteps, while the discretization step converges to a near-constant value (Delta_t approx 0.78), indicating sensitivity driven by learned dynamics rather than input-dependent gating. Cross-domain experiments in Overcooked show complementary roles of causal attention and prediction-error signals. UA-TOM introduces 7.4 ms inference overhead (14.8% of a 50 ms control budget), enabling reliable regime-switch detection without modifying the base policy.

</details>


### [394] [On the Exploitability of FTRL Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05129)
*Yiheng Su,Emmanouil-Vasileios Vlatakis-Gkaragkounis*

Main category: cs.GT

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在两人零和博弈中，具有恒定步长η的FTRL学习者的可剥削性，揭示了剥削性是FTRL家族的内在特征而非特定实例的产物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究FTRL学习者在对抗性环境中的脆弱性，特别是在面对具有完全信息的对手时。传统分析可能低估了FTRL算法的可剥削性，本文旨在系统性地分析这种脆弱性的理论边界和机制。

Method: 采用理论分析方法，针对两种对手策略：固定对手和交替对手。建立剥削性的下界理论，分析正则化器几何特性（陡峭与非陡峭）对剥削性的影响，并提出易感性度量来量化不同正则化器的脆弱性。

Result: 1. 对于固定对手，剥削性下界为Ω(N/η)，与学习者次优动作数量N成正比，随η减小而增大；2. 对于交替对手，在随机博弈中高概率保证Ω(ηT/poly(n,m))的盈余；3. 发现几何二分：非陡峭正则化器允许对手通过有限时间消除次优动作获得最大盈余，而陡峭正则化器仅引入可忽略的修正。

Conclusion: 剥削性是FTRL算法的固有特征，而非实现细节的产物。正则化器的几何特性（陡峭性）决定了剥削性的程度和机制。即使在双边收益不确定的情况下，这种脆弱性仍然存在，需要设计更鲁棒的算法。

Abstract: In this paper we investigate the exploitability of a Follow-the-Regularized-Leader (FTRL) learner with constant step size $η$ in $n\times m$ two-player zero-sum games played over $T$ rounds against a clairvoyant optimizer. In contrast with prior analysis, we show that exploitability is an inherent feature of the FTRL family, rather than an artifact of specific instantiations. First, for fixed optimizer, we establish a sweeping law of order $Ω(N/η)$, proving that exploitation scales to the number of the learner's suboptimal actions $N$ and vanishes in their absence. Second, for alternating optimizer, a surplus of $Ω(ηT/\mathrm{poly}(n,m))$ can be guaranteed regardless of the equilibrium structure, with high probability, in random games. Our analysis uncovers once more the sharp geometric dichotomy: non-steep regularizers allow the optimizer to extract maximum surplus via finite-time elimination of suboptimal actions, whereas steep ones introduce a vanishing correction that may delay exploitation. Finally, we discuss whether this leverage persists under bilateral payoff uncertainty and we propose susceptibility measure to quantify which regularizers are most vulnerable to strategic manipulation.

</details>


### [395] [Retrieve-then-Adapt: Retrieval-Augmented Test-Time Adaptation for Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05379)
*Xing Tang,Jingyang Bin,Ziqiang Cui,Xiaokun Zhang,Fuyuan Lyu,Jingyan Jiang,Dugang Liu,Chen Ma,Xiuqiang He*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出ReAd框架，通过检索相似用户偏好信号实现序列推荐模型的测试时自适应，解决传统方法在实时偏好漂移时的分布偏移问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 序列推荐模型通常在历史数据上训练，但在推理时难以适应实时偏好变化，主要面临分布偏移和参数化约束的挑战。现有方法（测试时训练、测试时增强、检索增强微调）要么计算开销大，要么依赖随机增强策略，或需要精心设计的两阶段训练范式

Method: 提出Retrieve-then-Adapt (ReAd)框架：1) 从构建的协同记忆数据库中检索测试用户的协同相似物品；2) 轻量级检索学习模块将这些物品整合为信息增强嵌入，捕捉协同信号和预测细化线索；3) 通过融合机制将增强嵌入整合到初始SR预测中进行细化

Result: 在五个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，ReAd始终优于现有的序列推荐方法

Conclusion: ReAd框架通过有效增强和高效适应实现了序列推荐模型的测试时自适应，解决了实时偏好漂移问题，在多个数据集上取得了优越性能

Abstract: The sequential recommendation (SR) task aims to predict the next item based on users' historical interaction sequences. Typically trained on historical data, SR models often struggle to adapt to real-time preference shifts during inference due to challenges posed by distributional divergence and parameterized constraints. Existing approaches to address this issue include test-time training, test-time augmentation, and retrieval-augmented fine-tuning. However, these methods either introduce significant computational overhead, rely on random augmentation strategies, or require a carefully designed two-stage training paradigm. In this paper, we argue that the key to effective test-time adaptation lies in achieving both effective augmentation and efficient adaptation. To this end, we propose Retrieve-then-Adapt (ReAd), a novel framework that dynamically adapts a deployed SR model to the test distribution through retrieved user preference signals. Specifically, given a trained SR model, ReAd first retrieves collaboratively similar items for a test user from a constructed collaborative memory database. A lightweight retrieval learning module then integrates these items into an informative augmentation embedding that captures both collaborative signals and prediction-refinement cues. Finally, the initial SR prediction is refined via a fusion mechanism that incorporates this embedding. Extensive experiments across five benchmark datasets demonstrate that ReAd consistently outperforms existing SR methods.

</details>


### [396] [Hierarchical Contrastive Learning for Multimodal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05462)
*Huichao Li,Junhan Yu,Doudou Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出分层对比学习（HCL）框架，学习多模态数据中的全局共享、部分共享和模态特定表示，通过分层潜变量建模和结构感知对比目标解决传统共享-私有分解的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多模态表示学习采用共享-私有二分法，将信息分为所有模态共享或单一模态特有。这种二元视图存在不足：许多因素仅由部分模态共享，忽略这种部分共享会导致过度对齐无关信号并掩盖互补信息。

Method: 提出分层对比学习（HCL）框架，结合分层潜变量建模、结构稀疏性和结构感知对比目标。该框架学习全局共享、部分共享和模态特定表示，仅对齐真正共享潜因子的模态。

Result: 在无关潜变量假设下，证明了分层分解的可识别性，建立了加载矩阵的恢复保证，并推导了下游预测的参数估计和超额风险界限。模拟实验显示能准确恢复分层结构并有效选择任务相关组件。在多模态电子健康记录上，HCL产生更具信息量的表示并持续改善预测性能。

Conclusion: HCL框架通过分层表示学习有效捕捉多模态数据中的复杂共享模式，超越传统的共享-私有二分法，在多模态表示学习任务中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Multimodal representation learning is commonly built on a shared-private decomposition, treating latent information as either common to all modalities or specific to one. This binary view is often inadequate: many factors are shared by only subsets of modalities, and ignoring such partial sharing can over-align unrelated signals and obscure complementary information. We propose Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HCL), a framework that learns globally shared, partially shared, and modality-specific representations within a unified model. HCL combines a hierarchical latent-variable formulation with structural sparsity and a structure-aware contrastive objective that aligns only modalities that genuinely share a latent factor. Under uncorrelated latent variables, we prove identifiability of the hierarchical decomposition, establish recovery guarantees for the loading matrices, and derive parameter estimation and excess-risk bounds for downstream prediction. Simulations show accurate recovery of hierarchical structure and effective selection of task-relevant components. On multimodal electronic health records, HCL yields more informative representations and consistently improves predictive performance.

</details>


### [397] [Brain-to-Speech: Prosody Feature Engineering and Transformer-Based Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05751)
*Mohammed Salah Al-Radhi,Géza Németh,Andon Tchechmedjiev,Binbin Xu*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从颅内脑电图(iEEG)数据进行脑到语音合成的新方法，通过韵律感知特征工程和先进的基于Transformer的模型实现高保真语音重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着直接从大脑活动解码语音的兴趣日益增长，本文整合神经科学、人工智能和信号处理，旨在为语音障碍患者开发辅助通信技术。

Method: 1) 从复杂iEEG信号中提取关键韵律特征(语调、音高、节奏)的新流程；2) 专门为脑到语音任务设计的Transformer编码器架构，整合韵律特征增强语音重建。

Result: 在定量和感知指标上均优于传统基线方法(Griffin-Lim和CNN重建)，生成的语音具有更好的可懂度和表现力。

Conclusion: 该方法推动了AI驱动的神经修复术发展，为恢复语音障碍患者通信铺平道路，未来研究方向包括扩散模型集成和实时推理系统。

Abstract: This chapter presents a novel approach to brain-to-speech (BTS) synthesis from intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) data, emphasizing prosody-aware feature engineering and advanced transformer-based models for high-fidelity speech reconstruction. Driven by the increasing interest in decoding speech directly from brain activity, this work integrates neuroscience, artificial intelligence, and signal processing to generate accurate and natural speech. We introduce a novel pipeline for extracting key prosodic features directly from complex brain iEEG signals, including intonation, pitch, and rhythm. To effectively utilize these crucial features for natural-sounding speech, we employ advanced deep learning models. Furthermore, this chapter introduces a novel transformer encoder architecture specifically designed for brain-to-speech tasks. Unlike conventional models, our architecture integrates the extracted prosodic features to significantly enhance speech reconstruction, resulting in generated speech with improved intelligibility and expressiveness. A detailed evaluation demonstrates superior performance over established baseline methods, such as traditional Griffin-Lim and CNN-based reconstruction, across both quantitative and perceptual metrics. By demonstrating these advancements in feature extraction and transformer-based learning, this chapter contributes to the growing field of AI-driven neuroprosthetics, paving the way for assistive technologies that restore communication for individuals with speech impairments. Finally, we discuss promising future research directions, including the integration of diffusion models and real-time inference systems.

</details>


### [398] [Ensemble-Based Dirichlet Modeling for Predictive Uncertainty and Selective Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06032)
*Courtney Franzen,Farhad Pourkamali-Anaraki*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于集成softmax输出的Dirichlet参数估计方法，通过矩估计和最大似然优化，为神经网络分类器提供更稳定的预测不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交叉熵训练的神经网络分类器缺乏内在的不确定性估计能力，需要外部技术获取。softmax分数在不同训练运行中变化大，限制了不确定性决策的可靠性。证据深度学习虽然能单次前向传播产生不确定性估计，但对损失函数、先验正则化等设计选择高度敏感。

Method: 提出基于集成softmax输出的Dirichlet参数估计策略：1）使用矩估计方法从softmax输出集成中估计Dirichlet分布参数；2）可选的最大似然优化步骤进一步精炼估计。这种方法将不确定性估计与脆弱的证据损失设计解耦，同时缓解单次交叉熵训练的变异性。

Result: 在多个数据集上，该方法显示出改进的稳定性和预测不确定性行为，在不确定性引导的下游应用中（如预测置信度评分和选择性分类）表现更强。

Conclusion: 通过集成softmax输出进行Dirichlet参数估计的方法，为神经网络分类器提供了更可靠的不确定性估计，解决了传统交叉熵训练和证据深度学习的局限性。

Abstract: Neural network classifiers trained with cross-entropy loss achieve strong predictive accuracy but lack the capability to provide inherent predictive uncertainty estimates, thus requiring external techniques to obtain these estimates. In addition, softmax scores for the true class can vary substantially across independent training runs, which limits the reliability of uncertainty-based decisions in downstream tasks. Evidential Deep Learning aims to address these limitations by producing uncertainty estimates in a single pass, but evidential training is highly sensitive to design choices including loss formulation, prior regularization, and activation functions. Therefore, this work introduces an alternative Dirichlet parameter estimation strategy by applying a method of moments estimator to ensembles of softmax outputs, with an optional maximum-likelihood refinement step. This ensemble-based construction decouples uncertainty estimation from the fragile evidential loss design while also mitigating the variability of single-run cross-entropy training, producing explicit Dirichlet predictive distributions. Across multiple datasets, we show that the improved stability and predictive uncertainty behavior of these ensemble-derived Dirichlet estimates translate into stronger performance in downstream uncertainty-guided applications such as prediction confidence scoring and selective classification.

</details>


### [399] [Energy-Based Dynamical Models for Neurocomputation, Learning, and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05042)
*Arthur N. Montanari,Francesco Bullo,Dmitry Krotov,Adilson E. Motter*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该教程综述了控制理论、神经科学和机器学习交叉领域的最新进展，重点关注基于能量的动力学模型，如连续时间Hopfield网络和玻尔兹曼机，并扩展到现代发展如密集关联记忆模型和振荡器网络，旨在提高计算系统的可扩展性、鲁棒性和能效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动机在于探索动力学系统执行计算的新机制，特别是神经启发方法，以弥合人工与生物系统之间的差距，提高模型学习、训练、记忆检索、数据驱动控制和优化等任务的可扩展性、鲁棒性和能效。

Method: 方法基于能量动力学模型，通过梯度流和能量景观编码信息。从经典公式（连续时间Hopfield网络、玻尔兹曼机）扩展到现代发展，包括高容量存储的密集关联记忆模型、大规模优化的振荡器网络，以及复合约束重建的近端下降动力学。

Result: 展示了控制理论原理如何指导下一代神经计算系统设计，超越了传统的前馈和基于反向传播的人工智能方法，为模型学习、记忆检索、数据驱动控制和优化提供了新的计算框架。

Conclusion: 控制理论、神经科学和机器学习的交叉为计算系统设计提供了新视角，能量动力学模型是实现可扩展、鲁棒和能效计算的有前景方向，有望推动超越传统人工智能方法的新一代神经计算系统发展。

Abstract: Recent advances at the intersection of control theory, neuroscience, and machine learning have revealed novel mechanisms by which dynamical systems perform computation. These advances encompass a wide range of conceptual, mathematical, and computational ideas, with applications for model learning and training, memory retrieval, data-driven control, and optimization. This tutorial focuses on neuro-inspired approaches to computation that aim to improve scalability, robustness, and energy efficiency across such tasks, bridging the gap between artificial and biological systems. Particular emphasis is placed on energy-based dynamical models that encode information through gradient flows and energy landscapes. We begin by reviewing classical formulations, such as continuous-time Hopfield networks and Boltzmann machines, and then extend the framework to modern developments. These include dense associative memory models for high-capacity storage, oscillator-based networks for large-scale optimization, and proximal-descent dynamics for composite and constrained reconstruction. The tutorial demonstrates how control-theoretic principles can guide the design of next-generation neurocomputing systems, steering the discussion beyond conventional feedforward and backpropagation-based approaches to artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [400] [Towards Scaling Law Analysis For Spatiotemporal Weather Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05068)
*Alexander Kiefer,Prasanna Balaprakash,Xiao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该研究将神经缩放定律分析扩展到自回归天气预报领域，分析了多通道、长时域预测中的误差分布和缩放行为，发现全局指标可能掩盖特定通道和时域的退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 天气预报与NLP/CV任务不同，具有自回归滚动误差累积、多物理通道耦合、全局指标与局部行为不一致等挑战。需要研究自回归天气预报中的缩放定律如何随通道和预测时域变化。

Method: 扩展神经缩放分析框架，从单步训练损失扩展到长时域滚动预测和每通道指标。量化三个关键问题：误差在通道间的分布及其随预测时域的增长速率；全局误差池化下的幂律缩放是否成立；缩放拟合如何随时域和通道在参数、数据和计算三个维度变化。

Result: 发现强烈的跨通道和跨时域异质性：全局池化的缩放表现可能看似良好，但许多通道在后期预测时域会出现性能退化。不同通道和预测时域表现出不同的缩放行为。

Conclusion: 天气预报的缩放分析需要考虑通道和时域异质性。研究结果为加权目标函数、时域感知课程学习以及跨输出资源分配提供了重要启示，不能仅依赖全局指标评估模型性能。

Abstract: Compute-optimal scaling laws are relatively well studied for NLP and CV, where objectives are typically single-step and targets are comparatively homogeneous. Weather forecasting is harder to characterize in the same framework: autoregressive rollouts compound errors over long horizons, outputs couple many physical channels with disparate scales and predictability, and globally pooled test metrics can disagree sharply with per-channel, late-lead behavior implied by short-horizon training. We extend neural scaling analysis for autoregressive weather forecasting from single-step training loss to long rollouts and per-channel metrics. We quantify (1) how prediction error is distributed across channels and how its growth rate evolves with forecast horizon, (2) if power law scaling holds for test error, relative to rollout length when error is pooled globally, and (3) how that fit varies jointly with horizon and channel for parameter, data, and compute-based scaling axes. We find strong cross-channel and cross-horizon heterogeneity: pooled scaling can look favorable while many channels degrade at late leads. We discuss implications for weighted objectives, horizon-aware curricula, and resource allocation across outputs.

</details>


### [401] [Feature-Aware Anisotropic Local Differential Privacy for Utility-Preserving Graph Representation Learning in Metal Additive Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05077)
*MD Shafikul Islam,Mahathir Mohammad Bappy,Saifur Rahman Tushar,Md Arifuzzaman*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出FI-LDP-HGAT框架，结合分层图注意力网络和特征重要性感知的局部差分隐私机制，用于金属增材制造中的缺陷检测，在保护私有过程数据的同时保持高检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金属增材制造需要高保真传感器数据用于质量保证，但这些数据包含专有工艺信息，限制了数据共享合作。现有缺陷检测模型将熔池观测视为独立样本，忽略了层间物理耦合，而传统局部差分隐私技术在所有特征维度上均匀添加噪声，导致严重的性能下降。

Method: 提出FI-LDP-HGAT框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 分层图注意力网络(HGAT)，捕捉扫描轨迹和沉积层间的空间和热依赖关系；2) 特征重要性感知的各向异性高斯机制(FI-LDP)，基于编码器推导的重要性先验重新分配隐私预算，对任务关键的热特征添加较低噪声，对冗余维度添加较高噪声，同时保持正式的LDP保证。

Result: 在定向能量沉积孔隙数据集上的实验表明，FI-LDP-HGAT在中等隐私预算(epsilon=4)下实现81.5%的效用恢复，在严格隐私(epsilon=2)下保持0.762的缺陷召回率，在所有评估指标上优于经典机器学习、标准GNN和替代隐私机制(包括DP-SGD)。机制分析显示特征重要性与噪声幅度之间存在强负相关(Spearman=-0.81)。

Conclusion: FI-LDP-HGAT通过结合分层图建模和特征重要性感知的隐私保护，有效解决了金属增材制造中数据共享的隐私-效用权衡问题，为安全关键组件的协作质量保证提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Metal additive manufacturing (AM) enables the fabrication of safety-critical components, but reliable quality assurance depends on high-fidelity sensor streams containing proprietary process information, limiting collaborative data sharing. Existing defect-detection models typically treat melt-pool observations as independent samples, ignoring layer-wise physical couplings. Moreover, conventional privacy-preserving techniques, particularly Local Differential Privacy (LDP), lead to severe utility degradation because they inject uniform noise across all feature dimensions. To address these interrelated challenges, we propose FI-LDP-HGAT. This computational framework combines two methodological components: a stratified Hierarchical Graph Attention Network (HGAT) that captures spatial and thermal dependencies across scan tracks and deposited layers, and a feature-importance-aware anisotropic Gaussian mechanism (FI-LDP) for non-interactive feature privatization. Unlike isotropic LDP, FI-LDP redistributes the privacy budget across embedding coordinates using an encoder-derived importance prior, assigning lower noise to task-critical thermal signatures and higher noise to redundant dimensions while maintaining formal LDP guarantees. Experiments on a Directed Energy Deposition (DED) porosity dataset demonstrate that FI-LDP-HGAT achieves 81.5% utility recovery at a moderate privacy budget (epsilon = 4) and maintains defect recall of 0.762 under strict privacy (epsilon = 2), while outperforming classical ML, standard GNNs, and alternative privacy mechanisms, including DP-SGD across all evaluated metrics. Mechanistic analysis confirms a strong negative correlation (Spearman = -0.81) between feature importance and noise magnitude, providing interpretable evidence that the privacy-utility gains are driven by principled anisotropic allocation.

</details>


### [402] [Bivariate Causal Discovery Using Rate-Distortion MDL: An Information Dimension Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05829)
*Tiago Brogueira,Mário A. T. Figueiredo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于率失真理论的因果发现新方法RDMDL，通过改进对原因变量描述长度的估计，在Tübingen数据集上取得了有竞争力的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于最小描述长度(MDL)的因果发现方法未能正确估计原因变量的描述长度，主要依赖因果机制的描述长度做决策。需要更准确地衡量原因变量的复杂度。

Method: 基于率失真理论，提出新的原因变量描述长度估计方法：使用直方图密度估计确定失真水平，利用信息维度计算最小码率。结合传统因果机制描述方法，构建RDMDL方法。

Result: 在Tübingen因果发现数据集上，RDMDL方法取得了有竞争力的性能表现。

Conclusion: 通过率失真理论改进原因变量描述长度的估计，能提升基于MDL的因果发现方法的性能，为因果推断提供了新思路。

Abstract: Approaches to bivariate causal discovery based on the minimum description length (MDL) principle approximate the (uncomputable) Kolmogorov complexity of the models in each causal direction, selecting the one with the lower total complexity. The premise is that nature's mechanisms are simpler in their true causal order. Inherently, the description length (complexity) in each direction includes the description of the cause variable and that of the causal mechanism. In this work, we argue that current state-of-the-art MDL-based methods do not correctly address the problem of estimating the description length of the cause variable, effectively leaving the decision to the description length of the causal mechanism.
