We use the SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) technique to determine the relative importance of each criterion, revealing the Supply-Demand Ratio, a composite feature that reflects local market competition dynamics, as the most influential factor, followed by Road, Rail Line and Urban Area Distance. The validation of suitability maps generated by our LB-MCDM model suggests that 10-11% of the MS landscape is highly suitable for sawmill location.

</details>


### [441] [General Multimodal Protein Design Enables DNA-Encoding of Chemistry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05181)
*Jarrid Rector-Brooks,Théophile Lambert,Marta Skreta,Daniel Roth,Yueming Long,Zi-Qi Li,Xi Zhang,Miruna Cretu,Francesca-Zhoufan Li,Tanvi Ganapathy,Emily Jin,Avishek Joey Bose,Jason Yang,Kirill Neklyudov,Yoshua Bengio,Alexander Tong,Frances H. Arnold,Cheng-Hao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: DISCO是一个多模态扩散模型，能够围绕任意生物分子共同设计蛋白质序列和3D结构，成功设计了催化新型碳烯转移反应的血红素酶


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然进化探索的酶化学多样性有限，现有深度生成模型需要预先指定催化残基。需要开发能够围绕任意生物分子共同设计蛋白质序列和结构的通用方法

Method: DISCO（DIffusion for Sequence-structure CO-design）多模态扩散模型，结合序列和结构共同设计，采用推理时缩放方法优化多模态目标

Result: 仅基于反应中间体条件，DISCO设计了具有新颖活性位点几何结构的血红素酶，催化了多种新型碳烯转移反应，活性超过工程酶

Conclusion: DISCO为可进化酶提供了可扩展的设计路径，扩展了基因可编码转化的潜在范围

Abstract: Evolution is an extraordinary engine for enzymatic diversity, yet the chemistry it has explored remains a narrow slice of what DNA can encode. Deep generative models can design new proteins that bind ligands, but none have created enzymes without pre-specifying catalytic residues. We introduce DISCO (DIffusion for Sequence-structure CO-design), a multimodal model that co-designs protein sequence and 3D structure around arbitrary biomolecules, as well as inference-time scaling methods that optimize objectives across both modalities. Conditioned solely on reactive intermediates, DISCO designs diverse heme enzymes with novel active-site geometries. These enzymes catalyze new-to-nature carbene-transfer reactions, including alkene cyclopropanation, spirocyclopropanation, B-H, and C(sp$^3$)-H insertions, with high activities exceeding those of engineered enzymes. Random mutagenesis of a selected design further confirmed that enzyme activity can be improved through directed evolution. By providing a scalable route to evolvable enzymes, DISCO broadens the potential scope of genetically encodable transformations. Code is available at https://github.com/DISCO-design/DISCO.

</details>


### [442] [Jeffreys Flow: Robust Boltzmann Generators for Rare Event Sampling via Parallel Tempering Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05303)
*Guang Lin,Christian Moya,Di Qi,Xuda Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出Jeffreys Flow生成框架，通过Jeffreys散度蒸馏并行回火轨迹的采样数据，解决Boltzmann生成器中KL散度引起的模式崩溃问题，在多模态分布中实现更好的模式覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理系统采样面临罕见事件和亚稳态陷阱问题。现有Boltzmann生成器依赖反向KL散度，在多模态分布中经常出现灾难性模式崩溃，无法覆盖所有模式。

Method: 引入Jeffreys Flow生成框架，使用对称Jeffreys散度蒸馏并行回火轨迹的实证采样数据。该方法平衡局部目标搜索精度和全局模式覆盖，通过Jeffreys散度最小化抑制模式崩溃。

Result: 在高维非凸基准测试中展示了框架的可扩展性和准确性，包括系统校正副本交换随机梯度Langevin动力学中的随机梯度偏差，以及大幅加速量子热态路径积分蒙特卡洛的精确重要性采样。

Conclusion: Jeffreys Flow通过Jeffreys散度蒸馏提供了一种鲁棒的生成框架，有效解决模式崩溃问题，在复杂物理系统采样中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Sampling physical systems with rough energy landscapes is hindered by rare events and metastable trapping. While Boltzmann generators already offer a solution, their reliance on the reverse Kullback--Leibler divergence frequently induces catastrophic mode collapse, missing specific modes in multi-modal distributions. Here, we introduce the Jeffreys Flow, a robust generative framework that mitigates this failure by distilling empirical sampling data from Parallel Tempering trajectories using the symmetric Jeffreys divergence. This formulation effectively balances local target-seeking precision with global modes coverage. We show that minimizing Jeffreys divergence suppresses mode collapse and structurally corrects inherent inaccuracies via distillation of the empirical reference data. We demonstrate the framework's scalability and accuracy on highly non-convex multidimensional benchmarks, including the systematic correction of stochastic gradient biases in Replica Exchange Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics and the massive acceleration of exact importance sampling in Path Integral Monte Carlo for quantum thermal states.

</details>


### [443] [Optimal-Transport-Guided Functional Flow Matching for Turbulent Field Generation in Hilbert Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05700)
*Li Kunpeng,Wan Chenguang,Qu Zhisong,Lim Kyungtak,Virginie Grandgirard,Xavier Garbet,Yu Hua,Ong Yew Soon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出FOT-CFM框架，直接在无限维函数空间定义生成模型，用于湍流模拟，相比传统像素级方法能更好处理物理场的函数形式数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 湍流建模需要捕捉复杂的时空动力学和多尺度间歇性，传统知识系统难以应对。虽然扩散模型和Flow Matching等深度生成模型表现出潜力，但它们基于离散像素的本质限制了在湍流计算中的应用，因为湍流数据本质上是函数形式的。

Method: 提出Functional Optimal Transport Conditional Flow Matching (FOT-CFM)，直接在无限维函数空间定义生成框架。将物理场视为无限维希尔伯特空间的元素，在概率测度层面学习分辨率不变的生成动力学。整合最优传输理论，在希尔伯特空间中构建噪声和数据测度之间的确定性直线概率路径。

Result: 在Navier-Stokes方程、Kolmogorov Flow和Hasegawa-Wakatani方程等混沌动力系统上评估，FOT-CFM在再现高阶湍流统计量和能量谱方面表现出优于现有基准方法的保真度。

Conclusion: FOT-CFM为湍流模拟提供了一种新的函数空间生成框架，能够处理物理场的函数形式数据，实现无模拟训练并显著加速采样过程。

Abstract: High-fidelity modeling of turbulent flows requires capturing complex spatiotemporal dynamics and multi-scale intermittency, posing a fundamental challenge for traditional knowledge-based systems. While deep generative models, such as diffusion models and Flow Matching, have shown promising performance, they are fundamentally constrained by their discrete, pixel-based nature. This limitation restricts their applicability in turbulence computing, where data inherently exists in a functional form. To address this gap, we propose Functional Optimal Transport Conditional Flow Matching (FOT-CFM), a generative framework defined directly in infinite-dimensional function space. Unlike conventional approaches defined on fixed grids, FOT-CFM treats physical fields as elements of an infinite-dimensional Hilbert space, and learns resolution-invariant generative dynamics directly at the level of probability measures. By integrating Optimal Transport (OT) theory, we construct deterministic, straight-line probability paths between noise and data measures in Hilbert space. This formulation enables simulation-free training and significantly accelerates the sampling process. We rigorously evaluate the proposed system on a diverse suite of chaotic dynamical systems, including the Navier-Stokes equations, Kolmogorov Flow, and Hasegawa-Wakatani equations, all of which exhibit rich multi-scale turbulent structures. Experimental results demonstrate that FOT-CFM achieves superior fidelity in reproducing high-order turbulent statistics and energy spectra compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [444] [Learning $\mathsf{AC}^0$ Under Graphical Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06109)
*Gautam Chandrasekaran,Jason Gaitonde,Ankur Moitra,Arsen Vasilyan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了在具有多项式增长和强空间混合的图模型分布下，准多项式时间学习AC⁰电路的算法，突破了传统依赖独立同分布均匀分布的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统学习理论中的许多结果严重依赖乘积结构（独立同分布均匀分布），这在现实场景中不成立。如何在更自然的相关分布下获得类似的学习保证是该领域长期存在的挑战。

Method: 通过新的采样算法，将均匀分布下的低阶多项式逼近结果转移到图模型分布中，绕过了传统傅里叶分析的局限性。

Result: 在具有多项式增长和强空间混合的图模型分布下，实现了AC⁰电路的准多项式时间学习算法，并可扩展到单调函数和半空间等其他函数类。

Conclusion: 该工作突破了传统学习理论对乘积分布的依赖，为在更自然的分布下学习电路类提供了新方法，扩展了低阶算法的适用范围。

Abstract: In a landmark result, Linial, Mansour and Nisan (J. ACM 1993) gave a quasipolynomial-time algorithm for learning constant-depth circuits given labeled i.i.d. samples under the uniform distribution. Their work has had a deep and lasting legacy in computational learning theory, in particular introducing the $\textit{low-degree algorithm}$. However, an important critique of many results and techniques in the area is the reliance on product structure, which is unlikely to hold in realistic settings. Obtaining similar learning guarantees for more natural correlated distributions has been a longstanding challenge in the field.
  In particular, we give quasipolynomial-time algorithms for learning $\mathsf{AC}^0$ substantially beyond the product setting, when the inputs come from any graphical model with polynomial growth that exhibits strong spatial mixing. The main technical challenge is in giving a workaround to Fourier analysis, which we do by showing how new sampling algorithms allow us to transfer statements about low-degree polynomial approximation under the uniform setting to graphical models. Our approach is general enough to extend to other well-studied function classes, like monotone functions and halfspaces.

</details>


### [445] [The Hiremath Early Detection (HED) Score: A Measure-Theoretic Evaluation Standard for Temporal Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04993)
*Prakul Sunil Hiremath*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了HED评分，一种用于非平稳随机过程中突发状态转换检测的时间价值评估标准，解决了现有ROC/AUC框架对延迟不敏感的问题，并展示了基于状态空间模型的检测方法PARD-SSM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估范式（主要是ROC/AUC框架）在时间上是不可知的，对任意延迟的检测给予相同评价，这在网络安全、算法监控和流行病监测等时间关键领域存在根本不足。需要一种能够量化信息时间价值的评估标准。

Method: 提出了HED评分，通过在后验概率流上集成一个基线中性、指数衰减的核函数来量化检测的时间价值。同时提出了PARD-SSM方法，结合分数随机微分方程和切换线性动态系统进行概率异常和状态检测。

Result: 在NSL-KDD基准测试中，PARD-SSM实现了0.0643的HED评分，相比随机森林基线（0.0132）提升了388.8%，统计显著性通过块自举重采样确认（p < 0.001）。

Conclusion: HED评分解决了现有评估框架对延迟不敏感的根本缺陷，满足三个公理要求，并提出了参数化家族。建议将HED评分作为ROC/AUC的继任评估标准。

Abstract: We introduce the Hiremath Early Detection (HED) Score, a principled, measure-theoretic evaluation criterion for quantifying the time-value of information in systems operating over non-stationary stochastic processes subject to abrupt regime transitions. Existing evaluation paradigms, chiefly the ROC/AUC framework and its downstream variants, are temporally agnostic: they assign identical credit to a detection at t + 1 and a detection at t + tau for arbitrarily large tau. This indifference to latency is a fundamental inadequacy in time-critical domains including cyber-physical security, algorithmic surveillance, and epidemiological monitoring.
  The HED Score resolves this by integrating a baseline-neutral, exponentially decaying kernel over the posterior probability stream of a target regime, beginning precisely at the onset of the regime shift. The resulting scalar simultaneously encodes detection acuity, temporal lead, and pre-transition calibration quality. We prove that the HED Score satisfies three axiomatic requirements: (A1) Temporal Monotonicity, (A2) Invariance to Pre-Attack Bias, and (A3) Sensitivity Decomposability. We further demonstrate that the HED Score admits a natural parametric family indexed by the Hiremath Decay Constant (lambda_H), whose domain-specific calibration constitutes the Hiremath Standard Table.
  As an empirical vehicle, we present PARD-SSM (Probabilistic Anomaly and Regime Detection via Switching State-Space Models), which couples fractional Stochastic Differential Equations (fSDEs) with a Switching Linear Dynamical System (S-LDS) inference backend. On the NSL-KDD benchmark, PARD-SSM achieves a HED Score of 0.0643, representing a 388.8 percent improvement over a Random Forest baseline (0.0132), with statistical significance confirmed via block-bootstrap resampling (p < 0.001). We propose the HED Score as the successor evaluation standard to ROC/AUC.

</details>


### [446] [Generative Path-Law Jump-Diffusion: Sequential MMD-Gradient Flows and Generalisation Bounds in Marcus-Signature RKHS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05008)
*Daniel Bloch*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于合成前瞻性、右连左极随机轨迹的生成框架，该框架能与时变路径律代理保持序列一致性，并纳入预期的结构断裂、制度转换和非自主动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机轨迹生成方法难以处理复杂的非平稳动态，如结构性断裂、制度转换和时变路径依赖。需要一种能生成与前瞻性路径律代理保持序列一致性的轨迹的方法，以捕捉复杂金融市场和其他动态系统中的非交换矩和高阶随机纹理。

Method: 将路径合成构建为受限Skorokhod流形上的序列匹配问题，开发了Anticipatory Neural Jump-Diffusion (ANJD)流，这是一种通过反演时间扩展Marcus意义签名来生成路径的机制。核心是Anticipatory Variance-Normalised Signature Geometry (AVNSG)，一种在签名流形上执行动态谱白化的时变精度算子。使用Nyström压缩得分匹配和前瞻性混合Euler-Maruyama-Marcus积分方案实现。

Result: 该方法能有效捕捉复杂、不连续路径律的非交换矩和高阶随机纹理，具有高计算效率。理论分析表明联合生成流构成相对于移动目标代理的最大均值差异泛函的无穷小最速下降方向。

Conclusion: 提出的ANJD框架为合成具有前瞻性路径律代理一致性的随机轨迹提供了理论严谨且计算高效的方法，特别适用于处理结构性断裂、制度转换和重尾创新的复杂动态系统。

Abstract: This paper introduces a novel generative framework for synthesising forward-looking, càdlàg stochastic trajectories that are sequentially consistent with time-evolving path-law proxies, thereby incorporating anticipated structural breaks, regime shifts, and non-autonomous dynamics. By framing path synthesis as a sequential matching problem on restricted Skorokhod manifolds, we develop the \textit{Anticipatory Neural Jump-Diffusion} (ANJD) flow, a generative mechanism that effectively inverts the time-extended Marcus-sense signature. Central to this approach is the Anticipatory Variance-Normalised Signature Geometry (AVNSG), a time-evolving precision operator that performs dynamic spectral whitening on the signature manifold to ensure contractivity during volatile regime shifts and discrete aleatoric shocks. We provide a rigorous theoretical analysis demonstrating that the joint generative flow constitutes an infinitesimal steepest descent direction for the Maximum Mean Discrepancy functional relative to a moving target proxy. Furthermore, we establish statistical generalisation bounds within the restricted path-space and analyse the Rademacher complexity of the whitened signature functionals to characterise the expressive power of the model under heavy-tailed innovations. The framework is implemented via a scalable numerical scheme involving Nyström-compressed score-matching and an anticipatory hybrid Euler-Maruyama-Marcus integration scheme. Our results demonstrate that the proposed method captures the non-commutative moments and high-order stochastic texture of complex, discontinuous path-laws with high computational efficiency.

</details>


### [447] [Probabilistic Tree Inference Enabled by FDSOI Ferroelectric FETs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05115)
*Pengyu Ren,Xingtian Wang,Boyang Cheng,Jiahui Duan,Giuk Kim,Xuezhong Niu,Halid Mulaosmanovic,Stefan Duenkel,Sven Beyer,X. Sharon Hu,Ningyuan Cao,Kai Ni*

Main category: cs.ET

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于FDSOI-FeFET的单片硬件平台，原生支持ACAM和GRNG功能，用于高效实现贝叶斯决策树，在不确定性量化、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性方面表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶、医疗诊断和金融系统等应用需要具备不确定性量化、可解释性和噪声鲁棒性的机器学习模型。贝叶斯决策树适合这些任务，但现有CPU/GPU实现存在内存瓶颈和不规则处理模式，而多平台ACAM/GRNG解决方案又带来集成复杂性和能耗问题。

Method: 开发了单片FDSOI-FeFET硬件平台，利用铁电晶体管的铁电极化实现紧凑的多位存储用于ACAM，利用栅漏重叠区的带间隧穿和空穴存储提供高质量熵源用于GRNG。

Result: 在MNIST数据集上，相比传统决策树，在数据集噪声和设备变化下分类准确率提高40%以上；相比CPU/GPU基线，速度提升超过2个数量级，能效提升超过4个数量级。

Conclusion: 该单片硬件平台为贝叶斯决策树提供了可扩展的解决方案，特别适合资源受限和安全关键环境，实现了强大的不确定性估计、可解释性和噪声容忍度。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence applications in autonomous driving, medical diagnostics, and financial systems increasingly demand machine learning models that can provide robust uncertainty quantification, interpretability, and noise resilience. Bayesian decision trees (BDTs) are attractive for these tasks because they combine probabilistic reasoning, interpretable decision-making, and robustness to noise. However, existing hardware implementations of BDTs based on CPUs and GPUs are limited by memory bottlenecks and irregular processing patterns, while multi-platform solutions exploiting analog content-addressable memory (ACAM) and Gaussian random number generators (GRNGs) introduce integration complexity and energy overheads. Here we report a monolithic FDSOI-FeFET hardware platform that natively supports both ACAM and GRNG functionalities. The ferroelectric polarization of FeFETs enables compact, energy-efficient multi-bit storage for ACAM, and band-to-band tunneling in the gate-to-drain overlap region and subsequent hole storage in the floating body provides a high-quality entropy source for GRNG. System-level evaluations demonstrate that the proposed architecture provides robust uncertainty estimation, interpretability, and noise tolerance with high energy efficiency. Under both dataset noise and device variations, it achieves over 40% higher classification accuracy on MNIST compared to conventional decision trees. Moreover, it delivers more than two orders of magnitude speedup over CPU and GPU baselines and over four orders of magnitude improvement in energy efficiency, making it a scalable solution for deploying BDTs in resource-constrained and safety-critical environments.

</details>


### [448] [Transcriptomic Models for Immunotherapy Response Prediction Show Limited Cross-cohort Generalisability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05478)
*Yuheng Liang,Lucy Chuo,Ahmadreza Argha,Nona Farbehi,Lu Chen,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,Amin Beheshti,Thantrira Porntaveetusm,Youqiong Ye,Hamid Alinejad-Rokny*

Main category: q-bio.GN

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了9种基于转录组学的免疫检查点抑制剂（ICI）反应预测模型，发现这些模型在未见数据集上的预测性能普遍有限，跨队列泛化能力不足，生物学一致性较差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 免疫检查点抑制剂（ICIs）已改变癌症治疗，但许多患者存在内在或获得性耐药，准确预测治疗反应是临床迫切需求。虽然基于转录组学的生物标志物（包括bulk RNA-seq和单细胞RNA-seq）有望捕捉肿瘤-免疫相互作用，但现有预测模型的跨队列泛化能力尚不明确。

Method: 系统评估了9种最先进的转录组学ICI反应预测模型：5种基于bulk RNA-seq（COMPASS、IRNet、NetBio、IKCScore、TNBC-ICI）和4种基于单细胞RNA-seq（PRECISE、DeepGeneX、Tres、scCURE）。使用模型开发时未见过的公开独立数据集进行基准测试，并进行通路水平分析以评估生物学一致性。

Result: 预测性能普遍有限：bulk RNA-seq模型在大多数队列中表现接近随机水平，单细胞RNA-seq模型仅略有改善。通路分析显示各模型的生物标志物信号稀疏且不一致。单细胞模型在免疫相关通路（如移植排斥）上有所收敛，而bulk模型几乎没有可重复的重叠。PRECISE和NetBio识别出最一致的免疫相关主题，而IRNet主要捕捉与ICI生物学弱相关的代谢通路。

Conclusion: 当前转录组学ICI预测模型在跨队列稳健性和生物学一致性方面存在显著局限，凸显了改进领域适应、标准化预处理和基于生物学原理的模型设计的必要性。

Abstract: Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) have transformed cancer therapy; yet substantial proportion of patients exhibit intrinsic or acquired resistance, making accurate pre-treatment response prediction a critical unmet need. Transcriptomics-based biomarkers derived from bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) offer a promising avenue for capturing tumour-immune interactions, yet the cross-cohort generalisability of existing prediction models remains unclear.We systematically benchmark nine state-of-the-art transcriptomic ICI response predictors, five bulk RNA-seq-based models (COMPASS, IRNet, NetBio, IKCScore, and TNBC-ICI) and four scRNA-seq-based models (PRECISE, DeepGeneX, Tres and scCURE), using publicly available independent datasets unseen during model development. Overall, predictive performance was modest: bulk RNA-seq models performed at or near chance level across most cohorts, while scRNA-seq models showed only marginal improvements. Pathway-level analyses revealed sparse and inconsistent biomarker signals across models. Although scRNA-seq-based predictors converged on immune-related programs such as allograft rejection, bulk RNA-seq-based models exhibited little reproducible overlap. PRECISE and NetBio identified the most coherent immune-related themes, whereas IRNet predominantly captured metabolic pathways weakly aligned with ICI biology. Together, these findings demonstrate the limited cross-cohort robustness and biological consistency of current transcriptomic ICI prediction models, underscoring the need for improved domain adaptation, standardised preprocessing, and biologically grounded model design.

</details>


### [449] [Optimal Centered Active Excitation in Linear System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05518)
*Kaito Ito,Alexandre Proutiere*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种用于线性系统辨识的主动学习算法，基于普通最小二乘和半定规划，达到最小样本复杂度，并能高效计算系统矩阵估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线性系统辨识中，如何设计高效的主动学习算法以最小化样本复杂度是一个重要问题。现有方法可能无法达到理论最优的样本效率，或者计算复杂度较高。

Method: 基于普通最小二乘和半定规划的主动学习算法，使用最优中心噪声激励。首先建立任何主动学习算法达到指定精度和置信水平所需样本复杂度的下界，然后推导所提算法的样本复杂度上界。

Result: 所提算法的样本复杂度上界与任何算法的下界相匹配（相差通用常数因子），表明算法达到了理论最优的样本效率。边界易于解释，并明确显示了其对状态维度等系统参数的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 该算法在线性系统辨识中实现了理论最优的样本复杂度，同时保持了计算效率，为系统辨识提供了高效的主动学习方法。

Abstract: We propose an active learning algorithm for linear system identification with optimal centered noise excitation. Notably, our algorithm, based on ordinary least squares and semidefinite programming, attains the minimal sample complexity while allowing for efficient computation of an estimate of a system matrix. More specifically, we first establish lower bounds of the sample complexity for any active learning algorithm to attain the prescribed accuracy and confidence levels. Next, we derive a sample complexity upper bound of the proposed algorithm, which matches the lower bound for any algorithm up to universal factors. Our tight bounds are easy to interpret and explicitly show their dependence on the system parameters such as the state dimension.

</details>


### [450] [A deep learning framework for jointly solving transient Fokker-Planck equations with arbitrary parameters and initial distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06001)
*Xiaolong Wang,Jing Feng,Qi Liu,Chengli Tan,Yuanyuan Liu,Yong Xu*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出PAPS方法，通过深度学习统一求解Fokker-Planck方程，实现任意初始分布、系统参数和时间点的瞬态概率分布高效计算，推理速度比GPU加速蒙特卡洛模拟快4个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数值方法缺乏并行计算能力，限制了参数探索和瞬态分析。需要一种能同时处理任意多模态初始分布、系统参数和时间点的高效FPE求解方法。

Method: 使用高斯混合分布统一初始、瞬态和稳态分布；构建约束保持自编码器，将约束的GMD参数双射映射到无约束低维潜在表示；在表示空间中用单一演化网络建模全景瞬态动力学。

Result: 在典型系统上保持高精度，推理速度比GPU加速蒙特卡洛模拟快4个数量级，实现了实时参数扫描和随机分岔的系统研究。

Conclusion: 通过解耦表示学习和物理信息瞬态动力学，为多维参数化随机系统的概率建模建立了可扩展范式。

Abstract: Efficiently solving the Fokker-Planck equation (FPE) is central to analyzing complex parameterized stochastic systems. However, current numerical methods lack parallel computation capabilities across varying conditions, severely limiting comprehensive parameter exploration and transient analysis. This paper introduces a deep learning-based pseudo-analytical probability solution (PAPS) that, via a single training process, simultaneously resolves transient FPE solutions for arbitrary multi-modal initial distributions, system parameters, and time points. The core idea is to unify initial, transient, and stationary distributions via Gaussian mixture distributions (GMDs) and develop a constraint-preserving autoencoder that bijectively maps constrained GMD parameters to unconstrained, low-dimensional latent representations. In this representation space, the panoramic transient dynamics across varying initial conditions and system parameters can be modeled by a single evolution network. Extensive experiments on paradigmatic systems demonstrate that the proposed PAPS maintains high accuracy while achieving inference speeds four orders of magnitude faster than GPU-accelerated Monte Carlo simulations. This efficiency leap enables previously intractable real-time parameter sweeps and systematic investigations of stochastic bifurcations. By decoupling representation learning from physics-informed transient dynamics, our work establishes a scalable paradigm for probabilistic modeling of multi-dimensional, parameterized stochastic systems.

</details>


### [451] [Topological Characterization of Churn Flow and Unsupervised Correction to the Wu Flow-Regime Map in Small-Diameter Vertical Pipes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06167)
*Brady Koenig,Sushovan Majhi,Atish Mitra,Abigail Stein,Burt Todd*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出首个基于拓扑学的搅混流数学定义，使用欧拉特征曲面和无监督多核学习框架，无需标注数据即可准确识别流型，挑战并修正现有机理模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 搅混流（垂直两相流中的混沌振荡状态）40多年来缺乏定量数学定义。现有模型在小直径管道中预测不准，需要基于拓扑学的无监督方法来准确表征流型转变。

Method: 1) 引入欧拉特征曲面（ECS）进行拓扑表征；2) 将无监督流型发现构建为多核学习问题，融合ECS核（时间对齐L1距离）、振幅统计核（尺度均值、标准差、最大最小值）和气体速度核；3) 使用自校准框架学习各核权重。

Result: 1) 框架将64%权重分配给拓扑特征；2) ECS推断的段塞/搅混转变比现有模型预测高3.81 m/s；3) 跨设施验证显示搅混流拓扑复杂度是段塞流的1.9倍；4) 在45个伪试验中达到95.6%的4类准确率和100%搅混流召回率，无需标注数据。

Conclusion: 首次为搅混流提供数学定义，证明无监督拓扑描述符能够挑战和修正广泛采用的机理模型，在流型识别中达到或超过需要大量标注数据的监督方法。

Abstract: Churn flow-the chaotic, oscillatory regime in vertical two-phase flow-has lacked a quantitative mathematical definition for over $40$ years. We introduce the first topology-based characterization using Euler Characteristic Surfaces (ECS). We formulate unsupervised regime discovery as Multiple Kernel Learning (MKL), blending two complementary ECS-derived kernels-temporal alignment ($L^1$ distance on the $χ(s,t)$ surface) and amplitude statistics (scale-wise mean, standard deviation, max, min)-with gas velocity. Applied to $37$ unlabeled air-water trials from Montana Tech, the self-calibrating framework learns weights $β_{ECS}=0.14$, $β_{amp}=0.50$, $β_{ugs}=0.36$, placing $64\%$ of total weight on topology-derived features ($β_{ECS} + β_{amp}$). The ECS-inferred slug/churn transition lies $+3.81$ m/s above Wu et al.'s (2017) prediction in $2$-in. tubing, quantifying reports that existing models under-predict slug persistence in small-diameter pipes where interfacial tension and wall-to-wall interactions dominate flow. Cross-facility validation on $947$ Texas A&M University images confirms $1.9\times$ higher topological complexity in churn vs. slug ($p < 10^{-5}$). Applied to $45$ TAMU pseudo-trials, the same unsupervised framework achieves $95.6\%$ $4$-class accuracy and $100\%$ churn recall-without any labeled training data-matching or exceeding supervised baselines that require thousands of annotated examples. This work provides the first mathematical definition of churn flow and demonstrates that unsupervised topological descriptors can challenge and correct widely adopted mechanistic models.

</details>


### [452] [A Theory-guided Weighted $L^2$ Loss for solving the BGK model via Physics-informed neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04971)
*Gyounghun Ko,Sung-Jun Son,Seung Yeon Cho,Myeong-Su Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文针对PINN在BGK模型中的局限性，提出了一种速度加权L²损失函数，通过惩罚高速区域的误差来保证宏观矩的准确预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准PINN的L²损失函数在应用于BGK模型时存在根本性不足，无法保证宏观矩的准确预测，导致近似解无法捕捉真实物理解。

Method: 提出了一种速度加权L²损失函数，专门设计用于有效惩罚高速区域的误差。建立了该方法的稳定性估计，证明最小化加权损失能保证近似解的收敛。

Result: 数值实验表明，采用这种加权PINN损失在各种基准测试中相比标准方法具有更高的准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 速度加权损失函数解决了PINN在BGK模型中的根本局限性，为物理信息神经网络在复杂物理系统中的应用提供了更可靠的框架。

Abstract: While Physics-Informed Neural Networks offer a promising framework for solving partial differential equations, the standard $L^2$ loss formulation is fundamentally insufficient when applied to the Bhatnagar-Gross-Krook (BGK) model. Specifically, simply minimizing the standard loss does not guarantee accurate predictions of the macroscopic moments, causing the approximate solutions to fail in capturing the true physical solution. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a velocity-weighted $L^2$ loss function designed to effectively penalize errors in the high-velocity regions. By establishing a stability estimate for the proposed approach, we shows that minimizing the proposed weighted loss guarantees the convergence of the approximate solution. Also, numerical experiments demonstrate that employing this weighted PINN loss leads to superior accuracy and robustness across various benchmarks compared to the standard approach.

</details>


### [453] [El Nino Prediction Based on Weather Forecast and Geographical Time-series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04998)
*Viet Trinh,Ha-Vy Luu,Quoc-Khiem Nguyen-Pham,Hung Tong,Thanh-Huyen Tran,Hoai-Nam Nguyen Dang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一个结合CNN和LSTM的混合深度学习框架，利用多源气象和地理数据提高厄尔尼诺事件的预测准确性和提前时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统厄尔尼诺预测模型主要依赖海洋和大气指数，缺乏对复杂气象地理数据动态交互的细粒度捕捉，需要更精确的预测来减轻其全球气候、经济和社会影响

Method: 整合实时全球天气预报数据、异常值、次表层海洋热含量和不同时空分辨率的大气压数据，采用CNN进行空间特征提取和LSTM进行时间依赖建模的混合深度学习架构

Result: 论文声称该框架能够识别厄尔尼诺事件的复杂前兆和演化模式，但具体量化结果未在摘要中提供

Conclusion: 提出的混合深度学习框架为厄尔尼诺预测提供了更全面和动态的方法，有望改善预测准确性和提前时间

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel framework for enhancing the prediction accuracy and lead time of El Niño events, crucial for mitigating their global climatic, economic, and societal impacts. Traditional prediction models often rely on oceanic and atmospheric indices, which may lack the granularity or dynamic interplay captured by comprehensive meteorological and geographical datasets. Our framework integrates real-time global weather forecast data with anomalies, subsurface ocean heat content, and atmospheric pressure across various temporal and spatial resolutions. Leveraging a hybrid deep learning architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction and a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network for temporal dependency modeling, the framework aims to identify complex precursors and evolving patterns of El Niño events.

</details>


### [454] [PCA-Driven Adaptive Sensor Triage for Edge AI Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05045)
*Ankit Hemant Lade,Sai Krishna Jasti,Nikhil Sinha,Indar Kumar,Akanksha Tiwari*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: PCA-Triage是一种用于工业物联网多通道传感器网络的流式算法，通过增量PCA将负载转换为按比例分配的通道采样率，在带宽预算下优化数据采集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业物联网中多通道传感器网络的数据量常常超过可用带宽，需要一种高效的方法在有限带宽下选择最重要的传感器通道进行采样，以保持系统性能。

Method: 提出PCA-Triage流式算法，将增量PCA负载转换为按比例分配的通道采样率。算法时间复杂度为O(wdk)，无需可训练参数，每个决策仅需0.67毫秒。

Result: 在7个基准测试（8-82个通道）上评估，PCA-Triage在50%带宽下是3/6数据集上最佳的无监督方法，在5/6数据集上显著优于所有基线。在TEP数据集上达到F1=0.961，接近全数据性能，在30%预算下仍保持F1>0.90。

Conclusion: PCA-Triage是一种高效、无参数的流式算法，能在有限带宽下保持接近全数据的性能，对丢包和传感器噪声具有鲁棒性。

Abstract: Multi-channel sensor networks in industrial IoT often exceed available bandwidth. We propose PCA-Triage, a streaming algorithm that converts incremental PCA loadings into proportional per-channel sampling rates under a bandwidth budget. PCA-Triage runs in O(wdk) time with zero trainable parameters (0.67 ms per decision).
  We evaluate on 7 benchmarks (8--82 channels) against 9 baselines. PCA-Triage is the best unsupervised method on 3 of 6 datasets at 50% bandwidth, winning 5 of 6 against every baseline with large effect sizes (r = 0.71--0.91). On TEP, it achieves F1 = 0.961 +/- 0.001 -- within 0.1% of full-data performance -- while maintaining F1 > 0.90 at 30% budget. Targeted extensions push F1 to 0.970. The algorithm is robust to packet loss and sensor noise (3.7--4.8% degradation under combined worst-case).

</details>


### [455] [FNO$^{\angle θ}$: Extended Fourier neural operator for learning state and optimal control of distributed parameter systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05187)
*Zhexian Li,Ketan Savla*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种扩展的傅里叶神经算子(FNO)架构，用于学习偏微分方程系统的状态和线性二次加性最优控制。通过将傅里叶变换的频率变量从实数域扩展到复数域，改进了FNO层，在非线性Burgers方程的学习中实现了数量级训练误差改进和更准确的非周期边界值预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于Ehrenpreis-Palamodov基本原理，发现线性常系数偏微分方程的任何状态和最优控制都可以表示为复数域中的积分。这个表示中的被积函数包含与逆傅里叶变换中相同的指数项，而逆傅里叶变换正是FNO层中卷积算子的表示基础。这启发了对FNO层的改进，将频率变量从实数域扩展到复数域，以捕捉基本原理中的积分表示。

Method: 扩展了傅里叶神经算子(FNO)架构，修改FNO层：将逆傅里叶变换中的频率变量从实数域扩展到复数域。这种方法能够捕捉Ehrenpreis-Palamodov基本原理中的积分表示，从而更好地学习偏微分方程系统的状态和线性二次加性最优控制。

Result: 在非线性Burgers'方程的状态和最优控制学习中，与原始FNO相比，实现了数量级的训练误差改进，并且对非周期边界值的预测更加准确。

Conclusion: 通过将傅里叶变换的频率变量扩展到复数域，提出的扩展FNO架构能够更有效地学习偏微分方程系统的状态和最优控制，在训练误差和边界值预测方面都显著优于原始FNO方法。

Abstract: We propose an extended Fourier neural operator (FNO) architecture for learning state and linear quadratic additive optimal control of systems governed by partial differential equations. Using the Ehrenpreis-Palamodov fundamental principle, we show that any state and optimal control of linear PDEs with constant coefficients can be represented as an integral in the complex domain. The integrand of this representation involves the same exponential term as in the inverse Fourier transform, where the latter is used to represent the convolution operator in FNO layer. Motivated by this observation, we modify the FNO layer by extending the frequency variable in the inverse Fourier transform from the real to complex domain to capture the integral representation from the fundamental principle. We illustrate the performance of FNO in learning state and optimal control for the nonlinear Burgers' equation, showing order of magnitude improvements in training errors and more accurate predictions of non-periodic boundary values over FNO.

</details>


### [456] [StrADiff: A Structured Source-Wise Adaptive Diffusion Framework for Linear and Nonlinear Blind Source Separation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04973)
*Yuan-Hao Wei*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种结构化源自适应扩散框架，用于线性和非线性盲源分离，通过为每个潜在维度分配独立的自适应扩散机制，实现源级潜在建模而非共享先验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统盲源分离方法通常依赖单一共享潜在先验，无法有效建模不同源的特有结构和动态特性。需要一种能够同时学习源恢复和混合/重建过程的统一框架，支持线性和非线性分离。

Method: 采用结构化源自适应扩散框架，将每个潜在维度解释为源分量，并分配独立的自适应扩散机制。每个源配备自适应高斯过程先验以施加时间结构，形成端到端联合优化目标，同时训练模型参数和潜在源。

Result: 建立了统一的线性和非线性盲源分离框架，实现了源级潜在建模。该方法不仅限于高斯过程先验，可容纳其他结构化源先验，为无监督源恢复提供了通用扩散基础方法。

Conclusion: 该框架为盲源分离提供了通用的结构化扩散方法，具有扩展到可解释潜在建模、源级解耦和潜在可识别非线性潜在变量学习的潜力，超越了传统盲源分离的应用范围。

Abstract: This paper presents a Structured Source-Wise Adaptive Diffusion Framework for linear and nonlinear blind source separation. The framework interprets each latent dimension as a source component and assigns to it an individual adaptive diffusion mechanism, thereby establishing source-wise latent modeling rather than relying on a single shared latent prior. The resulting formulation learns source recovery and the mixing/reconstruction process jointly within a unified end-to-end objective, allowing model parameters and latent sources to adapt simultaneously during training. This yields a common framework for both linear and nonlinear blind source separation. In the present instantiation, each source is further equipped with its own adaptive Gaussian process (GP) prior to impose source-wise temporal structure on the latent trajectories, while the overall framework is not restricted to Gaussian process priors and can in principle accommodate other structured source priors. The proposed model thus provides a general structured diffusion-based route to unsupervised source recovery, with potential relevance beyond blind source separation to interpretable latent modeling, source-wise disentanglement, and potentially identifiable nonlinear latent-variable learning under appropriate structural conditions.

</details>


### [457] [An Imbalanced Dataset with Multiple Feature Representations for Studying Quality Control of Next-Generation Sequencing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04981)
*Philipp Röchner,Clarissa Krämer,Johannes U Mayer,Franz Rothlauf,Steffen Albrecht,Maximilian Sprang*

Main category: q-bio.GN

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个包含37,491个NGS样本的数据集，包含两种质量相关特征表示：34个质量控制工具特征和8-1,183个基于ENCODE黑名单区域的特征，用于开发自动化的NGS数据质量控制工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NGS数据质量控制在不同的实验设置中具有挑战性，现有NGS存储库提供的质量相关特征有限，需要更丰富的特征表示来开发自动化质量控制工具。

Method: 从37,491个人类和鼠类NGS样本中提取两种特征：QC-34特征（来自质量控制工具的34个特征）和BL特征（基于ENCODE黑名单区域的问题基因组区域读取计数特征，数量从8到1,183不等）。数据集包含二元质量标签，来自自动化质量控制和领域专家评估。

Result: 所有样本中3.2%为低质量样本，监督机器学习算法能够准确从特征中预测质量标签，验证了所提供特征表示的相关性。

Conclusion: 提出的特征表示使研究人员能够研究不同特征类型（QC-34 vs BL特征）和粒度（变化的BL特征数量）如何影响质量问题的检测，为开发更好的NGS质量控制工具提供了基础。

Abstract: Next-generation sequencing (NGS) is a key technique for studying the DNA and RNA of organisms. However, identifying quality problems in NGS data across different experimental settings remains challenging. To develop automated quality-control tools, researchers require datasets with features that capture the characteristics of quality problems. Existing NGS repositories, however, offer only a limited number of quality-related features. To address this gap, we propose a dataset derived from 37.491 NGS samples with two types of quality-related feature representations. The first type consists of 34 features derived from quality control tools (QC-34 features). The second type has a variable number of features ranging from eight to 1.183. These features were derived from read counts in problematic genomic regions identified by the ENCODE blocklist (BL features). All features describe the same human and mouse samples from five genomic assays, allowing direct comparison of feature representations. The proposed dataset includes a binary quality label, derived from automated quality control and domain experts. Among all samples, $3.2\%$ are of low quality. Supervised machine learning algorithms accurately predicted quality labels from the features, confirming the relevance of the provided feature representations. The proposed feature representations enable researchers to study how different feature types (QC-34 vs. BL features) and granularities (varying number of BL features) affect the detection of quality problems.

</details>


### [458] [Individual-heterogeneous sub-Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05337)
*Huan Qing*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出个体异质性子高斯混合模型，为每个观测分配异质性参数，并开发高效谱方法实现精确聚类恢复


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高斯混合模型假设簇内同质性，但实际数据常呈现不同尺度或强度的异质性，需要更灵活的模型来捕捉这种个体差异

Method: 提出个体异质性子高斯混合模型，为每个观测分配异质性参数；开发基于谱方法的聚类算法，在温和分离条件下可证明实现精确聚类恢复

Result: 数值实验显示该方法在合成和真实数据上均优于现有聚类算法，包括经典高斯混合模型方法，在高维特征远多于样本的情况下仍有效

Conclusion: 个体异质性子高斯混合模型能有效捕捉实际数据中的异质性，提出的谱方法在理论和实验上都表现出优越性能

Abstract: The classical Gaussian mixture model assumes homogeneity within clusters, an assumption that often fails in real-world data where observations naturally exhibit varying scales or intensities. To address this, we introduce the individual-heterogeneous sub-Gaussian mixture model, a flexible framework that assigns each observation its own heterogeneity parameter, thereby explicitly capturing the heterogeneity inherent in practical applications. Built upon this model, we propose an efficient spectral method that provably achieves exact recovery of the true cluster labels under mild separation conditions, even in high-dimensional settings where the number of features far exceeds the number of samples. Numerical experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing clustering algorithms, including those designed for classical Gaussian mixture models.

</details>


### [459] [Active noise cancellation on open-ear smart glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05519)
*Kuang Yuan,Freddy Yifei Liu,Tong Xiao,Yiwen Song,Chengyi Shen,Saksham Bhutani,Justin Chan,Swarun Kumar*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 这篇论文提出了首个用于开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，仅使用眼镜框架上的麦克风和微型开放式扬声器，在100-1000Hz频率范围内实现平均9.6-11.2dB的噪声降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能眼镜作为日益普及的可穿戴平台，音频是其关键交互方式。然而，在嘈杂环境中，开放式智能眼镜的听力体验面临挑战，因为其开放式扬声器设计不密封耳道，且与依赖耳道内误差麦克风的传统主动降噪技术不兼容。

Method: 开发了一个低延迟计算管道，通过分布在眼镜框架周围的八个麦克风阵列估计耳朵处的噪声，并实时生成反噪声信号来消除环境噪声。构建了定制眼镜原型，并在8种移动环境下进行了用户研究评估。

Result: 在100-1000Hz频率范围内（环境噪声集中的范围），实现了平均9.6dB的无校准噪声降低，以及11.2dB的简短用户特定校准后噪声降低。

Conclusion: 成功展示了首个用于开放式智能眼镜的实时主动降噪系统，为智能眼镜在嘈杂环境中的音频交互提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Smart glasses are becoming an increasingly prevalent wearable platform, with audio as a key interaction modality. However, hearing in noisy environments remains challenging because smart glasses are equipped with open-ear speakers that do not seal the ear canal. Furthermore, the open-ear design is incompatible with conventional active noise cancellation (ANC) techniques, which rely on an error microphone inside or at the entrance of the ear canal to measure the residual sound heard after cancellation. Here we present the first real-time ANC system for open-ear smart glasses that suppresses environmental noise using only microphones and miniaturized open-ear speakers embedded in the glasses frame. Our low-latency computational pipeline estimates the noise at the ear from an array of eight microphones distributed around the glasses frame and generates an anti-noise signal in real-time to cancel environmental noise. We develop a custom glasses prototype and evaluate it in a user study across 8 environments under mobility in the 100--1000 Hz frequency range, where environmental noise is concentrated. We achieve a mean noise reduction of 9.6 dB without any calibration, and 11.2 dB with a brief user-specific calibration.

</details>


### [460] [Parametric Nonconvex Optimization via Convex Surrogates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05640)
*Renzi Wang,Panagiotis Patrinos,Alberto Bemporad*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于学习的方法构建替代问题来近似参数化非凸优化问题，替代函数设计为有限函数集的最小值，这些函数由凸函数和单调项组合而成，可通过并行凸优化直接求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 参数化非凸优化问题在实际应用中广泛存在，但求解困难。传统方法计算成本高或需要特殊结构。需要一种能够有效近似非凸问题并能高效求解的方法。

Method: 通过学习构建替代问题，替代函数设计为有限函数集的最小值，这些函数是凸函数和单调项的组合。这种结构使得替代问题可以通过并行凸优化直接求解，提高了计算效率。

Result: 在非凸路径跟踪问题上进行数值实验，验证了所提方法的近似质量。实验结果表明该方法能够有效近似原始非凸优化问题。

Conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的学习方法来构建可高效求解的参数化非凸优化问题的替代问题，通过并行凸优化实现高效计算，为非凸优化问题提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a novel learning-based approach to construct a surrogate problem that approximates a given parametric nonconvex optimization problem. The surrogate function is designed to be the minimum of a finite set of functions, given by the composition of convex and monotonic terms, so that the surrogate problem can be solved directly through parallel convex optimization. As a proof of concept, numerical experiments on a nonconvex path tracking problem confirm the approximation quality of the proposed method.

</details>


### [461] [Intrinsic perturbation scale for certified oracle objectives with epigraphic information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05678)
*Karim Bounja,Boujemaâ Achchab,Abdeljalil Sakat*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于认证包络信息的自然位移控制方法，用于处理具有非唯一极小值点的oracle目标函数，在二次增长条件下获得最优的平方根位移估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法需要局部一致值控制，这需要额外的结构假设且无法从有限点信息中认证。作者希望开发一种更弱但可认证的控制方法，利用认证包络提供的圆柱局部垂直包络控制来处理具有非唯一极小值点的目标函数。

Method: 引入基于认证包络信息的自然位移控制，用圆柱局部垂直包络控制替代传统的局部一致值控制。在集合二次增长条件下（允许非唯一极小值点），该方法能够获得经典的平方根位移估计。

Result: 在没有任何外在假设的情况下，获得了最优指数为1/2的平方根位移估计，为处理具有非唯一极小值点的oracle目标函数提供了可认证的位移控制框架。

Conclusion: 通过利用认证包络提供的圆柱局部垂直包络控制，可以在更弱的条件下获得最优的位移估计，为oracle目标函数的极小值集分析提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: We introduce a natural displacement control for minimizer sets of oracle objectives equipped with certified epigraphic information. Formally, we replace the usual local uniform value control of objective perturbations - uncertifiable from finite pointwise information without additional structure - by the strictly weaker requirement of a cylinder-localized vertical epigraphic control, naturally provided by certified envelopes. Under set-based quadratic growth (allowing nonunique minimizers), this yields the classical square-root displacement estimate with optimal exponent 1/2, without any extrinsic assumption.

</details>


### [462] [A Tensor-Train Framework for Bayesian Inference in High-Dimensional Systems: Applications to MIMO Detection and Channel Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05890)
*Luca Schmid,Dominik Sulz,Shrinivas Chimmalgi,Laurent Schmalen*

Main category: cs.IT

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于张量列(TT)格式的贝叶斯推理框架，用于解决高维离散输入加性噪声模型中的计算挑战，通过低秩表示实现近似最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维离散输入加性噪声模型中的贝叶斯推理面临指数级计算复杂度挑战，传统方法难以处理大规模通信系统中的联合后验概率分布计算。

Method: 提出张量列(TT)框架，利用联合对数后验概率质量函数的低秩TT表示，开发基于TT-cross算法和截断泰勒级数初始化的推理过程，应用于MIMO检测和二进制线性分组码软判决解码。

Result: 数值结果显示在广泛信噪比范围内实现近似最优的误码率性能，仅需适中的TT秩，验证了张量网络方法在通信系统中高效贝叶斯推理的潜力。

Conclusion: 张量列框架为高维离散输入加性噪声模型提供了可处理、近似最优的贝叶斯推理解决方案，展示了张量网络方法在通信系统推理问题中的有效性。

Abstract: Bayesian inference in high-dimensional discrete-input additive noise models is a fundamental challenge in communication systems, as the support of the required joint a posteriori probability (APP) mass function grows exponentially with the number of unknown variables. In this work, we propose a tensor-train (TT) framework for tractable, near-optimal Bayesian inference in discrete-input additive noise models. The central insight is that the joint log-APP mass function admits an exact low-rank representation in the TT format, enabling compact storage and efficient computations. To recover symbol-wise APP marginals, we develop a practical inference procedure that approximates the exponential of the log-posterior using a TT-cross algorithm initialized with a truncated Taylor-series. To demonstrate the generality of the approach, we derive explicit low-rank TT constructions for two canonical communication problems: the linear observation model under additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN), applied to multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) detection, and soft-decision decoding of binary linear block error correcting codes over the binary-input AWGN channel. Numerical results show near-optimal error-rate performance across a wide range of signal-to-noise ratios while requiring only modest TT ranks. These results highlight the potential of tensor-network methods for efficient Bayesian inference in communication systems.

</details>


### [463] [eVTOL Aircraft Energy Overhead Estimation under Conflict Resolution in High-Density Airspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06093)
*Alex Zongo,Peng Wei*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了eVTOL飞机在MVP冲突解决算法下的能耗影响，发现MVP去冲突是能源高效的（中位能耗开销低于1.5%），但分布呈现右偏，尾部情况可达44%开销。开发了机器学习模型用于任务启动时的能耗开销估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市空中交通中eVTOL飞机需要保持安全间隔，但冲突解决机动的能耗成本尚未系统量化。研究MVP算法下的冲突解决对eVTOL能耗的影响，为能源受限的eVTOL运营提供定量指导。

Method: 使用基于物理的功率模型集成在交通仿真中，分析约71,767个航路段，覆盖10-60架同时飞行飞机的交通密度。开发机器学习模型估计任务启动时的能耗开销，提供点估计和不确定性边界。

Result: MVP去冲突是能源高效的：所有密度水平下中位能耗开销保持在1.5%以下，大部分航段能耗惩罚可忽略。但分布呈现明显右偏，最高密度下尾部情况可达44%开销。95百分位范围为3.84%-5.3%，表明4-5%的储备裕度可覆盖绝大多数战术去冲突场景。

Conclusion: 验证了MVP算法适用于能源受限的eVTOL运营，为先进空中交通的储备能源确定提供了定量指导。机器学习模型提供保守的不确定性边界，适合安全关键的储备规划。

Abstract: Electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft operating in high-density urban airspace must maintain safe separation through tactical conflict resolution, yet the energy cost of such maneuvers has not been systematically quantified. This paper investigates how conflict-resolution maneuvers under the Modified Voltage Potential (MVP) algorithm affect eVTOL energy consumption. Using a physics-based power model integrated within a traffic simulation, we analyze approximately 71,767 en route sections within a sector, across traffic densities of 10-60 simultaneous aircraft. The main finding is that MVP-based deconfliction is energy-efficient: median energy overhead remains below 1.5% across all density levels, and the majority of en route flights within the sector incur negligible penalty. However, the distribution exhibits pronounced right-skewness, with tail cases reaching 44% overhead at the highest densities due to sustained multi-aircraft conflicts. The 95th percentile ranges from 3.84% to 5.3%, suggesting that a 4-5% reserve margin accommodates the vast majority of tactical deconfliction scenarios. To support operational planning, we develop a machine learning model that estimates energy overhead at mission initiation. Because conflict outcomes depend on future traffic interactions that cannot be known in advance, the model provides both point estimates and uncertainty bounds. These bounds are conservative; actual outcomes fall within the predicted range more often than the stated confidence level, making them suitable for safety-critical reserve planning. Together, these results validate MVP's suitability for energy-constrained eVTOL operations and provide quantitative guidance for reserve energy determination in Advanced Air Mobility.

</details>


### [464] [Untargeted analysis of volatile markers of post-exercise fat oxidation in exhaled breath](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05707)
*André Homeyer,Júlia Blanka Sziládi,Jan-Philipp Redlich,Jonathan Beauchamp,Y Lan Pham*

Main category: physics.med-ph

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 该研究通过呼气分析寻找脂肪氧化的生物标志物，发现丙酮是唯一与脂肪氧化强相关的挥发性有机化合物，并证明运动期间呼气丙酮测量可预测运动后脂肪氧化变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 丙酮作为呼气中监测脂肪氧化的非侵入性生物标志物具有潜力，但其应用受到混杂因素和浓度变化延迟的限制。研究旨在寻找除丙酮外的其他挥发性有机化合物作为脂肪氧化标志物，并探索运动期间呼气测量能否预测运动后脂肪氧化变化。

Method: 19名参与者完成两次25分钟自行车运动，中间有5分钟休息。使用质子转移反应飞行时间质谱分析运动期间和90分钟恢复期后的挥发性有机化合物排放。血液β-羟基丁酸浓度作为脂肪氧化的参考标志物。在检测到的773个分析特征中，筛选与BOHB强相关的信号。

Result: 仅发现四个信号与BOHB强相关（ρ≥0.82，p=0.0002），均归因于丙酮或其同位素/碎片。运动结束时的这些信号测量能准确预测参与者运动后BOHB的显著变化（F1分数≥0.83，准确率=0.89）。未发现新的呼气脂肪氧化生物标志物，但确认丙酮是关键标志物。

Conclusion: 研究未发现新的呼气脂肪氧化生物标志物，但确认丙酮是唯一强相关的标志物。运动期间呼气丙酮测量可能已能基本预测运动后脂肪氧化，为实时监测脂肪代谢提供了可能性。

Abstract: Breath acetone represents a promising non-invasive biomarker for monitoring fat oxidation during exercise. However, its utility is limited by confounding factors, as well as by the fact that significant changes in concentration occur only hours post-exercise, which makes real-time assessment difficult. We performed an untargeted screening for volatile organic compounds (VOCs) that could serve as markers of fat oxidation beyond acetone, and investigated whether breath measurements taken during exercise could predict post-exercise changes in fat oxidation. Nineteen participants completed two 25-min cycling sessions separated by a brief 5-min rest period. VOC emissions were analysed using proton-transfer-reaction time-of-flight mass spectrometry (PTR-TOF-MS) during exercise and after a 90-min recovery period. Blood $β$-hydroxybutyrate (BOHB) concentrations served as the reference marker for fat oxidation. Among 773 relevant analytical features detected in the PTR-TOF-MS measurements, only four signals exhibited strong correlations with BOHB ($ρ$ $\geq$ 0.82, p = 0.0002)-all attributable to acetone or its isotopologues or fragments. End-of-exercise measurements of these signals enabled accurate prediction of participants with substantial post-exercise BOHB changes (F1 score $\geq$ 0.83, accuracy = 0.89). Our study did not reveal any novel breath-based biomarkers of fat oxidation, but it confirmed acetone as the key marker. Moreover, our findings suggest that breath acetone measurements during exercise may already enable basic predictions of post-exercise fat oxidation.

</details>
